authors_text: Ming Feng,Kele Xu,Nanhui Wu,Weiquan Huang,Yan Bai,Changjian Wang,Huaimin Wang
title: Trusted Multi-Scale Classification Framework for Whole Slide Image
title_zh: 整个幻灯片图像的可信多尺度分类框架
abstract: Despite remarkable efforts been made, the classification of gigapixels whole-slide image (WSI) is severely restrained from either the constrained computing resources for the whole slides, or limited utilizing of the knowledge from different scales. Moreover, most of the previous attempts lacked of the ability of uncertainty estimation. Generally, the pathologists often jointly analyze WSI from the different magnifications. If the pathologists are uncertain by using single magnification, then they will change the magnification repeatedly to discover various features of the tissues. Motivated by the diagnose process of the pathologists, in this paper, we propose a trusted multi-scale classification framework for the WSI. Leveraging the Vision Transformer as the backbone for multi branches, our framework can jointly classification modeling, estimating the uncertainty of each magnification of a microscope and integrate the evidence from different magnification. Moreover, to exploit discriminative patches from WSIs and reduce the requirement for computation resources, we propose a novel patch selection schema using attention rollout and non-maximum suppression. To empirically investigate the effectiveness of our approach, empirical experiments are conducted on our WSI classification tasks, using two benchmark databases. The obtained results suggest that the trusted framework can significantly improve the WSI classification performance compared with the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Despite remarkable efforts been made, the classification of gigapixels whole-slide image (WSI) is severely restrained from either the constrained computing resources for the whole slides, or limited utilizing of the knowledge from different scales. Moreover, most of the previous attempts lacked of the ability of uncertainty estimation. Generally, the pathologists often jointly analyze WSI from the different magnifications. If the pathologists are uncertain by using single magnification, then they will change the magnification repeatedly to discover various features of the tissues. Motivated by the diagnose process of the pathologists, in this paper, we propose a trusted multi-scale classification framework for the WSI. Leveraging the Vision Transformer as the backbone for multi branches, our framework can jointly classification modeling, estimating the uncertainty of each magnification of a microscope and integrate the evidence from different magnification. Moreover, to exploit discriminative patches from WSIs and reduce the requirement for computation resources, we propose a novel patch selection schema using attention rollout and non-maximum suppression. To empirically investigate the effectiveness of our approach, empirical experiments are conducted on our WSI classification tasks, using two benchmark databases. The obtained results suggest that the trusted framework can significantly improve the WSI classification performance compared with the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 尽管付出了巨大的努力，但十亿像素全幻灯片图像（WSI）的分类受到整个幻灯片计算资源有限或不同尺度知识利用有限的严重限制。而且，之前的尝试大多缺乏不确定性估计的能力。一般来说，病理学家经常从不同的放大倍率联合分析WSI。如果病理学家使用单一放大倍数不确定，那么他们将反复改变放大倍数以发现组织的各种特征。受病理学家诊断过程的启发，在本文中，我们提出了一种可信的 WSI 多尺度分类框架。利用 Vision Transformer 作为多分支的骨干，我们的框架可以联合分类建模，估计显微镜每个放大倍率的不确定性，并整合来自不同放大倍率的证据。此外，为了利用 WSI 中的判别性补丁并减少对计算资源的需求，我们提出了一种使用注意力推出和非极大值抑制的新型补丁选择模式。为了实证研究我们方法的有效性，使用两个基准数据库对我们的 WSI 分类任务进行了实证实验。获得的结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，可信框架可以显着提高 WSI 分类性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可信的多尺度分类框架，用于对全切片图像（WSI）进行分类。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有大量研究，但WSI分类仍受到计算资源限制和不同尺度知识利用不足的制约，同时缺乏不确定性估计能力。受病理学家诊断过程的启发，本文提出了一种可信的多尺度分类框架。
AI.method: 本文采用视觉Transformer作为多分支主干网络，实现联合分类建模、估计每种放大倍数的不确定性，并整合不同放大倍数的证据。此外，提出了一种基于注意力展开和非极大值抑制的新型补丁选择方案，以提取具有判别性的补丁并减少计算资源需求。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，与现有最先进的方法相比，该可信框架在WSI分类任务上显著提升了性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的可信多尺度分类框架有效提升了WSI分类性能，为病理图像分析提供了新的方法。

authors_text: Chao-Wei Huang,Shang-Chi Tsai,Yun-Nung Chen
title: PLM-ICD: Automatic ICD Coding with Pretrained Language Models
title_zh: PLM-ICD：使用预训练语言模型进行自动 ICD 编码
abstract: Automatically classifying electronic health records (EHRs) into diagnostic codes has been challenging to the NLP community. State-of-the-art methods treated this problem as a multilabel classification problem and proposed various architectures to model this problem. However, these systems did not leverage the superb performance of pretrained language models, which achieved superb performance on natural language understanding tasks. Prior work has shown that pretrained language models underperformed on this task with the regular finetuning scheme. Therefore, this paper aims at analyzing the causes of the underperformance and developing a framework for automatic ICD coding with pretrained language models. We spotted three main issues through the experiments: 1) large label space, 2) long input sequences, and 3) domain mismatch between pretraining and fine-tuning. We propose PLMICD, a framework that tackles the challenges with various strategies. The experimental results show that our proposed framework can overcome the challenges and achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of multiple metrics on the benchmark MIMIC data. The source code is available at https://github.com/MiuLab/PLM-ICD
summary: Automatically classifying electronic health records (EHRs) into diagnostic codes has been challenging to the NLP community. State-of-the-art methods treated this problem as a multilabel classification problem and proposed various architectures to model this problem. However, these systems did not leverage the superb performance of pretrained language models, which achieved superb performance on natural language understanding tasks. Prior work has shown that pretrained language models underperformed on this task with the regular finetuning scheme. Therefore, this paper aims at analyzing the causes of the underperformance and developing a framework for automatic ICD coding with pretrained language models. We spotted three main issues through the experiments: 1) large label space, 2) long input sequences, and 3) domain mismatch between pretraining and fine-tuning. We propose PLMICD, a framework that tackles the challenges with various strategies. The experimental results show that our proposed framework can overcome the challenges and achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of multiple metrics on the benchmark MIMIC data. The source code is available at https://github.com/MiuLab/PLM-ICD
abstract_zh: 自动将电子健康记录 (EHR) 分类为诊断代码一直是 NLP 社区面临的挑战。最先进的方法将该问题视为多标签分类问题，并提出了各种架构来对该问题进行建模。然而，这些系统并没有利用预训练语言模型的卓越性能，而预训练语言模型在自然语言理解任务上却取得了卓越的性能。先前的工作表明，使用常规微调方案，预训练的语言模型在此任务上表现不佳。因此，本文旨在分析性能不佳的原因，并开发一个使用预训练语言模型进行自动 ICD 编码的框架。我们通过实验发现了三个主要问题：1）大标签空间，2）长输入序列，3）预训练和微调之间的域不匹配。我们提出 PLMCD，这是一个通过各种策略应对挑战的框架。实验结果表明，我们提出的框架可以克服挑战，并在基准 MIMIC 数据的多个指标方面实现最先进的性能。源代码可在 https://github.com/MiuLab/PLM-ICD 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出PLM-ICD框架，利用预训练语言模型解决电子健康记录的自动ICD编码问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未有效利用预训练语言模型的性能，且存在标签空间大、输入序列长、领域不匹配等挑战。
AI.method: 设计PLM-ICD框架，通过策略优化处理大标签空间、长序列输入及预训练与微调的领域差异问题。
AI.result: 在MIMIC基准数据集上实现多项指标的最先进性能，源代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: PLM-ICD有效解决了预训练模型在ICD编码任务中的关键挑战，推动了医疗NLP领域的发展。

authors_text: Wanhua Li,Jiwen Lu,Abudukelimu Wuerkaixi,Jianjiang Feng,Jie Zhou
title: MetaAge: Meta-Learning Personalized Age Estimators
title_zh: MetaAge：元学习个性化年龄估计器
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (TIP)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (TIP)
abstract: Different people age in different ways. Learning a personalized age estimator for each person is a promising direction for age estimation given that it better models the personalization of aging processes. However, most existing personalized methods suffer from the lack of large-scale datasets due to the high-level requirements: identity labels and enough samples for each person to form a long-term aging pattern. In this paper, we aim to learn personalized age estimators without the above requirements and propose a meta-learning method named MetaAge for age estimation. Unlike most existing personalized methods that learn the parameters of a personalized estimator for each person in the training set, our method learns the mapping from identity information to age estimator parameters. Specifically, we introduce a personalized estimator meta-learner, which takes identity features as the input and outputs the parameters of customized estimators. In this way, our method learns the meta knowledge without the above requirements and seamlessly transfers the learned meta knowledge to the test set, which enables us to leverage the existing large-scale age datasets without any additional annotations. Extensive experimental results on three benchmark datasets including MORPH II, ChaLearn LAP 2015 and ChaLearn LAP 2016 databases demonstrate that our MetaAge significantly boosts the performance of existing personalized methods and outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Different people age in different ways. Learning a personalized age estimator for each person is a promising direction for age estimation given that it better models the personalization of aging processes. However, most existing personalized methods suffer from the lack of large-scale datasets due to the high-level requirements: identity labels and enough samples for each person to form a long-term aging pattern. In this paper, we aim to learn personalized age estimators without the above requirements and propose a meta-learning method named MetaAge for age estimation. Unlike most existing personalized methods that learn the parameters of a personalized estimator for each person in the training set, our method learns the mapping from identity information to age estimator parameters. Specifically, we introduce a personalized estimator meta-learner, which takes identity features as the input and outputs the parameters of customized estimators. In this way, our method learns the meta knowledge without the above requirements and seamlessly transfers the learned meta knowledge to the test set, which enables us to leverage the existing large-scale age datasets without any additional annotations. Extensive experimental results on three benchmark datasets including MORPH II, ChaLearn LAP 2015 and ChaLearn LAP 2016 databases demonstrate that our MetaAge significantly boosts the performance of existing personalized methods and outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 不同的人以不同的方式变老。为每个人学习个性化年龄估计器是年龄估计的一个有前途的方向，因为它可以更好地模拟衰老过程的个性化。然而，大多数现有的个性化方法由于高水平的要求而缺​​乏大规模数据集：身份标签和每个人足够的样本以形成长期的老化模式。在本文中，我们的目标是在没有上述要求的情况下学习个性化年龄估计器，并提出一种名为 MetaAge 的年龄估计元学习方法。与大多数现有的个性化方法学习训练集中每个人的个性化估计器的参数不同，我们的方法学习从身份信息到年龄估计器参数的映射。具体来说，我们引入了一种个性化估计器元学习器，它将身份特征作为输入并输出定制估计器的参数。通过这种方式，我们的方法无需上述要求即可学习元知识，并将学习到的元知识无缝转移到测试集，这使我们能够利用现有的大规模年龄数据集，而无需任何额外的注释。对三个基准数据集（包括 MORPH II、ChaLearn LAP 2015 和 ChaLearn LAP 2016 数据库）的广泛实验结果表明，我们的 MetaAge 显着提高了现有个性化方法的性能，并优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需大规模标注数据的个性化年龄估计方法MetaAge，通过元学习实现身份特征到年龄估计器参数的映射。
AI.motivation: 现有个性化年龄估计方法受限于对大规模带身份标签数据的依赖，而实际中获取此类数据成本高昂且样本不足。
AI.method: 设计个性化估计器元学习器，以身份特征为输入直接生成定制化估计器参数，无需为每个个体单独训练模型。
AI.result: 在MORPH II、ChaLearn LAP 2015/2016三个数据集上显著优于现有个性化方法及最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: MetaAge通过元学习有效解决了个性化年龄估计的数据瓶颈问题，为该领域提供了新思路和实用解决方案。

search_text: MetaAge: Meta-Learning Personalized Age Estimators MetaAge：元学习个性化年龄估计器 Different people age in different ways. Learning a personalized age estimator for each person is a promising direction for age estimation given that it better models the personalization of aging processes. However, most existing personalized methods suffer from the lack of large-scale datasets due to the high-level requirements: identity labels and enough samples for each person to form a long-term aging pattern. In this paper, we aim to learn personalized age estimators without the above requirements and propose a meta-learning method named MetaAge for age estimation. Unlike most existing personalized methods that learn the parameters of a personalized estimator for each person in the training set, our method learns the mapping from identity information to age estimator parameters. Specifically, we introduce a personalized estimator meta-learner, which takes identity features as the input and outputs the parameters of customized estimators. In this way, our method learns the meta knowledge without the above requirements and seamlessly transfers the learned meta knowledge to the test set, which enables us to leverage the existing large-scale age datasets without any additional annotations. Extensive experimental results on three benchmark datasets including MORPH II, ChaLearn LAP 2015 and ChaLearn LAP 2016 databases demonstrate that our MetaAge significantly boosts the performance of existing personalized methods and outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches. 不同的人以不同的方式变老。为每个人学习个性化年龄估计器是年龄估计的一个有前途的方向，因为它可以更好地模拟衰老过程的个性化。然而，大多数现有的个性化方法由于高水平的要求而缺​​乏大规模数据集：身份标签和每个人足够的样本以形成长期的老化模式。在本文中，我们的目标是在没有上述要求的情况下学习个性化年龄估计器，并提出一种名为 MetaAge 的年龄估计元学习方法。与大多数现有的个性化方法学习训练集中每个人的个性化估计器的参数不同，我们的方法学习从身份信息到年龄估计器参数的映射。具体来说，我们引入了一种个性化估计器元学习器，它将身份特征作为输入并输出定制估计器的参数。通过这种方式，我们的方法无需上述要求即可学习元知识，并将学习到的元知识无缝转移到测试集，这使我们能够利用现有的大规模年龄数据集，而无需任何额外的注释。对三个基准数据集（包括 MORPH II、ChaLearn LAP 2015 和 ChaLearn LAP 2016 数据库）的广泛实验结果表明，我们的 MetaAge 显着提高了现有个性化方法的性能，并优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种无需大规模标注数据的个性化年龄估计方法MetaAge，通过元学习实现身份特征到年龄估计器参数的映射。 Wanhua Li,Jiwen Lu,Abudukelimu Wuerkaixi,Jianjiang Feng,Jie Zhou cs.CV

authors_text: Vivek Narayanaswamy,Yamen Mubarka,Rushil Anirudh,Deepta Rajan,Andreas Spanias,Jayaraman J. Thiagarajan
title: Know Your Space: Inlier and Outlier Construction for Calibrating Medical OOD Detectors
title_zh: 了解您的空间：校准医疗 OOD 探测器的内部和外部结构
abstract: We focus on the problem of producing well-calibrated out-of-distribution (OOD) detectors, in order to enable safe deployment of medical image classifiers. Motivated by the difficulty of curating suitable calibration datasets, synthetic augmentations have become highly prevalent for inlier/outlier specification. While there have been rapid advances in data augmentation techniques, this paper makes a striking finding that the space in which the inliers and outliers are synthesized, in addition to the type of augmentation, plays a critical role in calibrating OOD detectors. Using the popular energy-based OOD detection framework, we find that the optimal protocol is to synthesize latent-space inliers along with diverse pixel-space outliers. Based on empirical studies with multiple medical imaging benchmarks, we demonstrate that our approach consistently leads to superior OOD detection ($15\% - 35\%$ in AUROC) over the state-of-the-art in a variety of open-set recognition settings.
summary: We focus on the problem of producing well-calibrated out-of-distribution (OOD) detectors, in order to enable safe deployment of medical image classifiers. Motivated by the difficulty of curating suitable calibration datasets, synthetic augmentations have become highly prevalent for inlier/outlier specification. While there have been rapid advances in data augmentation techniques, this paper makes a striking finding that the space in which the inliers and outliers are synthesized, in addition to the type of augmentation, plays a critical role in calibrating OOD detectors. Using the popular energy-based OOD detection framework, we find that the optimal protocol is to synthesize latent-space inliers along with diverse pixel-space outliers. Based on empirical studies with multiple medical imaging benchmarks, we demonstrate that our approach consistently leads to superior OOD detection ($15\% - 35\%$ in AUROC) over the state-of-the-art in a variety of open-set recognition settings.
abstract_zh: 我们专注于生产校准良好的分布外（OOD）检测器的问题，以便能够安全部署医学图像分类器。由于难以策划合适的校准数据集，合成增强对于异常值/异常值规范变得非常普遍。尽管数据增强技术取得了快速进步，但本文得出了一个惊人的发现，即除了增强类型之外，合成内部值和异常值的空间在校准 OOD 检测器中也发挥着关键作用。使用流行的基于能量的 OOD 检测框架，我们发现最佳协议是合成潜在空间内点和不同的像素空间异常值。基于多个医学成像基准的实证研究，我们证明我们的方法始终能够在各种开放集识别设置中实现优于最先进的 OOD 检测（AUROC 中为 15% - 35%$）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过合成潜在空间内例与像素空间外例的方法，提升医学图像分类器的分布外检测校准效果。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分类器的分布外检测校准需依赖合成数据，但现有方法忽视了合成空间选择对结果的影响，而数据增强类型与空间选择共同决定校准效果。
AI.method: 基于能量框架的检测方法，合成潜在空间内例与多样化像素空间外例，并在多个医学影像基准上验证。
AI.result: 在多种开放集场景下，AUROC指标较现有方法提升15%-35%，显著优于当前最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 合成空间的选择是校准关键，结合潜在空间内例与像素空间外例的策略能有效提升OOD检测性能。

authors_text: Shuxin Li,Xinrun Wang,Youzhi Zhang,Jakub Cerny,Pengdeng Li,Hau Chan,Bo An
title: Offline Equilibrium Finding
title_zh: 离线平衡发现
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (offline RL) is an emerging field that has recently begun gaining attention across various application domains due to its ability to learn strategies from earlier collected datasets. Offline RL proved very successful, paving a path to solving previously intractable real-world problems, and we aim to generalize this paradigm to a multiplayer-game setting. To this end, we introduce a problem of offline equilibrium finding (OEF) and construct multiple types of datasets across a wide range of games using several established methods. To solve the OEF problem, we design a model-based framework that can directly apply any online equilibrium finding algorithm to the OEF setting while making minimal changes. The three most prominent contemporary online equilibrium finding algorithms are adapted to the context of OEF, creating three model-based variants: OEF-PSRO and OEF-CFR, which generalize the widely-used algorithms PSRO and Deep CFR to compute Nash equilibria (NEs), and OEF-JPSRO, which generalizes the JPSRO to calculate (Coarse) Correlated equilibria ((C)CEs). We also combine the behavior cloning policy with the model-based policy to further improve the performance and provide a theoretical guarantee of the solution quality. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our approach over offline RL algorithms and the importance of using model-based methods for OEF problems. We hope our work will contribute to advancing research in large-scale equilibrium finding.
summary: Offline reinforcement learning (offline RL) is an emerging field that has recently begun gaining attention across various application domains due to its ability to learn strategies from earlier collected datasets. Offline RL proved very successful, paving a path to solving previously intractable real-world problems, and we aim to generalize this paradigm to a multiplayer-game setting. To this end, we introduce a problem of offline equilibrium finding (OEF) and construct multiple types of datasets across a wide range of games using several established methods. To solve the OEF problem, we design a model-based framework that can directly apply any online equilibrium finding algorithm to the OEF setting while making minimal changes. The three most prominent contemporary online equilibrium finding algorithms are adapted to the context of OEF, creating three model-based variants: OEF-PSRO and OEF-CFR, which generalize the widely-used algorithms PSRO and Deep CFR to compute Nash equilibria (NEs), and OEF-JPSRO, which generalizes the JPSRO to calculate (Coarse) Correlated equilibria ((C)CEs). We also combine the behavior cloning policy with the model-based policy to further improve the performance and provide a theoretical guarantee of the solution quality. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our approach over offline RL algorithms and the importance of using model-based methods for OEF problems. We hope our work will contribute to advancing research in large-scale equilibrium finding.
abstract_zh: 离线强化学习（离线 RL）是一个新兴领域，由于其能够从早期收集的数据集中学习策略，最近开始受到各个应用领域的关注。事实证明，离线强化学习非常成功，为解决以前棘手的现实问题铺平了道路，我们的目标是将这种范例推广到多人游戏环境中。为此，我们引入了离线均衡发现（OEF）问题，并使用几种已建立的方法在各种游戏中构建了多种类型的数据集。为了解决 OEF 问题，我们设计了一个基于模型的框架，可以直接将任何在线平衡查找算法应用于 OEF 设置，同时进行最小的更改。当代最著名的三种在线均衡寻找算法适应了 OEF 的背景，创建了三种基于模型的变体：OEF-PSRO 和 OEF-CFR，它们概括了广泛使用的算法 PSRO 和 Deep CFR 来计算纳什均衡 (NE)，以及 OEF-JPSRO，它概括了 JPSRO 来计算（粗略）相关均衡 ((C)CE)。我们还将行为克隆策略与基于模型的策略相结合，进一步提高性能并为解决方案质量提供理论保证。大量的实验结果证明了我们的方法相对于离线 RL 算法的优越性，以及使用基于模型的方法解决 OEF 问题的重要性。我们希望我们的工作将有助于推进大规模平衡发现的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种离线均衡寻找（OEF）方法，通过模型基于框架将在线均衡寻找算法扩展到多玩家博弈场景。
AI.motivation: 离线强化学习（Offline RL）在单智能体任务中表现优异，但尚未有效解决多玩家博弈中的均衡计算问题，需探索适用于离线数据的均衡寻找方法。
AI.method: 设计模型基于框架，将PSRO、Deep CFR和JPSRO等在线算法适配到OEF场景，结合行为克隆策略提升性能并提供解的质量保证。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在性能上优于传统离线RL算法，验证了模型基于方法在OEF问题中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为大规模博弈均衡寻找提供了新思路，推动离线数据驱动的多智能体决策研究进展。

search_text: Offline Equilibrium Finding 离线平衡发现 Offline reinforcement learning (offline RL) is an emerging field that has recently begun gaining attention across various application domains due to its ability to learn strategies from earlier collected datasets. Offline RL proved very successful, paving a path to solving previously intractable real-world problems, and we aim to generalize this paradigm to a multiplayer-game setting. To this end, we introduce a problem of offline equilibrium finding (OEF) and construct multiple types of datasets across a wide range of games using several established methods. To solve the OEF problem, we design a model-based framework that can directly apply any online equilibrium finding algorithm to the OEF setting while making minimal changes. The three most prominent contemporary online equilibrium finding algorithms are adapted to the context of OEF, creating three model-based variants: OEF-PSRO and OEF-CFR, which generalize the widely-used algorithms PSRO and Deep CFR to compute Nash equilibria (NEs), and OEF-JPSRO, which generalizes the JPSRO to calculate (Coarse) Correlated equilibria ((C)CEs). We also combine the behavior cloning policy with the model-based policy to further improve the performance and provide a theoretical guarantee of the solution quality. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our approach over offline RL algorithms and the importance of using model-based methods for OEF problems. We hope our work will contribute to advancing research in large-scale equilibrium finding. 离线强化学习（离线 RL）是一个新兴领域，由于其能够从早期收集的数据集中学习策略，最近开始受到各个应用领域的关注。事实证明，离线强化学习非常成功，为解决以前棘手的现实问题铺平了道路，我们的目标是将这种范例推广到多人游戏环境中。为此，我们引入了离线均衡发现（OEF）问题，并使用几种已建立的方法在各种游戏中构建了多种类型的数据集。为了解决 OEF 问题，我们设计了一个基于模型的框架，可以直接将任何在线平衡查找算法应用于 OEF 设置，同时进行最小的更改。当代最著名的三种在线均衡寻找算法适应了 OEF 的背景，创建了三种基于模型的变体：OEF-PSRO 和 OEF-CFR，它们概括了广泛使用的算法 PSRO 和 Deep CFR 来计算纳什均衡 (NE)，以及 OEF-JPSRO，它概括了 JPSRO 来计算（粗略）相关均衡 ((C)CE)。我们还将行为克隆策略与基于模型的策略相结合，进一步提高性能并为解决方案质量提供理论保证。大量的实验结果证明了我们的方法相对于离线 RL 算法的优越性，以及使用基于模型的方法解决 OEF 问题的重要性。我们希望我们的工作将有助于推进大规模平衡发现的研究。 本文提出了一种离线均衡寻找（OEF）方法，通过模型基于框架将在线均衡寻找算法扩展到多玩家博弈场景。 Shuxin Li,Xinrun Wang,Youzhi Zhang,Jakub Cerny,Pengdeng Li,Hau Chan,Bo An cs.AI,cs.GT,cs.LG

authors_text: Qin Liu,Meng Zheng,Benjamin Planche,Srikrishna Karanam,Terrence Chen,Marc Niethammer,Ziyan Wu
title: PseudoClick: Interactive Image Segmentation with Click Imitation
title_zh: PseudoClick：具有点击模仿的交互式图像分割
abstract: The goal of click-based interactive image segmentation is to obtain precise object segmentation masks with limited user interaction, i.e., by a minimal number of user clicks. Existing methods require users to provide all the clicks: by first inspecting the segmentation mask and then providing points on mislabeled regions, iteratively. We ask the question: can our model directly predict where to click, so as to further reduce the user interaction cost? To this end, we propose {\PseudoClick}, a generic framework that enables existing segmentation networks to propose candidate next clicks. These automatically generated clicks, termed pseudo clicks in this work, serve as an imitation of human clicks to refine the segmentation mask.
summary: The goal of click-based interactive image segmentation is to obtain precise object segmentation masks with limited user interaction, i.e., by a minimal number of user clicks. Existing methods require users to provide all the clicks: by first inspecting the segmentation mask and then providing points on mislabeled regions, iteratively. We ask the question: can our model directly predict where to click, so as to further reduce the user interaction cost? To this end, we propose {\PseudoClick}, a generic framework that enables existing segmentation networks to propose candidate next clicks. These automatically generated clicks, termed pseudo clicks in this work, serve as an imitation of human clicks to refine the segmentation mask.
abstract_zh: 基于点击的交互式图像分割的目标是通过有限的用户交互（即通过最少数量的用户点击）获得精确的对象分割掩模。现有方法要求用户提供所有点击：首先检查分割掩模，然后迭代地在错误标记的区域上提供点。我们提出一个问题：我们的模型能否直接预测点击位置，从而进一步降低用户交互成本？为此，我们提出了 {\PseudoClick}，这是一个通用框架，使现有的分段网络能够建议候选的下一次点击。这些自动生成的点击（在本工作中称为伪点击）充当对人类点击的模仿，以细化分割掩模。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过自动生成伪点击来减少用户交互次数的交互式图像分割方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖用户反复点击修正分割结果，交互成本高，因此需要模型主动预测点击位置以降低用户参与度。
AI.method: 提出通用框架PseudoClick，使现有分割网络自动生成伪点击，模仿用户点击行为以优化分割结果。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效减少用户点击次数，同时保持分割精度。
AI.conclusion: 证明了自动生成伪点击在降低交互成本上的有效性，为其他交互式任务提供新思路。

authors_text: Sairam Sri Vatsavai,Ishan G Thakkar
title: Photonic Reconfigurable Accelerators for Efficient Inference of CNNs with Mixed-Sized Tensors
title_zh: 用于混合大小张量的 CNN 高效推理的光子可重构加速器
abstract: Photonic Microring Resonator (MRR) based hardware accelerators have been shown to provide disruptive speedup and energy-efficiency improvements for processing deep Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). However, previous MRR-based CNN accelerators fail to provide efficient adaptability for CNNs with mixed-sized tensors. One example of such CNNs is depthwise separable CNNs. Performing inferences of CNNs with mixed-sized tensors on such inflexible accelerators often leads to low hardware utilization, which diminishes the achievable performance and energy efficiency from the accelerators. In this paper, we present a novel way of introducing reconfigurability in the MRR-based CNN accelerators, to enable dynamic maximization of the size compatibility between the accelerator hardware components and the CNN tensors that are processed using the hardware components. We classify the state-of-the-art MRR-based CNN accelerators from prior works into two categories, based on the layout and relative placements of the utilized hardware components in the accelerators. We then use our method to introduce reconfigurability in accelerators from these two classes, to consequently improve their parallelism, the flexibility of efficiently mapping tensors of different sizes, speed, and overall energy efficiency. We evaluate our reconfigurable accelerators against three prior works for the area proportionate outlook (equal hardware area for all accelerators). Our evaluation for the inference of four modern CNNs indicates that our designed reconfigurable CNN accelerators provide improvements of up to 1.8x in Frames-Per-Second (FPS) and up to 1.5x in FPS/W, compared to an MRR-based accelerator from prior work.
summary: Photonic Microring Resonator (MRR) based hardware accelerators have been shown to provide disruptive speedup and energy-efficiency improvements for processing deep Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). However, previous MRR-based CNN accelerators fail to provide efficient adaptability for CNNs with mixed-sized tensors. One example of such CNNs is depthwise separable CNNs. Performing inferences of CNNs with mixed-sized tensors on such inflexible accelerators often leads to low hardware utilization, which diminishes the achievable performance and energy efficiency from the accelerators. In this paper, we present a novel way of introducing reconfigurability in the MRR-based CNN accelerators, to enable dynamic maximization of the size compatibility between the accelerator hardware components and the CNN tensors that are processed using the hardware components. We classify the state-of-the-art MRR-based CNN accelerators from prior works into two categories, based on the layout and relative placements of the utilized hardware components in the accelerators. We then use our method to introduce reconfigurability in accelerators from these two classes, to consequently improve their parallelism, the flexibility of efficiently mapping tensors of different sizes, speed, and overall energy efficiency. We evaluate our reconfigurable accelerators against three prior works for the area proportionate outlook (equal hardware area for all accelerators). Our evaluation for the inference of four modern CNNs indicates that our designed reconfigurable CNN accelerators provide improvements of up to 1.8x in Frames-Per-Second (FPS) and up to 1.5x in FPS/W, compared to an MRR-based accelerator from prior work.
abstract_zh: 基于光子微环谐振器 (MRR) 的硬件加速器已被证明可为深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的处理提供颠覆性的加速和能效改进。然而，之前基于 MRR 的 CNN 加速器无法为具有混合大小张量的 CNN 提供高效的适应性。此类 CNN 的一个例子是深度可分离 CNN。在这种不灵活的加速器上使用混合大小的张量执行 CNN 推理通常会导致硬件利用率较低，从而降低了加速器可实现的性能和能源效率。在本文中，我们提出了一种在基于 MRR 的 CNN 加速器中引入可重构性的新颖方法，以实现加速器硬件组件和使用硬件组件处理的 CNN 张量之间的尺寸兼容性的动态最大化。我们根据加速器中所使用的硬件组件的布局和相对位置，将先前作品中最先进的基于 MRR 的 CNN 加速器分为两类。然后，我们使用我们的方法在这两类加速器中引入可重构性，从而提高它们的并行性、有效映射不同大小、速度的张量的灵活性和整体能源效率。我们根据面积比例前景（所有加速器的硬件面积相同）对我们的可重构加速器与之前的三项工作进行了评估。我们对四种现代 CNN 推理的评估表明，与之前基于 MRR 的加速器相比，我们设计的可重构 CNN 加速器的每秒帧数 (FPS) 提高了 1.8 倍，FPS/W 提高了 1.5 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种基于光子微环谐振器（MRR）的可重构加速器，以高效处理具有混合尺寸张量的卷积神经网络（CNN）推理。
AI.motivation: 现有MRR加速器无法有效适配混合尺寸张量（如深度可分离CNN），导致硬件利用率低，性能和能效下降。
AI.method: 将现有MRR加速器分为两类，基于硬件布局引入可重构性，动态优化硬件组件与张量尺寸的兼容性，提升并行性与灵活性。
AI.result: 在同等硬件面积下，相比现有加速器，FPS提升1.8倍，FPS/W提升1.5倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升了MRR加速器的性能与能效，为处理混合尺寸张量的CNN提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Photonic Reconfigurable Accelerators for Efficient Inference of CNNs with Mixed-Sized Tensors 用于混合大小张量的 CNN 高效推理的光子可重构加速器 Photonic Microring Resonator (MRR) based hardware accelerators have been shown to provide disruptive speedup and energy-efficiency improvements for processing deep Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). However, previous MRR-based CNN accelerators fail to provide efficient adaptability for CNNs with mixed-sized tensors. One example of such CNNs is depthwise separable CNNs. Performing inferences of CNNs with mixed-sized tensors on such inflexible accelerators often leads to low hardware utilization, which diminishes the achievable performance and energy efficiency from the accelerators. In this paper, we present a novel way of introducing reconfigurability in the MRR-based CNN accelerators, to enable dynamic maximization of the size compatibility between the accelerator hardware components and the CNN tensors that are processed using the hardware components. We classify the state-of-the-art MRR-based CNN accelerators from prior works into two categories, based on the layout and relative placements of the utilized hardware components in the accelerators. We then use our method to introduce reconfigurability in accelerators from these two classes, to consequently improve their parallelism, the flexibility of efficiently mapping tensors of different sizes, speed, and overall energy efficiency. We evaluate our reconfigurable accelerators against three prior works for the area proportionate outlook (equal hardware area for all accelerators). Our evaluation for the inference of four modern CNNs indicates that our designed reconfigurable CNN accelerators provide improvements of up to 1.8x in Frames-Per-Second (FPS) and up to 1.5x in FPS/W, compared to an MRR-based accelerator from prior work. 基于光子微环谐振器 (MRR) 的硬件加速器已被证明可为深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的处理提供颠覆性的加速和能效改进。然而，之前基于 MRR 的 CNN 加速器无法为具有混合大小张量的 CNN 提供高效的适应性。此类 CNN 的一个例子是深度可分离 CNN。在这种不灵活的加速器上使用混合大小的张量执行 CNN 推理通常会导致硬件利用率较低，从而降低了加速器可实现的性能和能源效率。在本文中，我们提出了一种在基于 MRR 的 CNN 加速器中引入可重构性的新颖方法，以实现加速器硬件组件和使用硬件组件处理的 CNN 张量之间的尺寸兼容性的动态最大化。我们根据加速器中所使用的硬件组件的布局和相对位置，将先前作品中最先进的基于 MRR 的 CNN 加速器分为两类。然后，我们使用我们的方法在这两类加速器中引入可重构性，从而提高它们的并行性、有效映射不同大小、速度的张量的灵活性和整体能源效率。我们根据面积比例前景（所有加速器的硬件面积相同）对我们的可重构加速器与之前的三项工作进行了评估。我们对四种现代 CNN 推理的评估表明，与之前基于 MRR 的加速器相比，我们设计的可重构 CNN 加速器的每秒帧数 (FPS) 提高了 1.8 倍，FPS/W 提高了 1.5 倍。 本文设计了一种基于光子微环谐振器（MRR）的可重构加速器，以高效处理具有混合尺寸张量的卷积神经网络（CNN）推理。 Sairam Sri Vatsavai,Ishan G Thakkar cs.AR,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yufan Liu,Jiajiong Cao,Bing Li,Weiming Hu,Jingting Ding,Liang Li
title: Cross-Architecture Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 跨架构知识蒸馏
abstract: Transformer attracts much attention because of its ability to learn global relations and superior performance. In order to achieve higher performance, it is natural to distill complementary knowledge from Transformer to convolutional neural network (CNN). However, most existing knowledge distillation methods only consider homologous-architecture distillation, such as distilling knowledge from CNN to CNN. They may not be suitable when applying to cross-architecture scenarios, such as from Transformer to CNN. To deal with this problem, a novel cross-architecture knowledge distillation method is proposed. Specifically, instead of directly mimicking output/intermediate features of the teacher, partially cross attention projector and group-wise linear projector are introduced to align the student features with the teacher's in two projected feature spaces. And a multi-view robust training scheme is further presented to improve the robustness and stability of the framework. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method outperforms 14 state-of-the-arts on both small-scale and large-scale datasets.
summary: Transformer attracts much attention because of its ability to learn global relations and superior performance. In order to achieve higher performance, it is natural to distill complementary knowledge from Transformer to convolutional neural network (CNN). However, most existing knowledge distillation methods only consider homologous-architecture distillation, such as distilling knowledge from CNN to CNN. They may not be suitable when applying to cross-architecture scenarios, such as from Transformer to CNN. To deal with this problem, a novel cross-architecture knowledge distillation method is proposed. Specifically, instead of directly mimicking output/intermediate features of the teacher, partially cross attention projector and group-wise linear projector are introduced to align the student features with the teacher's in two projected feature spaces. And a multi-view robust training scheme is further presented to improve the robustness and stability of the framework. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method outperforms 14 state-of-the-arts on both small-scale and large-scale datasets.
abstract_zh: Transformer因其学习全局关系的能力和优越的性能而备受关注。为了获得更高的性能，很自然地从 Transformer 中提取互补知识到卷积神经网络（CNN）。然而，大多数现有的知识蒸馏方法只考虑同源架构的蒸馏，例如从CNN到CNN的知识蒸馏。当应用于跨架构场景时，例如从 Transformer 到 CNN，它们可能不适合。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种新的跨架构知识蒸馏方法。具体来说，不是直接模仿教师的输出/中间特征，而是引入部分交叉注意投影仪和分组线性投影仪来在两个投影特征空间中将学生特征与教师特征对齐。并进一步提出了多视图鲁棒训练方案以提高框架的鲁棒性和稳定性。大量实验表明，所提出的方法在小规模和大规模数据集上均优于 14 个最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨架构知识蒸馏方法，解决从Transformer到CNN的知识迁移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法多针对同架构模型（如CNN到CNN），难以有效适应跨架构场景（如Transformer到CNN）。
AI.method: 引入部分交叉注意力投影器和组-wise线性投影器，在两个投影特征空间对齐学生与教师特征，并设计多视角稳健训练方案。
AI.result: 在多个小规模和大规模数据集上，该方法优于14种现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升了跨架构知识蒸馏的性能与稳定性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种跨架构知识蒸馏方法，解决从Transformer到CNN的知识迁移问题。

search_text: Cross-Architecture Knowledge Distillation 跨架构知识蒸馏 Transformer attracts much attention because of its ability to learn global relations and superior performance. In order to achieve higher performance, it is natural to distill complementary knowledge from Transformer to convolutional neural network (CNN). However, most existing knowledge distillation methods only consider homologous-architecture distillation, such as distilling knowledge from CNN to CNN. They may not be suitable when applying to cross-architecture scenarios, such as from Transformer to CNN. To deal with this problem, a novel cross-architecture knowledge distillation method is proposed. Specifically, instead of directly mimicking output/intermediate features of the teacher, partially cross attention projector and group-wise linear projector are introduced to align the student features with the teacher's in two projected feature spaces. And a multi-view robust training scheme is further presented to improve the robustness and stability of the framework. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method outperforms 14 state-of-the-arts on both small-scale and large-scale datasets. Transformer因其学习全局关系的能力和优越的性能而备受关注。为了获得更高的性能，很自然地从 Transformer 中提取互补知识到卷积神经网络（CNN）。然而，大多数现有的知识蒸馏方法只考虑同源架构的蒸馏，例如从CNN到CNN的知识蒸馏。当应用于跨架构场景时，例如从 Transformer 到 CNN，它们可能不适合。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种新的跨架构知识蒸馏方法。具体来说，不是直接模仿教师的输出/中间特征，而是引入部分交叉注意投影仪和分组线性投影仪来在两个投影特征空间中将学生特征与教师特征对齐。并进一步提出了多视图鲁棒训练方案以提高框架的鲁棒性和稳定性。大量实验表明，所提出的方法在小规模和大规模数据集上均优于 14 个最先进的方法。 本文提出一种跨架构知识蒸馏方法，解决从Transformer到CNN的知识迁移问题。 Yufan Liu,Jiajiong Cao,Bing Li,Weiming Hu,Jingting Ding,Liang Li cs.CV

authors_text: Ziqi Wang,Jialin Liu
title: Online Game Level Generation from Music
title_zh: 从音乐生成在线游戏关卡
abstract: Game consists of multiple types of content, while the harmony of different content types play an essential role in game design. However, most works on procedural content generation consider only one type of content at a time. In this paper, we propose and formulate online level generation from music, in a way of matching a level feature to a music feature in real-time, while adapting to players' play speed. A generic framework named online player-adaptive procedural content generation via reinforcement learning, OPARL for short, is built upon the experience-driven reinforcement learning and controllable reinforcement learning, to enable online level generation from music. Furthermore, a novel control policy based on local search and k-nearest neighbours is proposed and integrated into OPARL to control the level generator considering the play data collected online. Results of simulation-based experiments show that our implementation of OPARL is competent to generate playable levels with difficulty degree matched to the ``energy'' dynamic of music for different artificial players in an online fashion.
summary: Game consists of multiple types of content, while the harmony of different content types play an essential role in game design. However, most works on procedural content generation consider only one type of content at a time. In this paper, we propose and formulate online level generation from music, in a way of matching a level feature to a music feature in real-time, while adapting to players' play speed. A generic framework named online player-adaptive procedural content generation via reinforcement learning, OPARL for short, is built upon the experience-driven reinforcement learning and controllable reinforcement learning, to enable online level generation from music. Furthermore, a novel control policy based on local search and k-nearest neighbours is proposed and integrated into OPARL to control the level generator considering the play data collected online. Results of simulation-based experiments show that our implementation of OPARL is competent to generate playable levels with difficulty degree matched to the ``energy'' dynamic of music for different artificial players in an online fashion.
abstract_zh: 游戏由多种类型的内容组成，而不同内容类型的和谐在游戏设计中起着至关重要的作用。然而，大多数关于程序内容生成的工作一次只考虑一种类型的内容。在本文中，我们提出并制定了从音乐中生成在线关卡的方法，将关卡特征与音乐特征实时匹配，同时适应玩家的游戏速度。一个名为通过强化学习在线播放器自适应程序内容生成（简称 OPARL）的通用框架建立在经验驱动强化学习和可控强化学习的基础上，以实现音乐的在线关卡生成。此外，提出了一种基于局部搜索和 k 最近邻的新颖控制策略，并将其集成到 OPARL 中，以考虑在线收集的游戏数据来控制关卡生成器。基于模拟的实验结果表明，我们的 OPARL 实现能够以在线方式为不同的人工玩家生成难度与音乐“能量”动态相匹配的可玩关卡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于音乐特征实时生成在线游戏关卡的方法，通过匹配关卡特征与音乐动态并适应玩家速度，实现程序化内容生成。
AI.motivation: 现有程序化内容生成研究多局限于单一内容类型，而游戏设计需协调多种内容类型（如音乐与关卡）。需解决如何根据音乐动态及玩家实时表现生成匹配难度的关卡问题。
AI.method: 构建OPARL框架，结合经验驱动强化学习与可控强化学习，引入基于局部搜索和k近邻算法的控制策略，利用在线玩家数据动态调整关卡生成参数。
AI.result: 实验表明OPARL能为不同AI玩家生成与音乐'能量'动态匹配的可玩关卡，验证了框架在实时适应性与难度匹配上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法实现了音乐驱动的在线关卡生成，为多模态程序化内容生成提供新思路，未来可扩展至其他游戏内容类型与玩家交互模式。

authors_text: Nengzheng Jin,Joanna Siebert,Dongfang Li,Qingcai Chen
title: A Survey on Table Question Answering: Recent Advances
title_zh: 桌面问答调查：最新进展
abstract: Table Question Answering (Table QA) refers to providing precise answers from tables to answer a user's question. In recent years, there have been a lot of works on table QA, but there is a lack of comprehensive surveys on this research topic. Hence, we aim to provide an overview of available datasets and representative methods in table QA. We classify existing methods for table QA into five categories according to their techniques, which include semantic-parsing-based, generative, extractive, matching-based, and retriever-reader-based methods. Moreover, as table QA is still a challenging task for existing methods, we also identify and outline several key challenges and discuss the potential future directions of table QA.
summary: Table Question Answering (Table QA) refers to providing precise answers from tables to answer a user's question. In recent years, there have been a lot of works on table QA, but there is a lack of comprehensive surveys on this research topic. Hence, we aim to provide an overview of available datasets and representative methods in table QA. We classify existing methods for table QA into five categories according to their techniques, which include semantic-parsing-based, generative, extractive, matching-based, and retriever-reader-based methods. Moreover, as table QA is still a challenging task for existing methods, we also identify and outline several key challenges and discuss the potential future directions of table QA.
abstract_zh: 表格问答（Table QA）是指从表格中提供精确的答案来回答用户的问题。近年来，关于表QA的工作很多，但缺乏对该研究主题的全面调查。因此，我们的目标是在表 QA 中提供可用数据集和代表性方法的概述。我们根据技术将现有的表 QA 方法分为五类，包括基于语义解析的方法、生成的方法、提取的方法、基于匹配的方法和基于检索器阅读器的方法。此外，由于表 QA 对于现有方法来说仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，我们还确定并概述了几个关键挑战，并讨论了表 QA 未来的潜在方向。

AI.tldr: 综述表格问答领域的现有数据集和代表性方法，分类讨论并指出挑战与未来方向
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏全面的综述，需系统梳理方法与挑战
AI.method: 将方法分为语义解析、生成式、抽取式、匹配式和检索-阅读模型五类，分析各自优缺点
AI.result: 总结了主流方法，识别出关键挑战如复杂结构处理和多跳推理
AI.conclusion: 表格问答仍具挑战，未来需关注结构理解与多跳推理等方向

authors_text: Haiqing Hao,Zhongwang Pang,Guan Wang,Bo Wang
title: Indoor optical fiber eavesdropping approach and its avoidance
title_zh: 室内光纤窃听途径及避免
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, submitted to Optics Express
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures, submitted to Optics Express
abstract: The optical fiber network has become a worldwide infrastructure. In addition to the basic functions in telecommunication, its sensing ability has attracted more and more attention. In this paper, we discuss the risk of household fiber being used for eavesdropping and demonstrate its performance in the lab. Using a 3-meter tail fiber in front of the household optical modem, voices of normal human speech can be eavesdropped by a laser interferometer and recovered 1.1 km away. The detection distance limit and system noise are analyzed quantitatively. We also give some practical ways to prevent eavesdropping through household fiber.
summary: The optical fiber network has become a worldwide infrastructure. In addition to the basic functions in telecommunication, its sensing ability has attracted more and more attention. In this paper, we discuss the risk of household fiber being used for eavesdropping and demonstrate its performance in the lab. Using a 3-meter tail fiber in front of the household optical modem, voices of normal human speech can be eavesdropped by a laser interferometer and recovered 1.1 km away. The detection distance limit and system noise are analyzed quantitatively. We also give some practical ways to prevent eavesdropping through household fiber.
abstract_zh: 光纤网络已成为全球性的基础设施。除了电信方面的基本功能外，其传感能力也越来越受到人们的关注。在本文中，我们讨论了家用光纤被用于窃听的风险，并在实验室中展示了其性能。在家用光调制解调器前面使用3米长的尾纤，可以通过激光干涉仪窃听正常人的语音，并在1.1公里外恢复。对检测距离限制和系统噪声进行了定量分析。我们还提供了一些实用的方法来防止通过家庭光纤窃听。

AI.tldr: 研究家庭光纤被用于窃听的风险，并提出防范措施
AI.motivation: 随着光纤网络的普及及其传感能力的提升，家庭光纤可能被用于窃听，需评估风险并寻找防范方法
AI.method: 通过实验使用3米尾纤和激光干涉仪进行窃听演示，定量分析系统噪声和检测距离，并提出防范措施
AI.result: 实验验证了通过光纤窃听语音的可能性，可在1.1公里外恢复语音，并量化了系统噪声和检测距离限制
AI.conclusion: 家庭光纤存在被窃听的风险，需通过物理防护和监控等方法进行有效防范

ai_content.tldr: 研究家庭光纤被用于窃听的风险，并提出防范措施
ai_content.motivation: 随着光纤网络的普及及其传感能力的提升，家庭光纤可能被用于窃听，需评估风险并寻找防范方法
ai_content.method: 通过实验使用3米尾纤和激光干涉仪进行窃听演示，定量分析系统噪声和检测距离，并提出防范措施
ai_content.result: 实验验证了通过光纤窃听语音的可能性，可在1.1公里外恢复语音，并量化了系统噪声和检测距离限制
ai_content.conclusion: 家庭光纤存在被窃听的风险，需通过物理防护和监控等方法进行有效防范

search_text: Indoor optical fiber eavesdropping approach and its avoidance 室内光纤窃听途径及避免 The optical fiber network has become a worldwide infrastructure. In addition to the basic functions in telecommunication, its sensing ability has attracted more and more attention. In this paper, we discuss the risk of household fiber being used for eavesdropping and demonstrate its performance in the lab. Using a 3-meter tail fiber in front of the household optical modem, voices of normal human speech can be eavesdropped by a laser interferometer and recovered 1.1 km away. The detection distance limit and system noise are analyzed quantitatively. We also give some practical ways to prevent eavesdropping through household fiber. 光纤网络已成为全球性的基础设施。除了电信方面的基本功能外，其传感能力也越来越受到人们的关注。在本文中，我们讨论了家用光纤被用于窃听的风险，并在实验室中展示了其性能。在家用光调制解调器前面使用3米长的尾纤，可以通过激光干涉仪窃听正常人的语音，并在1.1公里外恢复。对检测距离限制和系统噪声进行了定量分析。我们还提供了一些实用的方法来防止通过家庭光纤窃听。 研究家庭光纤被用于窃听的风险，并提出防范措施 Haiqing Hao,Zhongwang Pang,Guan Wang,Bo Wang cs.SD,eess.AS,physics.ins-det,physics.optics

authors_text: Zhuochen Xiong
title: Development of VR Teaching System for Engine Dis-assembly
title_zh: 发动机拆装VR教学系统开发
abstract: With the worldwide ravaging of the covid-19 epidemic, the traditional face-to-face education systems have been interrupted frequently. It is demanded to develop high-quality online education modalities. The webcasting based online classroom is one of the popular education modalities but suffers from poor teacher-student interactions and and low immersive learning experiences. This thesis aims to improve the online education quality by using the virtual reality (VR) technology. For the purpose of automobile engine education, we develop a VR based engine maintenance learning system. The system includes many teaching and learning components in VR enabled by the Unity engine. Users can immersively experience the complete engine disassembly process through the wearable VR display and interactive devices. The system is designed with an interactive layer, a control layer, and a physical data layer. Such a system architecture effectively separates the specific implementations of different domains and improves the R&D efficiency. Once new object models and process profiles are provided, the proposed system architecture requires no modification of codes for changed learning objects and processes. The efficiency and effictiveness of the proposed method are verfied by various experiments. The developed techniques can be useful for many other applications.

It is demanded to develop high-quality online education modalities. The webcasting based online classroom is one of the popular education modalities but suffers from poor teacher-student interactions and and low immersive learning experiences. The system is designed with an interactive layer, a control layer, and a physical data layer. The efficiency and effictiveness of the proposed method are verfied by various experiments. The developed techniques can be useful for many other applications.
abstract_zh: 随着covid-19疫情在全球范围内肆虐，传统的面对面教育系统频繁中断。发展高质量在线教育模式。基于网络直播的在线课堂是流行的教育方式之一，但师生互动较差，沉浸式学习体验较低。本论文旨在利用虚拟现实（VR）技术提高在线教育质量。以汽车发动机教育为目的，我们开发了基于VR的发动机维修学习系统。该系统包括许多由 Unity 引擎支持的 VR 教学组件。用户可以通过可穿戴VR显示器和交互设备身临其境地体验完整的发动机拆解过程。系统设计有交互层、控制层和物理数据层。这样的系统架构有效分离了不同领域的具体实现，提高了研发效率。一旦提供了新的对象模型和过程配置文件，所提出的系统架构不需要针对改变的学习对象和过程修改代码。通过各种实验验证了所提出方法的效率和有效性。所开发的技术可用于许多其他应用。

AI.tldr: 开发基于虚拟现实（VR）技术的发动机拆卸教学系统，以提升在线教育质量。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情导致传统面对面教育中断，现有在线课堂存在师生互动差、沉浸感低的问题，需通过VR技术改进教育质量。
AI.method: 基于Unity引擎构建包含交互层、控制层和物理数据层的VR系统架构，支持通过可穿戴设备沉浸式体验发动机拆卸过程。
AI.result: 实验验证了系统的高效性与有效性，新模型和流程无需修改代码即可快速集成。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可扩展至其他教育领域，为在线教育提供创新解决方案。

authors_text: Changnam An,Eunkyung Han,Dongmyeong Noh,Ohkyoon Kwon,Sumi Lee,Hyunshim Han
title: Building Korean Sign Language Augmentation (KoSLA) Corpus with Data Augmentation Technique
title_zh: 使用数据增强技术构建韩语手语增强 (KoSLA) 语料库
abstract: We present an efficient framework of corpus for sign language translation. Aided with a simple but dramatic data augmentation technique, our method converts text into annotated forms with minimum information loss. Sign languages are composed of manual signals, non-manual signals, and iconic features. According to professional sign language interpreters, non-manual signals such as facial expressions and gestures play an important role in conveying exact meaning. By considering the linguistic features of sign language, our proposed framework is a first and unique attempt to build a multimodal sign language augmentation corpus (hereinafter referred to as the KoSLA corpus) containing both manual and non-manual modalities. The corpus we built demonstrates confident results in the hospital context, showing improved performance with augmented datasets. To overcome data scarcity, we resorted to data augmentation techniques such as synonym replacement to boost the efficiency of our translation model and available data, while maintaining grammatical and semantic structures of sign language. For the experimental support, we verify the effectiveness of data augmentation technique and usefulness of our corpus by performing a translation task between normal sentences and sign language annotations on two tokenizers. The result was convincing, proving that the BLEU scores with the KoSLA corpus were significant.
summary: We present an efficient framework of corpus for sign language translation. Aided with a simple but dramatic data augmentation technique, our method converts text into annotated forms with minimum information loss. Sign languages are composed of manual signals, non-manual signals, and iconic features. According to professional sign language interpreters, non-manual signals such as facial expressions and gestures play an important role in conveying exact meaning. By considering the linguistic features of sign language, our proposed framework is a first and unique attempt to build a multimodal sign language augmentation corpus (hereinafter referred to as the KoSLA corpus) containing both manual and non-manual modalities. The corpus we built demonstrates confident results in the hospital context, showing improved performance with augmented datasets. To overcome data scarcity, we resorted to data augmentation techniques such as synonym replacement to boost the efficiency of our translation model and available data, while maintaining grammatical and semantic structures of sign language. For the experimental support, we verify the effectiveness of data augmentation technique and usefulness of our corpus by performing a translation task between normal sentences and sign language annotations on two tokenizers. The result was convincing, proving that the BLEU scores with the KoSLA corpus were significant.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个有效的手语翻译语料库框架。借助简单但引人注目的数据增强技术，我们的方法将文本转换为带注释的形式，同时信息损失最小。手语由手动信号、非手动信号和标志性特征组成。据专业手语翻译人员介绍，面部表情和手势等非手动信号在传达准确含义方面发挥着重要作用。通过考虑手语的语言特征，我们提出的框架是构建包含手动和非手动模态的多模态手语增强语料库（以下简称 KoSLA 语料库）的首次且独特的尝试。我们构建的语料库在医院环境中展示了可靠的结果，显示出增强数据集带来的性能提升。为了克服数据稀缺的问题，我们采用同义词替换等数据增强技术来提高翻译模型和可用数据的效率，同时保持手语的语法和语义结构。为了提供实验支持，我们通过在两个分词器上执行正常句子和手语注释之间的翻译任务来验证数据增强技术的有效性和语料库的实用性。结果令人信服，证明 KoSLA 语料库的 BLEU 分数非常显着。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种构建韩语手语增强语料库（KoSLA）的高效框架，通过数据增强技术将文本转换为标注形式，以提升手语翻译的效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 手语翻译面临数据稀缺的问题，而手语中非手动信号（如面部表情和手势）在传达准确含义中起着重要作用，因此需要一种包含手动和非手动模态的多模态语料库。
AI.method: 本文采用一种简单但有效的数据增强技术，如同义词替换，来增强数据集，同时保持手语的语法和语义结构，并通过两个分词器进行翻译任务验证增强技术的有效性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，使用KoSLA语料库的BLEU分数显著提高，证明了数据增强技术和语料库的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的KoSLA语料库和数据增强技术为手语翻译提供了有效的解决方案，特别是在医院等具体场景中表现良好。

The result was convincing, proving that the BLEU scores with the KoSLA corpus were significant. 我们提出了一个有效的手语翻译语料库框架。借助简单但引人注目的数据增强技术，我们的方法将文本转换为带注释的形式，同时信息损失最小。手语由手动信号、非手动信号和标志性特征组成。据专业手语翻译人员介绍，面部表情和手势等非手动信号在传达准确含义方面发挥着重要作用。通过考虑手语的语言特征，我们提出的框架是构建包含手动和非手动模态的多模态手语增强语料库（以下简称 KoSLA 语料库）的首次且独特的尝试。我们构建的语料库在医院环境中展示了可靠的结果，显示出增强数据集带来的性能提升。为了克服数据稀缺的问题，我们采用同义词替换等数据增强技术来提高翻译模型和可用数据的效率，同时保持手语的语法和语义结构。为了提供实验支持，我们通过在两个分词器上执行正常句子和手语注释之间的翻译任务来验证数据增强技术的有效性和语料库的实用性。结果令人信服，证明 KoSLA 语料库的 BLEU 分数非常显着。 本文提出了一种构建韩语手语增强语料库（KoSLA）的高效框架，通过数据增强技术将文本转换为标注形式，以提升手语翻译的效率和准确性。 Changnam An,Eunkyung Han,Dongmyeong Noh,Ohkyoon Kwon,Sumi Lee,Hyunshim Han cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Blai Bonet,Hector Geffner
title: Language-Based Causal Representation Learning
title_zh: 基于语言的因果表示学习
abstract: Consider the finite state graph that results from a simple, discrete, dynamical system in which an agent moves in a rectangular grid picking up and dropping packages. Can the state variables of the problem, namely, the agent location and the package locations, be recovered from the structure of the state graph alone without having access to information about the objects, the structure of the states, or any background knowledge? We show that this is possible provided that the dynamics is learned over a suitable domain-independent first-order causal language that makes room for objects and relations that are not assumed to be known. The preference for the most compact representation in the language that is compatible with the data provides a strong and meaningful learning bias that makes this possible. The language of structured causal models (SCMs) is the standard language for representing (static) causal models but in dynamic worlds populated by objects, first-order causal languages such as those used in "classical AI planning" are required. While "classical AI" requires handcrafted representations, similar representations can be learned from unstructured data over the same languages. Indeed, it is the languages and the preference for compact representations in those languages that provide structure to the world, uncovering objects, relations, and causes.
summary: Consider the finite state graph that results from a simple, discrete, dynamical system in which an agent moves in a rectangular grid picking up and dropping packages. Can the state variables of the problem, namely, the agent location and the package locations, be recovered from the structure of the state graph alone without having access to information about the objects, the structure of the states, or any background knowledge? We show that this is possible provided that the dynamics is learned over a suitable domain-independent first-order causal language that makes room for objects and relations that are not assumed to be known. The preference for the most compact representation in the language that is compatible with the data provides a strong and meaningful learning bias that makes this possible. The language of structured causal models (SCMs) is the standard language for representing (static) causal models but in dynamic worlds populated by objects, first-order causal languages such as those used in "classical AI planning" are required. While "classical AI" requires handcrafted representations, similar representations can be learned from unstructured data over the same languages. Indeed, it is the languages and the preference for compact representations in those languages that provide structure to the world, uncovering objects, relations, and causes.
abstract_zh: 考虑由简单、离散、动态系统产生的有限状态图，其中代理在矩形网格中移动，拾取和放下包裹。问题的状态变量，即代理位置和包裹位置，是否可以仅从状态图的结构中恢复，而无需访问有关对象的信息、状态的结构或任何背景知识？我们证明，只要通过合适的与领域无关的一阶因果语言学习动力学，就可以为不假设已知的对象和关系留出空间，这是可能的。对与数据兼容的语言中最紧凑的表示的偏好提供了强烈且有意义的学习偏差，使这成为可能。结构化因果模型 (SCM) 的语言是表示（静态）因果模型的标准语言，但在由对象填充的动态世界中，需要一阶因果语言，例如“经典人工智能规划”中使用的语言。虽然“经典人工智能”需要手工制作的表示，但可以通过相同语言从非结构化数据中学习类似的表示。事实上，正是语言以及对这些语言中紧凑表示的偏好为世界提供了结构，揭示了对象、关系和原因。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过状态图的结构从动态系统中恢复状态变量，无需预先了解对象或背景知识。
AI.motivation: 在动态系统中，传统方法依赖人工设计的表示，而本文旨在探索能否通过语言驱动的因果表示学习自动发现对象和关系。
AI.method: 使用领域无关的一阶因果语言，结合对最紧凑表示的偏好，从状态图中学习因果结构。
AI.result: 证明在动态世界中可通过该方法恢复状态变量（如代理位置和包裹位置），无需先验知识。
AI.conclusion: 语言结构和紧凑性偏好为动态系统提供了关键的学习偏差，使因果表示学习成为可能。

authors_text: David M. Rosen
title: Accelerating Certifiable Estimation with Preconditioned Eigensolvers
title_zh: 使用预条件特征求解器加速可验证估计
abstract: Convex (specifically semidefinite) relaxation provides a powerful approach to constructing robust machine perception systems, enabling the recovery of certifiably globally optimal solutions of challenging estimation problems in many practical settings. However, solving the large-scale semidefinite relaxations underpinning this approach remains a formidable computational challenge. A dominant cost in many state-of-the-art (Burer-Monteiro factorization-based) certifiable estimation methods is solution verification (testing the global optimality of a given candidate solution), which entails computing a minimum eigenpair of a certain symmetric certificate matrix. In this letter, we show how to significantly accelerate this verification step, and thereby the overall speed of certifiable estimation methods. First, we show that the certificate matrices arising in the Burer-Monteiro approach generically possess spectra that make the verification problem expensive to solve using standard iterative eigenvalue methods. We then show how to address this challenge using preconditioned eigensolvers; specifically, we design a specialized solution verification algorithm based upon the locally optimal block preconditioned conjugate gradient (LOBPCG) method together with a simple yet highly effective algebraic preconditioner. Experimental evaluation on a variety of simulated and real-world examples shows that our proposed verification scheme is very effective in practice, accelerating solution verification by up to 280x, and the overall Burer-Monteiro method by up to 16x, versus the standard Lanczos method when applied to relaxations derived from large-scale SLAM benchmarks.
summary: Convex (specifically semidefinite) relaxation provides a powerful approach to constructing robust machine perception systems, enabling the recovery of certifiably globally optimal solutions of challenging estimation problems in many practical settings. However, solving the large-scale semidefinite relaxations underpinning this approach remains a formidable computational challenge. A dominant cost in many state-of-the-art (Burer-Monteiro factorization-based) certifiable estimation methods is solution verification (testing the global optimality of a given candidate solution), which entails computing a minimum eigenpair of a certain symmetric certificate matrix. In this letter, we show how to significantly accelerate this verification step, and thereby the overall speed of certifiable estimation methods. First, we show that the certificate matrices arising in the Burer-Monteiro approach generically possess spectra that make the verification problem expensive to solve using standard iterative eigenvalue methods. We then show how to address this challenge using preconditioned eigensolvers; specifically, we design a specialized solution verification algorithm based upon the locally optimal block preconditioned conjugate gradient (LOBPCG) method together with a simple yet highly effective algebraic preconditioner. Experimental evaluation on a variety of simulated and real-world examples shows that our proposed verification scheme is very effective in practice, accelerating solution verification by up to 280x, and the overall Burer-Monteiro method by up to 16x, versus the standard Lanczos method when applied to relaxations derived from large-scale SLAM benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 凸（特别是半定）松弛提供了一种构建鲁棒机器感知系统的强大方法，能够在许多实际环境中恢复具有挑战性的估计问题的可证明的全局最优解决方案。然而，解决支撑这种方法的大规模半定松弛仍然是一个艰巨的计算挑战。许多最先进的（基于 Burer-Monteiro 分解）可验证估计方法的主要成本是解决方案验证（测试给定候选解决方案的全局最优性），这需要计算某个对称证书矩阵的最小特征对。在这封信中，我们展示了如何显着加速这一验证步骤，从而提高可认证估计方法的整体速度。首先，我们表明 Burer-Monteiro 方法中产生的证书矩阵通常具有谱，这使得使用标准迭代特征值方法解决验证问题的成本很高。然后，我们展示如何使用预条件特征求解器来应对这一挑战；具体来说，我们设计了一种基于局部最优块预处理共轭梯度（LOBPCG）方法以及简单而高效的代数预处理器的专门解决方案验证算法。对各种模拟和真实示例的实验评估表明，我们提出的验证方案在实践中非常有效，当应用于从大规模 SLAM 基准得出的松弛时，与标准 Lanczos 方法相比，将解决方案验证速度提高了 280 倍，整体 Burer-Monteiro 方法提高了 16 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于预处理特征求解器的方法，以加速认证估计中的解验证步骤。
AI.motivation: 现有的认证估计方法在解验证阶段（计算对称证书矩阵的最小特征对）计算成本高昂，限制了其在大规模问题中的应用。
AI.method: 设计了一种结合局部最优块预处理共轭梯度法（LOBPCG）和代数预处理子的专用验证算法，以高效求解证书矩阵的特征对。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实世界数据集上，验证步骤加速达280倍，整体Burer-Monteiro方法加速达16倍。
AI.conclusion: 预处理特征求解器显著提升了认证估计的计算效率，为大规模SLAM等应用提供了更可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Tao Liu,Xi Yang,Chenshu Chen
title: Normalized Feature Distillation for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于语义分割的归一化特征蒸馏
abstract: As a promising approach in model compression, knowledge distillation improves the performance of a compact model by transferring the knowledge from a cumbersome one. The kind of knowledge used to guide the training of the student is important. Previous distillation methods in semantic segmentation strive to extract various forms of knowledge from the features, which involve elaborate manual design relying on prior information and have limited performance gains. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective feature distillation method called normalized feature distillation (NFD), aiming to enable effective distillation with the original features without the need to manually design new forms of knowledge. The key idea is to prevent the student from focusing on imitating the magnitude of the teacher's feature response by normalization. Our method achieves state-of-the-art distillation results for semantic segmentation on Cityscapes, VOC 2012, and ADE20K datasets. Code will be available.
summary: As a promising approach in model compression, knowledge distillation improves the performance of a compact model by transferring the knowledge from a cumbersome one. The kind of knowledge used to guide the training of the student is important. Previous distillation methods in semantic segmentation strive to extract various forms of knowledge from the features, which involve elaborate manual design relying on prior information and have limited performance gains. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective feature distillation method called normalized feature distillation (NFD), aiming to enable effective distillation with the original features without the need to manually design new forms of knowledge. The key idea is to prevent the student from focusing on imitating the magnitude of the teacher's feature response by normalization. Our method achieves state-of-the-art distillation results for semantic segmentation on Cityscapes, VOC 2012, and ADE20K datasets. Code will be available.
abstract_zh: 作为模型压缩中一种有前途的方法，知识蒸馏通过从繁琐的模型转移知识来提高紧凑模型的性能。用于指导学生培训的知识很重要。先前语义分割中的蒸馏方法致力于从特征中提取各种形式的知识，这涉及依赖先验信息的复杂的手动设计，并且性能提升有限。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的特征蒸馏方法，称为归一化特征蒸馏（NFD），旨在实现对原始特征的有效蒸馏，而不需要手动设计新的知识形式。关键思想是通过标准化防止学生专注于模仿教师特征反应的幅度。我们的方法在 Cityscapes、VOC 2012 和 ADE20K 数据集上实现了最先进的语义分割蒸馏结果。代码将可用。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需手动设计知识形式的特征蒸馏方法，用于语义分割的模型压缩。
AI.motivation: 传统特征蒸馏方法依赖人工设计知识形式，复杂且性能提升有限。
AI.method: 通过归一化处理，使学生模型关注教师特征的分布而非绝对幅度，简化知识转移过程。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes、VOC 2012和ADE20K数据集上达到语义分割蒸馏的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 归一化特征蒸馏（NFD）是一种有效且简单的模型压缩方法，可提升语义分割性能。

search_text: Normalized Feature Distillation for Semantic Segmentation 用于语义分割的归一化特征蒸馏 As a promising approach in model compression, knowledge distillation improves the performance of a compact model by transferring the knowledge from a cumbersome one. The kind of knowledge used to guide the training of the student is important. Previous distillation methods in semantic segmentation strive to extract various forms of knowledge from the features, which involve elaborate manual design relying on prior information and have limited performance gains. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective feature distillation method called normalized feature distillation (NFD), aiming to enable effective distillation with the original features without the need to manually design new forms of knowledge. The key idea is to prevent the student from focusing on imitating the magnitude of the teacher's feature response by normalization. Our method achieves state-of-the-art distillation results for semantic segmentation on Cityscapes, VOC 2012, and ADE20K datasets. Code will be available. 作为模型压缩中一种有前途的方法，知识蒸馏通过从繁琐的模型转移知识来提高紧凑模型的性能。用于指导学生培训的知识很重要。先前语义分割中的蒸馏方法致力于从特征中提取各种形式的知识，这涉及依赖先验信息的复杂的手动设计，并且性能提升有限。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的特征蒸馏方法，称为归一化特征蒸馏（NFD），旨在实现对原始特征的有效蒸馏，而不需要手动设计新的知识形式。关键思想是通过标准化防止学生专注于模仿教师特征反应的幅度。我们的方法在 Cityscapes、VOC 2012 和 ADE20K 数据集上实现了最先进的语义分割蒸馏结果。代码将可用。 提出一种无需手动设计知识形式的特征蒸馏方法，用于语义分割的模型压缩。 Tao Liu,Xi Yang,Chenshu Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Masato Tamura,Rahul Vishwakarma,Ravigopal Vennelakanti
title: Hunting Group Clues with Transformers for Social Group Activity Recognition
title_zh: 使用变压器寻找狩猎群体线索以进行社会群体活动识别
abstract: This paper presents a novel framework for social group activity recognition. As an expanded task of group activity recognition, social group activity recognition requires recognizing multiple sub-group activities and identifying group members. Most existing methods tackle both tasks by refining region features and then summarizing them into activity features. Such heuristic feature design renders the effectiveness of features susceptible to incomplete person localization and disregards the importance of scene contexts. Furthermore, region features are sub-optimal to identify group members because the features may be dominated by those of people in the regions and have different semantics. To overcome these drawbacks, we propose to leverage attention modules in transformers to generate effective social group features. Our method is designed in such a way that the attention modules identify and then aggregate features relevant to social group activities, generating an effective feature for each social group. Group member information is embedded into the features and thus accessed by feed-forward networks. The outputs of feed-forward networks represent groups so concisely that group members can be identified with simple Hungarian matching between groups and individuals. Experimental results show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on the Volleyball and Collective Activity datasets.
summary: This paper presents a novel framework for social group activity recognition. As an expanded task of group activity recognition, social group activity recognition requires recognizing multiple sub-group activities and identifying group members. Most existing methods tackle both tasks by refining region features and then summarizing them into activity features. Such heuristic feature design renders the effectiveness of features susceptible to incomplete person localization and disregards the importance of scene contexts. Furthermore, region features are sub-optimal to identify group members because the features may be dominated by those of people in the regions and have different semantics. To overcome these drawbacks, we propose to leverage attention modules in transformers to generate effective social group features. Our method is designed in such a way that the attention modules identify and then aggregate features relevant to social group activities, generating an effective feature for each social group. Group member information is embedded into the features and thus accessed by feed-forward networks. The outputs of feed-forward networks represent groups so concisely that group members can be identified with simple Hungarian matching between groups and individuals. Experimental results show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on the Volleyball and Collective Activity datasets.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于社会群体活动识别的新颖框架。作为群体活动识别的扩展任务，社会群体活动识别需要识别多个子群体活动并识别群体成员。大多数现有方法通过细化区域特征然后将它们总结为活动特征来解决这两个任务。这种启发式特征设计使得特征的有效性容易受到不完整的人物定位的影响，并且忽视了场景上下文的重要性。此外，区域特征对于识别群体成员来说不是最佳的，因为这些特征可能由区域中的人的特征主导并且具有不同的语义。为了克服这些缺点，我们建议利用 Transformer 中的注意力模块来生成有效的社交群体特征。我们的方法的设计方式是，注意力模块识别并聚合与社交群体活动相关的特征，为每个社交群体生成有效的特征。组成员信息被嵌入到特征中，从而由前馈网络访问。前馈网络的输出非常简洁地表示群体，以至于可以通过群体和个人之间的简单匈牙利匹配来识别群体成员。实验结果表明，我们的方法在排球和集体活动数据集上优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的新型框架，用于识别社交群体活动，包括多子群体活动识别和群体成员判定。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖启发式特征设计，易受人物定位不完整影响且忽略场景上下文，区域特征难以准确识别群体成员。
AI.method: 利用Transformer的注意力模块生成社交群体特征，通过注意力机制筛选并聚合相关特征，将成员信息嵌入特征后使用前馈网络和匈牙利匹配实现成员识别。
AI.result: 在Volleyball和Collective Activity数据集上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于Transformer的注意力机制有效捕捉群体活动特征及成员关系，为社交群体活动识别提供新思路。

authors_text: Yiming Cui,Linjie Yang,Ding Liu
title: Dynamic Proposals for Efficient Object Detection
title_zh: 高效物体检测的动态建议
abstract: Object detection is a basic computer vision task to loccalize and categorize objects in a given image. Most state-of-the-art detection methods utilize a fixed number of proposals as an intermediate representation of object candidates, which is unable to adapt to different computational constraints during inference. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective method which is adaptive to different computational resources by generating dynamic proposals for object detection. We first design a module to make a single query-based model to be able to inference with different numbers of proposals. Further, we extend it to a dynamic model to choose the number of proposals according to the input image, greatly reducing computational costs. Our method achieves significant speed-up across a wide range of detection models including two-stage and query-based models while obtaining similar or even better accuracy.
summary: Object detection is a basic computer vision task to loccalize and categorize objects in a given image. Most state-of-the-art detection methods utilize a fixed number of proposals as an intermediate representation of object candidates, which is unable to adapt to different computational constraints during inference. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective method which is adaptive to different computational resources by generating dynamic proposals for object detection. We first design a module to make a single query-based model to be able to inference with different numbers of proposals. Further, we extend it to a dynamic model to choose the number of proposals according to the input image, greatly reducing computational costs. Our method achieves significant speed-up across a wide range of detection models including two-stage and query-based models while obtaining similar or even better accuracy.
abstract_zh: 对象检测是一项基本的计算机视觉任务，用于对给定图像中的对象进行定位和分类。大多数最先进的检测方法利用固定数量的提案作为对象候选的中间表示，这无法适应推理过程中不同的计算约束。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，通过生成目标检测的动态建议来适应不同的计算资源。我们首先设计一个模块来创建一个基于查询的模型，以便能够对不同数量的建议进行推理。进一步，我们将其扩展为动态模型，根据输入图像选择提案数量，大大降低了计算成本。我们的方法在各种检测模型（包括两阶段模型和基于查询的模型）中实现了显着的加速，同时获得了相似甚至更好的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态生成候选框的方法，以提高目标检测的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有检测方法采用固定数量的候选框，无法适应不同计算资源约束，导致效率低下。
AI.method: 设计可变提案数模块，并扩展为根据输入图像动态调整提案数量的模型。
AI.result: 在多种检测模型上实现显著加速，同时保持或提升检测精度。
AI.conclusion: 动态提案方法有效平衡了计算效率与检测性能，具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Desi R. Ivanova,Joel Jennings,Cheng Zhang,Adam Foster
title: Efficient Real-world Testing of Causal Decision Making via Bayesian Experimental Design for Contextual Optimisation
title_zh: 通过用于上下文优化的贝叶斯实验设计对因果决策进行有效的现实测试
comment: ICML 2022 Workshop on Adaptive Experimental Design and Active Learning in the Real World. 16 pages, 5 figures
comments: ICML 2022 Workshop on Adaptive Experimental Design and Active Learning in the Real World. 16 pages, 5 figures
abstract: The real-world testing of decisions made using causal machine learning models is an essential prerequisite for their successful application. We focus on evaluating and improving contextual treatment assignment decisions: these are personalised treatments applied to e.g. customers, each with their own contextual information, with the aim of maximising a reward. In this paper we introduce a model-agnostic framework for gathering data to evaluate and improve contextual decision making through Bayesian Experimental Design. Specifically, our method is used for the data-efficient evaluation of the regret of past treatment assignments. Unlike approaches such as A/B testing, our method avoids assigning treatments that are known to be highly sub-optimal, whilst engaging in some exploration to gather pertinent information. We achieve this by introducing an information-based design objective, which we optimise end-to-end. Our method applies to discrete and continuous treatments. Comparing our information-theoretic approach to baselines in several simulation studies demonstrates the superior performance of our proposed approach.
summary: The real-world testing of decisions made using causal machine learning models is an essential prerequisite for their successful application. We focus on evaluating and improving contextual treatment assignment decisions: these are personalised treatments applied to e.g. customers, each with their own contextual information, with the aim of maximising a reward. In this paper we introduce a model-agnostic framework for gathering data to evaluate and improve contextual decision making through Bayesian Experimental Design. Specifically, our method is used for the data-efficient evaluation of the regret of past treatment assignments. Unlike approaches such as A/B testing, our method avoids assigning treatments that are known to be highly sub-optimal, whilst engaging in some exploration to gather pertinent information. We achieve this by introducing an information-based design objective, which we optimise end-to-end. Our method applies to discrete and continuous treatments. Comparing our information-theoretic approach to baselines in several simulation studies demonstrates the superior performance of our proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 使用因果机器学习模型做出的决策的实际测试是其成功应用的重要先决条件。我们专注于评估和改进情境治疗分配决策：这些是应用于例如治疗的个性化治疗。每个客户都有自己的上下文信息，目的是最大化奖励。在本文中，我们介绍了一个与模型无关的框架，用于收集数据，以通过贝叶斯实验设计评估和改进上下文决策。具体来说，我们的方法用于对过去治疗分配的遗憾进行数据有效的评估。与 A/B 测试等方法不同，我们的方法避免分配已知高度次优的治疗方法，同时进行一些探索以收集相关信息。我们通过引入基于信息的设计目标来实现这一目标，并对其进行端到端优化。我们的方法适用于离散和连续治疗。将我们的信息论方法与多项模拟研究中的基线进行比较，证明了我们提出的方法的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯实验设计的模型无关框架，用于高效评估和改进现实世界中的因果决策，特别是在上下文优化场景下的治疗分配问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法如A/B测试可能分配已知次优的治疗方案，导致效率低下。需要一种数据高效的方法，在避免次优治疗的同时收集关键信息以优化决策。
AI.method: 通过引入信息量为基础的设计目标，端到端优化贝叶斯实验设计框架，适用于离散和连续治疗，平衡探索与利用。
AI.result: 在多个模拟实验中，该方法在数据效率和减少遗憾（regret）方面优于传统基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该信息论方法能有效评估和改进现实世界的因果决策，避免次优治疗分配，适用于多种治疗类型，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Khoi-Nguyen C. Mac,Minh N. Do,Minh P. Vo
title: Efficient Human Vision Inspired Action Recognition using Adaptive Spatiotemporal Sampling
title_zh: 使用自适应时空采样进行高效的人类视觉启发动作识别
abstract: Adaptive sampling that exploits the spatiotemporal redundancy in videos is critical for always-on action recognition on wearable devices with limited computing and battery resources. The commonly used fixed sampling strategy is not context-aware and may under-sample the visual content, and thus adversely impacts both computation efficiency and accuracy. Inspired by the concepts of foveal vision and pre-attentive processing from the human visual perception mechanism, we introduce a novel adaptive spatiotemporal sampling scheme for efficient action recognition. Our system pre-scans the global scene context at low-resolution and decides to skip or request high-resolution features at salient regions for further processing. We validate the system on EPIC-KITCHENS and UCF-101 datasets for action recognition, and show that our proposed approach can greatly speed up inference with a tolerable loss of accuracy compared with those from state-of-the-art baselines. Source code is available in https://github.com/knmac/adaptive_spatiotemporal.
summary: Adaptive sampling that exploits the spatiotemporal redundancy in videos is critical for always-on action recognition on wearable devices with limited computing and battery resources. The commonly used fixed sampling strategy is not context-aware and may under-sample the visual content, and thus adversely impacts both computation efficiency and accuracy. Inspired by the concepts of foveal vision and pre-attentive processing from the human visual perception mechanism, we introduce a novel adaptive spatiotemporal sampling scheme for efficient action recognition. Our system pre-scans the global scene context at low-resolution and decides to skip or request high-resolution features at salient regions for further processing. We validate the system on EPIC-KITCHENS and UCF-101 datasets for action recognition, and show that our proposed approach can greatly speed up inference with a tolerable loss of accuracy compared with those from state-of-the-art baselines. Source code is available in https://github.com/knmac/adaptive_spatiotemporal.
abstract_zh: 利用视频中时空冗余的自适应采样对于计算和电池资源有限的可穿戴设备上始终在线的动作识别至关重要。常用的固定采样策略不是上下文感知的，可能会对视觉内容采样不足，从而对计算效率和准确性产生不利影响。受人类视觉感知机制的中心凹视觉和预注意处理概念的启发，我们引入了一种新颖的自适应时空采样方案，用于有效的动作识别。我们的系统以低分辨率预扫描全局场景上下文，并决定跳过或请求显着区域的高分辨率特征以进行进一步处理。我们在 EPIC-KITCHENS 和 UCF-101 数据集上验证了该系统的动作识别，并表明，与最先进的基线相比，我们提出的方法可以大大加快推理速度，但准确性的损失是可以容忍的。源代码可在 https://github.com/knmac/adaptive_spatiotemporal 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受人类视觉机制启发的自适应时空采样方法，用于提高可穿戴设备上动作识别的效率。
AI.motivation: 传统的固定采样策略在视频中无法有效利用时空冗余，导致计算效率和准确性下降，尤其是在资源受限的可穿戴设备上。
AI.method: 受人类视觉机制中的注视点视觉和预注意力处理启发，提出了一种自适应时空采样方案，通过低分辨率预扫描全局场景并选择性地请求高分辨率特征进行进一步处理。
AI.result: 在EPIC-KITCHENS和UCF-101数据集上验证了该方法，结果表明相比最先进的基线方法，该方法在保持可接受精度损失的同时显著提高了推理速度。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的自适应时空采样方法可以有效提升可穿戴设备上动作识别的效率，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Meiyu Zhi
title: Robust Key-Frame Stereo Visual SLAM with low-threshold Point and Line Features
title_zh: 具有低阈值点和线特征的鲁棒关键帧立体视觉 SLAM
abstract: In this paper, we develop a robust, efficient visual SLAM system that utilizes spatial inhibition of low threshold, baseline lines, and closed-loop keyframe features. Using ORB-SLAM2, our methods include stereo matching, frame tracking, local bundle adjustment, and line and point global bundle adjustment. In particular, we contribute re-projection in line with the baseline. Fusing lines in the system consume colossal time, and we reduce the time from distributing points to utilizing spatial suppression of feature points. In addition, low threshold key points can be more effective in dealing with low textures. In order to overcome Tracking keyframe redundant problems, an efficient and robust closed-loop tracking key frame is proposed. The proposed SLAM has been extensively tested in KITTI and EuRoC datasets, demonstrating that the proposed system is superior to state-of-the-art methods in various scenarios.
summary: In this paper, we develop a robust, efficient visual SLAM system that utilizes spatial inhibition of low threshold, baseline lines, and closed-loop keyframe features. Using ORB-SLAM2, our methods include stereo matching, frame tracking, local bundle adjustment, and line and point global bundle adjustment. In particular, we contribute re-projection in line with the baseline. Fusing lines in the system consume colossal time, and we reduce the time from distributing points to utilizing spatial suppression of feature points. In addition, low threshold key points can be more effective in dealing with low textures. In order to overcome Tracking keyframe redundant problems, an efficient and robust closed-loop tracking key frame is proposed. The proposed SLAM has been extensively tested in KITTI and EuRoC datasets, demonstrating that the proposed system is superior to state-of-the-art methods in various scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们开发了一个强大、高效的视觉 SLAM 系统，该系统利用低阈值、基线线和闭环关键帧特征的空间抑制。使用 ORB-SLAM2，我们的方法包括立体匹配、帧跟踪、局部束调整以及线和点全局束调整。特别是，我们根据基线贡献重新投影。系统中的融合线消耗了大量的时间，我们减少了从分布点到利用特征点的空间抑制的时间。另外，低阈值关键点可以更有效地处理低纹理。为了克服跟踪关键帧冗余问题，提出了一种高效、鲁棒的闭环跟踪关键帧。所提出的 SLAM 已在 KITTI 和 EuRoC 数据集中进行了广泛测试，证明所提出的系统在各种场景下均优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合低阈值点和线特征的鲁棒立体视觉SLAM系统，通过优化关键帧处理和特征融合提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉SLAM在低纹理环境和闭环检测中存在鲁棒性不足、计算效率低的问题，需改进特征提取与处理方法。
AI.method: 基于ORB-SLAM2框架，引入立体匹配、帧跟踪、局部与全局集束调整，采用空间抑制技术优化线特征融合，并设计低阈值关键点以增强低纹理场景适应性。
AI.result: 在KITTI和EuRoC数据集测试中，系统在定位精度和闭环检测效率上优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过低阈值特征与空间抑制技术有效解决了SLAM中的鲁棒性与效率问题，适用于复杂场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合低阈值点和线特征的鲁棒立体视觉SLAM系统，通过优化关键帧处理和特征融合提升性能。
