tldr: 本文提出一种结合低阈值点和线特征的鲁棒立体视觉SLAM系统，通过优化关键帧处理和特征融合提升性能。
motivation: 现有视觉SLAM在低纹理环境和闭环检测中存在鲁棒性不足、计算效率低的问题，需改进特征提取与处理方法。
method: 基于ORB-SLAM2框架，引入立体匹配、帧跟踪、局部与全局集束调整，采用空间抑制技术优化线特征融合，并设计低阈值关键点以增强低纹理场景适应性。
result: 在KITTI和EuRoC数据集测试中，系统在定位精度和闭环检测效率上优于现有先进方法。
conclusion: 所提方法通过低阈值特征与空间抑制技术有效解决了SLAM中的鲁棒性与效率问题，适用于复杂场景。
search_text: Robust Key-Frame Stereo Visual SLAM with low-threshold Point and Line Features 具有低阈值点和线特征的鲁棒关键帧立体视觉 SLAM In this paper, we develop a robust, efficient visual SLAM system that utilizes spatial inhibition of low threshold, baseline lines, and closed-loop keyframe features. Using ORB-SLAM2, our methods include stereo matching, frame tracking, local bundle adjustment, and line and point global bundle adjustment. In particular, we contribute re-projection in line with the baseline. Fusing lines in the system consume colossal time, and we reduce the time from distributing points to utilizing spatial suppression of feature points. In addition, low threshold key points can be more effective in dealing with low textures. In order to overcome Tracking keyframe redundant problems, an efficient and robust closed-loop tracking key frame is proposed. The proposed SLAM has been extensively tested in KITTI and EuRoC datasets, demonstrating that the proposed system is superior to state-of-the-art methods in various scenarios. 在本文中，我们开发了一个强大、高效的视觉 SLAM 系统，该系统利用低阈值、基线线和闭环关键帧特征的空间抑制。使用 ORB-SLAM2，我们的方法包括立体匹配、帧跟踪、局部束调整以及线和点全局束调整。特别是，我们根据基线贡献重新投影。系统中的融合线消耗了大量的时间，我们减少了从分布点到利用特征点的空间抑制的时间。另外，低阈值关键点可以更有效地处理低纹理。为了克服跟踪关键帧冗余问题，提出了一种高效、鲁棒的闭环跟踪关键帧。所提出的 SLAM 已在 KITTI 和 EuRoC 数据集中进行了广泛测试，证明所提出的系统在各种场景下均优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种结合低阈值点和线特征的鲁棒立体视觉SLAM系统，通过优化关键帧处理和特征融合提升性能。 Meiyu Zhi cs.RO

authors_text: Hanqing Chao,Jiajin Zhang,Pingkun Yan
title: Regression Metric Loss: Learning a Semantic Representation Space for Medical Images
title_zh: 回归度量损失：学习医学图像的语义表示空间
abstract: Regression plays an essential role in many medical imaging applications for estimating various clinical risk or measurement scores. While training strategies and loss functions have been studied for the deep neural networks in medical image classification tasks, options for regression tasks are very limited. One of the key challenges is that the high-dimensional feature representation learned by existing popular loss functions like Mean Squared Error or L1 loss is hard to interpret. In this paper, we propose a novel Regression Metric Loss (RM-Loss), which endows the representation space with the semantic meaning of the label space by finding a representation manifold that is isometric to the label space. Experiments on two regression tasks, i.e. coronary artery calcium score estimation and bone age assessment, show that RM-Loss is superior to the existing popular regression losses on both performance and interpretability. Code is available at https://github.com/DIAL-RPI/Regression-Metric-Loss.
summary: Regression plays an essential role in many medical imaging applications for estimating various clinical risk or measurement scores. While training strategies and loss functions have been studied for the deep neural networks in medical image classification tasks, options for regression tasks are very limited. One of the key challenges is that the high-dimensional feature representation learned by existing popular loss functions like Mean Squared Error or L1 loss is hard to interpret. In this paper, we propose a novel Regression Metric Loss (RM-Loss), which endows the representation space with the semantic meaning of the label space by finding a representation manifold that is isometric to the label space. Experiments on two regression tasks, i.e. coronary artery calcium score estimation and bone age assessment, show that RM-Loss is superior to the existing popular regression losses on both performance and interpretability. Code is available at https://github.com/DIAL-RPI/Regression-Metric-Loss.
abstract_zh: 回归在许多用于估计各种临床风险或测量分数的医学成像应用中发挥着重要作用。虽然已经研究了医学图像分类任务中深度神经网络的训练策略和损失函数，但回归任务的选择非常有限。关键挑战之一是通过现有流行的损失函数（例如均方误差或 L1 损失）学习的高维特征表示很难解释。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的回归度量损失（RM-Loss），它通过找到与标签空间等距的表示流形来赋予表示空间标签空间的语义。对冠状动脉钙评分估计和骨龄评估这两个回归任务的实验表明，RM-Loss 在性能和可解释性上均优于现有流行的回归损失。代码可在 https://github.com/DIAL-RPI/Regression-Metric-Loss 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的回归度量损失（RM-Loss），用于医学图像的语义表示空间学习，以解决回归任务中特征可解释性差的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有回归损失函数（如MSE、L1损失）在医学图像回归任务中难以生成可解释的高维特征表示，限制了模型的性能和临床应用。
AI.method: 通过构建与标签空间等距的表示流形，使特征空间具有语义意义，从而设计出RM-Loss损失函数。
AI.result: 在冠状动脉钙评分估计和骨龄评估两个任务中，RM-Loss在性能和可解释性上均优于现有回归损失函数。
AI.conclusion: RM-Loss为医学图像回归任务提供了更优的表示学习方法，兼顾模型性能与临床可解释性需求。

authors_text: Liam A. Kruse,Esen Yel,Ransalu Senanayake,Mykel J. Kochenderfer
title: Uncertainty-Aware Online Merge Planning with Learned Driver Behavior
title_zh: 具有学习驾驶员行为的不确定性在线并道规划
abstract: Safe and reliable autonomy solutions are a critical component of next-generation intelligent transportation systems. Autonomous vehicles in such systems must reason about complex and dynamic driving scenes in real time and anticipate the behavior of nearby drivers. Human driving behavior is highly nuanced and specific to individual traffic participants. For example, drivers might display cooperative or non-cooperative behaviors in the presence of merging vehicles. These behaviors must be estimated and incorporated in the planning process for safe and efficient driving. In this work, we present a framework for estimating the cooperation level of drivers on a freeway and plan merging maneuvers with the drivers' latent behaviors explicitly modeled. The latent parameter estimation problem is solved using a particle filter to approximate the probability distribution over the cooperation level. A partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) that includes the latent state estimate is solved online to extract a policy for a merging vehicle. We evaluate our method in a high-fidelity automotive simulator against methods that are agnostic to latent states or rely on $\textit{a priori}$ assumptions about actor behavior.
summary: Safe and reliable autonomy solutions are a critical component of next-generation intelligent transportation systems. Autonomous vehicles in such systems must reason about complex and dynamic driving scenes in real time and anticipate the behavior of nearby drivers. Human driving behavior is highly nuanced and specific to individual traffic participants. For example, drivers might display cooperative or non-cooperative behaviors in the presence of merging vehicles. These behaviors must be estimated and incorporated in the planning process for safe and efficient driving. In this work, we present a framework for estimating the cooperation level of drivers on a freeway and plan merging maneuvers with the drivers' latent behaviors explicitly modeled. The latent parameter estimation problem is solved using a particle filter to approximate the probability distribution over the cooperation level. A partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) that includes the latent state estimate is solved online to extract a policy for a merging vehicle. We evaluate our method in a high-fidelity automotive simulator against methods that are agnostic to latent states or rely on $\textit{a priori}$ assumptions about actor behavior.
abstract_zh: 安全可靠的自主解决方案是下一代智能交通系统的关键组成部分。此类系统中的自动驾驶车辆必须实时推理复杂且动态的驾驶场景，并预测附近驾驶员的行为。人类驾驶行为非常微妙且特定于各个交通参与者。例如，在并道车辆存在的情况下，驾驶员可能会表现出合作或不合作的行为。必须估计这些行为并将其纳入安全高效驾驶的规划过程中。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个框架，用于估计高速公路上驾驶员的合作水平，并根据明确建模的驾驶员的潜在行为来规划并道操作。使用粒子滤波器来近似合作级别上的概率分布来解决潜在参数估计问题。在线求解包含潜在状态估计的部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程 (POMDP)，以提取合并车辆的策略。我们在高保真汽车模拟器中针对与潜在状态不可知的方法或依赖于关于参与者行为的$\textit{先验}$假设的方法来评估我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习驾驶员行为的不确定性感知在线合并规划框架，用于提升自动驾驶车辆在高速公路上的安全性和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶规划方法未能有效建模驾驶员合作行为的不确定性，导致合并场景中安全性和效率不足。
AI.method: 采用粒子滤波估计驾驶员合作水平的概率分布，并结合部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）在线生成合并策略。
AI.result: 在高保真模拟器中验证，该方法相比传统方法在安全性和轨迹平滑性方面表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模驾驶员潜在行为可提升自动驾驶在复杂动态场景中的决策鲁棒性。

authors_text: Hikmat Khan,Pir Masoom Shah,Syed Farhan Alam Zaidi,Saif ul Islam,Qasim Zia
title: Susceptibility of Continual Learning Against Adversarial Attacks
title_zh: 持续学习对抗对抗性攻击的敏感性
abstract: Recent continual learning approaches have primarily focused on mitigating catastrophic forgetting. Nevertheless, two critical areas have remained relatively unexplored: 1) evaluating the robustness of proposed methods and 2) ensuring the security of learned tasks. This paper investigates the susceptibility of continually learned tasks, including current and previously acquired tasks, to adversarial attacks. Specifically, we have observed that any class belonging to any task can be easily targeted and misclassified as the desired target class of any other task. Such susceptibility or vulnerability of learned tasks to adversarial attacks raises profound concerns regarding data integrity and privacy. To assess the robustness of continual learning approaches, we consider continual learning approaches in all three scenarios, i.e., task-incremental learning, domain-incremental learning, and class-incremental learning. In this regard, we explore the robustness of three regularization-based methods, three replay-based approaches, and one hybrid technique that combines replay and exemplar approaches. We empirically demonstrated that in any setting of continual learning, any class, whether belonging to the current or previously learned tasks, is susceptible to misclassification. Our observations identify potential limitations of continual learning approaches against adversarial attacks and highlight that current continual learning algorithms could not be suitable for deployment in real-world settings.
summary: Recent continual learning approaches have primarily focused on mitigating catastrophic forgetting. Nevertheless, two critical areas have remained relatively unexplored: 1) evaluating the robustness of proposed methods and 2) ensuring the security of learned tasks. Specifically, we have observed that any class belonging to any task can be easily targeted and misclassified as the desired target class of any other task. Such susceptibility or vulnerability of learned tasks to adversarial attacks raises profound concerns regarding data integrity and privacy. To assess the robustness of continual learning approaches, we consider continual learning approaches in all three scenarios, i.e., task-incremental learning, domain-incremental learning, and class-incremental learning. In this regard, we explore the robustness of three regularization-based methods, three replay-based approaches, and one hybrid technique that combines replay and exemplar approaches. We empirically demonstrated that in any setting of continual learning, any class, whether belonging to the current or previously learned tasks, is susceptible to misclassification. Our observations identify potential limitations of continual learning approaches against adversarial attacks and highlight that current continual learning algorithms could not be suitable for deployment in real-world settings.
abstract_zh: 最近的持续学习方法主要集中在减轻灾难性遗忘上。然而，两个关键领域仍然相对未被探索：1）评估所提出方法的稳健性；2）确保学习任务的安全性。本文研究了持续学习的任务（包括当前和之前获得的任务）对对抗性攻击的敏感性。具体来说，我们观察到属于任何任务的任何类都可以很容易地被定位并错误分类为任何其他任务的所需目标类。学习任务对对抗性攻击的敏感性或脆弱性引起了人们对数据完整性和隐私的深刻担忧。为了评估持续学习方法的稳健性，我们考虑所有三种场景中的持续学习方法，即任务增量学习、领域增量学习和类别增量学习。在这方面，我们探索了三种基于正则化的方法、三种基于重放的方法以及一种结合重放和示例方法的混合技术的稳健性。我们凭经验证明，在任何持续学习的环境中，任何类别，无论是属于当前还是之前学习的任务，都容易出现错误分类。我们的观察发现了针对对抗性攻击的持续学习方法的潜在局限性，并强调当前的持续学习算法不适合在现实环境中部署。

AI.tldr: 本文研究持续学习方法在面对对抗性攻击时的脆弱性，评估其在不同场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法主要关注缓解灾难性遗忘，但对其鲁棒性和任务安全性研究不足，需明确其在对抗攻击下的局限性。
AI.method: 在任务增量、领域增量和类别增量学习场景下，测试三类持续学习方法（正则化、回放、混合技术）对对抗攻击的防御能力。
AI.result: 所有场景中，当前或先前任务的任意类别均易被对抗样本攻击导致误分类，暴露持续学习方法的脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: 现有持续学习算法无法有效抵御对抗攻击，需改进以满足实际应用的安全需求。

search_text: Susceptibility of Continual Learning Against Adversarial Attacks 持续学习对抗对抗性攻击的敏感性 Recent continual learning approaches have primarily focused on mitigating catastrophic forgetting. Nevertheless, two critical areas have remained relatively unexplored: 1) evaluating the robustness of proposed methods and 2) ensuring the security of learned tasks. This paper investigates the susceptibility of continually learned tasks, including current and previously acquired tasks, to adversarial attacks. Specifically, we have observed that any class belonging to any task can be easily targeted and misclassified as the desired target class of any other task. Such susceptibility or vulnerability of learned tasks to adversarial attacks raises profound concerns regarding data integrity and privacy. To assess the robustness of continual learning approaches, we consider continual learning approaches in all three scenarios, i.e., task-incremental learning, domain-incremental learning, and class-incremental learning. In this regard, we explore the robustness of three regularization-based methods, three replay-based approaches, and one hybrid technique that combines replay and exemplar approaches. We empirically demonstrated that in any setting of continual learning, any class, whether belonging to the current or previously learned tasks, is susceptible to misclassification. Our observations identify potential limitations of continual learning approaches against adversarial attacks and highlight that current continual learning algorithms could not be suitable for deployment in real-world settings. 最近的持续学习方法主要集中在减轻灾难性遗忘上。然而，两个关键领域仍然相对未被探索：1）评估所提出方法的稳健性；2）确保学习任务的安全性。本文研究了持续学习的任务（包括当前和之前获得的任务）对对抗性攻击的敏感性。具体来说，我们观察到属于任何任务的任何类都可以很容易地被定位并错误分类为任何其他任务的所需目标类。学习任务对对抗性攻击的敏感性或脆弱性引起了人们对数据完整性和隐私的深刻担忧。为了评估持续学习方法的稳健性，我们考虑所有三种场景中的持续学习方法，即任务增量学习、领域增量学习和类别增量学习。在这方面，我们探索了三种基于正则化的方法、三种基于重放的方法以及一种结合重放和示例方法的混合技术的稳健性。我们凭经验证明，在任何持续学习的环境中，任何类别，无论是属于当前还是之前学习的任务，都容易出现错误分类。我们的观察发现了针对对抗性攻击的持续学习方法的潜在局限性，并强调当前的持续学习算法不适合在现实环境中部署。 本文研究持续学习方法在面对对抗性攻击时的脆弱性，评估其在不同场景下的鲁棒性。 Hikmat Khan,Pir Masoom Shah,Syed Farhan Alam Zaidi,Saif ul Islam,Qasim Zia cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Shijie Chen,Ziru Chen,Xiang Deng,Ashley Lewis,Lingbo Mo,Samuel Stevens,Zhen Wang,Xiang Yue,Tianshu Zhang,Yu Su,Huan Sun
title: Bootstrapping a User-Centered Task-Oriented Dialogue System
title_zh: 引导以用户为中心、面向任务的对话系统
comment: Published in 1st Proceedings of Alexa Prize TaskBot (Alexa Prize 2021). TacoBot won 3rd place in the challenge. See project website https://sunlab-osu.github.io/tacobot/ for details
comments: Published in 1st Proceedings of Alexa Prize TaskBot (Alexa Prize 2021). TacoBot won 3rd place in the challenge. See project website https://sunlab-osu.github.io/tacobot/ for details
abstract: We present TacoBot, a task-oriented dialogue system built for the inaugural Alexa Prize TaskBot Challenge, which assists users in completing multi-step cooking and home improvement tasks. TacoBot is designed with a user-centered principle and aspires to deliver a collaborative and accessible dialogue experience. Towards that end, it is equipped with accurate language understanding, flexible dialogue management, and engaging response generation. Furthermore, TacoBot is backed by a strong search engine and an automated end-to-end test suite. In bootstrapping the development of TacoBot, we explore a series of data augmentation strategies to train advanced neural language processing models and continuously improve the dialogue experience with collected real conversations. At the end of the semifinals, TacoBot achieved an average rating of 3.55/5.0.
summary: We present TacoBot, a task-oriented dialogue system built for the inaugural Alexa Prize TaskBot Challenge, which assists users in completing multi-step cooking and home improvement tasks. TacoBot is designed with a user-centered principle and aspires to deliver a collaborative and accessible dialogue experience. Towards that end, it is equipped with accurate language understanding, flexible dialogue management, and engaging response generation. Furthermore, TacoBot is backed by a strong search engine and an automated end-to-end test suite. In bootstrapping the development of TacoBot, we explore a series of data augmentation strategies to train advanced neural language processing models and continuously improve the dialogue experience with collected real conversations. At the end of the semifinals, TacoBot achieved an average rating of 3.55/5.0.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 TacoBot，这是一个为首届 Alexa 奖 TaskBot 挑战赛构建的面向任务的对话系统，可帮助用户完成多步骤烹饪和家居装修任务。 TacoBot 的设计遵循以用户为中心的原则，致力于提供协作且易于访问的对话体验。为此，它配备了准确的语言理解、灵活的对话管理和引人入胜的响应生成。此外，TacoBot 拥有强大的搜索引擎和自动化端到端测试套件的支持。在引导 TacoBot 的开发过程中，我们探索了一系列数据增强策略来训练先进的神经语言处理模型，并通过收集的真实对话不断改善对话体验。半决赛结束时，TacoBot 的平均评分为 3.55/5.0。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了TacoBot，一个以用户为中心的任务导向对话系统，旨在通过协作和可访问性设计帮助用户完成多步骤烹饪和家庭维修任务。
AI.motivation: 现有对话系统在任务完成效率、用户参与度和灵活性方面存在不足，需通过用户需求驱动的设计提升体验。
AI.method: 结合准确的语言理解、灵活的对话管理与响应生成模块，利用数据增强策略训练神经语言模型，并通过真实对话迭代优化系统。
AI.result: 在Alexa Prize TaskBot挑战赛半决赛中，TacoBot获得3.55/5.0的平均用户评分。
AI.conclusion: 用户为中心的设计理念与数据驱动的模型优化有效提升了对话系统性能，但仍有改进空间。

authors_text: Saurav Kadavath,Tom Conerly,Amanda Askell,Tom Henighan,Dawn Drain,Ethan Perez,Nicholas Schiefer,Zac Hatfield-Dodds,Nova DasSarma,Eli Tran-Johnson,Scott Johnston,Sheer El-Showk,Andy Jones,Nelson Elhage,Tristan Hume,Anna Chen,Yuntao Bai,Sam Bowman,Stanislav Fort,Deep Ganguli,Danny Hernandez,Josh Jacobson,Jackson Kernion,Shauna Kravec,Liane Lovitt, et al. (11 additional authors not shown)
title: Language Models (Mostly) Know What They Know
title_zh: 语言模型（大多数）知道他们所知道的
abstract: We study whether language models can evaluate the validity of their own claims and predict which questions they will be able to answer correctly. We first show that larger models are well-calibrated on diverse multiple choice and true/false questions when they are provided in the right format. Thus we can approach self-evaluation on open-ended sampling tasks by asking models to first propose answers, and then to evaluate the probability "P(True)" that their answers are correct. We find encouraging performance, calibration, and scaling for P(True) on a diverse array of tasks. Performance at self-evaluation further improves when we allow models to consider many of their own samples before predicting the validity of one specific possibility. Next, we investigate whether models can be trained to predict "P(IK)", the probability that "I know" the answer to a question, without reference to any particular proposed answer. Models perform well at predicting P(IK) and partially generalize across tasks, though they struggle with calibration of P(IK) on new tasks. The predicted P(IK) probabilities also increase appropriately in the presence of relevant source materials in the context, and in the presence of hints towards the solution of mathematical word problems. We hope these observations lay the groundwork for training more honest models, and for investigating how honesty generalizes to cases where models are trained on objectives other than the imitation of human writing.
summary: We study whether language models can evaluate the validity of their own claims and predict which questions they will be able to answer correctly. We first show that larger models are well-calibrated on diverse multiple choice and true/false questions when they are provided in the right format. Thus we can approach self-evaluation on open-ended sampling tasks by asking models to first propose answers, and then to evaluate the probability "P(True)" that their answers are correct. We find encouraging performance, calibration, and scaling for P(True) on a diverse array of tasks. Performance at self-evaluation further improves when we allow models to consider many of their own samples before predicting the validity of one specific possibility. Next, we investigate whether models can be trained to predict "P(IK)", the probability that "I know" the answer to a question, without reference to any particular proposed answer. Models perform well at predicting P(IK) and partially generalize across tasks, though they struggle with calibration of P(IK) on new tasks. The predicted P(IK) probabilities also increase appropriately in the presence of relevant source materials in the context, and in the presence of hints towards the solution of mathematical word problems. We hope these observations lay the groundwork for training more honest models, and for investigating how honesty generalizes to cases where models are trained on objectives other than the imitation of human writing.
abstract_zh: 我们研究语言模型是否可以评估他们自己的主张的有效性并预测他们能够正确回答哪些问题。我们首先表明，当以正确的格式提供时，较大的模型可以针对各种多项选择和真/假问题进行良好校准。因此，我们可以通过要求模型首先提出答案，然后评估其答案正确的概率“P(True)”来对开放式抽样任务进行自我评估。我们发现 P(True) 在各种任务上的性能、校准和扩展都令人鼓舞。当我们允许模型在预测一种特定可能性的有效性之前考虑许多自己的样本时，自我评估的表现会进一步提高。接下来，我们研究是否可以训练模型来预测“P(IK)”，即“我知道”问题答案的概率，而不参考任何特定的建议答案。模型在预测 P(IK) 方面表现良好，并且在跨任务上具有部分泛化能力，尽管它们在新任务上校准 P(IK) 方面遇到困难。如果上下文中存在相关源材料，并且存在解决数学应用题的提示，则预测的 P(IK) 概率也会适当增加。我们希望这些观察结果为训练更诚实的模型奠定基础，并研究诚实如何推广到模型训练目标而不是模仿人类书写的情况。

AI.tldr: 研究语言模型是否能评估自身声明的有效性并预测其回答问题的正确性，通过分析P(True)和P(IK)概率进行自我评估。
AI.motivation: 旨在提升语言模型的诚实性与可靠性，使其能明确自身知识边界，避免错误回答。
AI.method: 通过让模型先生成答案再评估其正确性概率（P(True)），并训练模型预测无需具体答案的知识概率（P(IK)），结合多任务和上下文信息测试性能。
AI.result: P(True)在多种任务中表现良好且校准准确；P(IK)预测能力部分泛化但新任务校准不足，上下文材料和数学提示可提升P(IK)概率。
AI.conclusion: 研究为训练更诚实的模型奠定基础，并揭示诚实性在非人类模仿训练目标中的泛化潜力。

ai_content.result: P(True)在多种任务中表现良好且校准准确；P(IK)预测能力部分泛化但新任务校准不足，上下文材料和数学提示可提升P(IK)概率。

search_text: Language Models (Mostly) Know What They Know 语言模型（大多数）知道他们所知道的 We study whether language models can evaluate the validity of their own claims and predict which questions they will be able to answer correctly. We first show that larger models are well-calibrated on diverse multiple choice and true/false questions when they are provided in the right format. Thus we can approach self-evaluation on open-ended sampling tasks by asking models to first propose answers, and then to evaluate the probability "P(True)" that their answers are correct. We find encouraging performance, calibration, and scaling for P(True) on a diverse array of tasks. Performance at self-evaluation further improves when we allow models to consider many of their own samples before predicting the validity of one specific possibility. Next, we investigate whether models can be trained to predict "P(IK)", the probability that "I know" the answer to a question, without reference to any particular proposed answer. Models perform well at predicting P(IK) and partially generalize across tasks, though they struggle with calibration of P(IK) on new tasks. The predicted P(IK) probabilities also increase appropriately in the presence of relevant source materials in the context, and in the presence of hints towards the solution of mathematical word problems. We hope these observations lay the groundwork for training more honest models, and for investigating how honesty generalizes to cases where models are trained on objectives other than the imitation of human writing. 我们研究语言模型是否可以评估他们自己的主张的有效性并预测他们能够正确回答哪些问题。我们首先表明，当以正确的格式提供时，较大的模型可以针对各种多项选择和真/假问题进行良好校准。因此，我们可以通过要求模型首先提出答案，然后评估其答案正确的概率“P(True)”来对开放式抽样任务进行自我评估。我们发现 P(True) 在各种任务上的性能、校准和扩展都令人鼓舞。当我们允许模型在预测一种特定可能性的有效性之前考虑许多自己的样本时，自我评估的表现会进一步提高。接下来，我们研究是否可以训练模型来预测“P(IK)”，即“我知道”问题答案的概率，而不参考任何特定的建议答案。模型在预测 P(IK) 方面表现良好，并且在跨任务上具有部分泛化能力，尽管它们在新任务上校准 P(IK) 方面遇到困难。如果上下文中存在相关源材料，并且存在解决数学应用题的提示，则预测的 P(IK) 概率也会适当增加。我们希望这些观察结果为训练更诚实的模型奠定基础，并研究诚实如何推广到模型训练目标而不是模仿人类书写的情况。 研究语言模型是否能评估自身声明的有效性并预测其回答问题的正确性，通过分析P(True)和P(IK)概率进行自我评估。 Saurav Kadavath,Tom Conerly,Amanda Askell,Tom Henighan,Dawn Drain,Ethan Perez,Nicholas Schiefer,Zac Hatfield-Dodds,Nova DasSarma,Eli Tran-Johnson,Scott Johnston,Sheer El-Showk,Andy Jones,Nelson Elhage,Tristan Hume,Anna Chen,Yuntao Bai,Sam Bowman,Stanislav Fort,Deep Ganguli,Danny Hernandez,Josh Jacobson,Jackson Kernion,Shauna Kravec,Liane Lovitt, et al. (11 additional authors not shown) cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Andrew Singletary,Aiden Swann,Ivan Dario Jimenez Rodriguez,Aaron D. Ames
title: Safe Drone Flight with Time-Varying Backup Controllers
title_zh: 具有时变备份控制器的安全无人机飞行
abstract: The weight, space, and power limitations of small aerial vehicles often prevent the application of modern control techniques without significant model simplifications. Moreover, high-speed agile behavior, such as that exhibited in drone racing, make these simplified models too unreliable for safety-critical control. In this work, we introduce the concept of time-varying backup controllers (TBCs): user-specified maneuvers combined with backup controllers that generate reference trajectories which guarantee the safety of nonlinear systems. TBCs reduce conservatism when compared to traditional backup controllers and can be directly applied to multi-agent coordination to guarantee safety. Theoretically, we provide conditions under which TBCs strictly reduce conservatism, describe how to switch between several TBC's and show how to embed TBCs in a multi-agent setting. Experimentally, we verify that TBCs safely increase operational freedom when filtering a pilot's actions and demonstrate robustness and computational efficiency when applied to decentralized safety filtering of two quadrotors.
summary: The weight, space, and power limitations of small aerial vehicles often prevent the application of modern control techniques without significant model simplifications. Moreover, high-speed agile behavior, such as that exhibited in drone racing, make these simplified models too unreliable for safety-critical control. In this work, we introduce the concept of time-varying backup controllers (TBCs): user-specified maneuvers combined with backup controllers that generate reference trajectories which guarantee the safety of nonlinear systems. TBCs reduce conservatism when compared to traditional backup controllers and can be directly applied to multi-agent coordination to guarantee safety. Theoretically, we provide conditions under which TBCs strictly reduce conservatism, describe how to switch between several TBC's and show how to embed TBCs in a multi-agent setting. Experimentally, we verify that TBCs safely increase operational freedom when filtering a pilot's actions and demonstrate robustness and computational efficiency when applied to decentralized safety filtering of two quadrotors.
abstract_zh: 如果没有显着的模型简化，小型飞行器的重量、空间和功率限制通常会阻碍现代控制技术的应用。此外，高速敏捷行为（例如无人机竞赛中所表现出的行为）使得这些简化模型对于安全关键控制来说太不可靠。在这项工作中，我们引入了时变备用控制器（TBC）的概念：用户指定的机动与备用控制器相结合，生成保证非线性系统安全的参考轨迹。与传统的备份控制器相比，TBC 降低了保守性，并且可以直接应用于多智能体协调以保证安全。理论上，我们提供了 TBC 严格减少保守性的条件，描述了如何在多个 TBC 之间切换，并展示了如何将 TBC 嵌入多智能体环境中。通过实验，我们验证了 TBC 在过滤飞行员的行为时可以安全地提高操作自由度，并在应用于两个四旋翼飞行器的分散式安全过滤时展示鲁棒性和计算效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种时间变化的备用控制器（TBCs），用于提升无人机在复杂环境下的安全飞行能力。
AI.motivation: 小型无人机因硬件限制难以应用现代控制技术，而高速敏捷操作使传统简化模型无法满足安全需求。
AI.method: 设计结合用户指定动作与备用控制器的参考轨迹生成方法，通过理论分析保证非线性系统安全，并实现多智能体协调控制。
AI.result: 实验验证TBCs在过滤飞行员操作时提升安全边际，同时保持计算效率，适用于双四旋翼无人机的去中心化安全控制。
AI.conclusion: TBCs在理论上严格减少保守性，实验表明其能有效平衡操作自由度与安全性，为多智能体安全控制提供新思路。

authors_text: Minqi Jiang,Michael Dennis,Jack Parker-Holder,Andrei Lupu,Heinrich Küttler,Edward Grefenstette,Tim Rocktäschel,Jakob Foerster
title: Grounding Aleatoric Uncertainty for Unsupervised Environment Design
title_zh: 无监督环境设计的任意不确定性基础
abstract: Adaptive curricula in reinforcement learning (RL) have proven effective for producing policies robust to discrepancies between the train and test environment. Recently, the Unsupervised Environment Design (UED) framework generalized RL curricula to generating sequences of entire environments, leading to new methods with robust minimax regret properties. Problematically, in partially-observable or stochastic settings, optimal policies may depend on the ground-truth distribution over aleatoric parameters of the environment in the intended deployment setting, while curriculum learning necessarily shifts the training distribution. We formalize this phenomenon as curriculum-induced covariate shift (CICS), and describe how its occurrence in aleatoric parameters can lead to suboptimal policies. Directly sampling these parameters from the ground-truth distribution avoids the issue, but thwarts curriculum learning. We propose SAMPLR, a minimax regret UED method that optimizes the ground-truth utility function, even when the underlying training data is biased due to CICS. We prove, and validate on challenging domains, that our approach preserves optimality under the ground-truth distribution, while promoting robustness across the full range of environment settings.
summary: Adaptive curricula in reinforcement learning (RL) have proven effective for producing policies robust to discrepancies between the train and test environment. Recently, the Unsupervised Environment Design (UED) framework generalized RL curricula to generating sequences of entire environments, leading to new methods with robust minimax regret properties. Problematically, in partially-observable or stochastic settings, optimal policies may depend on the ground-truth distribution over aleatoric parameters of the environment in the intended deployment setting, while curriculum learning necessarily shifts the training distribution. We formalize this phenomenon as curriculum-induced covariate shift (CICS), and describe how its occurrence in aleatoric parameters can lead to suboptimal policies. Directly sampling these parameters from the ground-truth distribution avoids the issue, but thwarts curriculum learning. We propose SAMPLR, a minimax regret UED method that optimizes the ground-truth utility function, even when the underlying training data is biased due to CICS. We prove, and validate on challenging domains, that our approach preserves optimality under the ground-truth distribution, while promoting robustness across the full range of environment settings.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，强化学习 (RL) 中的自适应课程可以有效地制定针对训练环境和测试环境之间差异的稳健政策。最近，无监督环境设计 (UED) 框架将 RL 课程推广到生成整个环境的序列，从而产生了具有强大的极小极大遗憾属性的新方法。问题在于，在部分可观察或随机设置中，最优策略可能取决于预期部署设置中环境任意参数的真实分布，而课程学习必然会改变训练分布。我们将这种现象形式化为课程诱导的协变量转变（CICS），并描述其在任意参数中的发生如何导致次优政策。直接从真实分布中采样这些参数可以避免这个问题，但会阻碍课程学习。我们提出了 SAMPLR，一种极小最大后悔 UED 方法，即使底层训练数据因 CICS 存在偏差，也能优化真实效用函数。我们证明并在具有挑战性的领域进行验证，我们的方法在真实分布下保留了最优性，同时提高了整个环境设置的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SAMPLR的方法，用于解决无监督环境设计（UED）中因课程诱导协变量偏移（CICS）导致的次优策略问题，通过优化真实效用函数来保持策略在真实分布下的最优性。
AI.motivation: 在部分可观测或随机环境中，现有UED方法因训练分布与真实分布不匹配（CICS）可能导致策略次优，而直接采样真实分布又会破坏课程学习的渐进性。
AI.method: 提出SAMPLR方法，在存在CICS的偏倚训练数据下，通过最小化最大遗憾（minimax regret）框架优化真实效用函数，同时保持对环境参数分布的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，SAMPLR在复杂环境中能保持真实分布下的最优性，且在全范围环境设置中表现出更强的鲁棒性，验证了其理论有效性。
AI.conclusion: SAMPLR通过处理CICS问题，实现了在真实分布下保持最优性与环境鲁棒性的平衡，为随机环境中的UED提供了有效解决方案。

We propose SAMPLR, a minimax regret UED method that optimizes the ground-truth utility function, even when the underlying training data is biased due to CICS. We prove, and validate on challenging domains, that our approach preserves optimality under the ground-truth distribution, while promoting robustness across the full range of environment settings. 事实证明，强化学习 (RL) 中的自适应课程可以有效地制定针对训练环境和测试环境之间差异的稳健政策。最近，无监督环境设计 (UED) 框架将 RL 课程推广到生成整个环境的序列，从而产生了具有强大的极小极大遗憾属性的新方法。问题在于，在部分可观察或随机设置中，最优策略可能取决于预期部署设置中环境任意参数的真实分布，而课程学习必然会改变训练分布。我们将这种现象形式化为课程诱导的协变量转变（CICS），并描述其在任意参数中的发生如何导致次优政策。直接从真实分布中采样这些参数可以避免这个问题，但会阻碍课程学习。我们提出了 SAMPLR，一种极小最大后悔 UED 方法，即使底层训练数据因 CICS 存在偏差，也能优化真实效用函数。我们证明并在具有挑战性的领域进行验证，我们的方法在真实分布下保留了最优性，同时提高了整个环境设置的鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种名为SAMPLR的方法，用于解决无监督环境设计（UED）中因课程诱导协变量偏移（CICS）导致的次优策略问题，通过优化真实效用函数来保持策略在真实分布下的最优性。 Minqi Jiang,Michael Dennis,Jack Parker-Holder,Andrei Lupu,Heinrich Küttler,Edward Grefenstette,Tim Rocktäschel,Jakob Foerster cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Tyler LaBonte,Yale Song,Xin Wang,Vibhav Vineet,Neel Joshi
title: Scaling Novel Object Detection with Weakly Supervised Detection Transformers
title_zh: 使用弱监督检测变压器扩展新型目标检测
comment: WACV 2023. Preliminary version appeared in CVPR 2022 Workshop on Transformers for Vision
comments: WACV 2023. Preliminary version appeared in CVPR 2022 Workshop on Transformers for Vision
abstract: A critical object detection task is finetuning an existing model to detect novel objects, but the standard workflow requires bounding box annotations which are time-consuming and expensive to collect. Weakly supervised object detection (WSOD) offers an appealing alternative, where object detectors can be trained using image-level labels. However, the practical application of current WSOD models is limited, as they only operate at small data scales and require multiple rounds of training and refinement. To address this, we propose the Weakly Supervised Detection Transformer, which enables efficient knowledge transfer from a large-scale pretraining dataset to WSOD finetuning on hundreds of novel objects. Additionally, we leverage pretrained knowledge to improve the multiple instance learning (MIL) framework often used in WSOD methods. Our experiments show that our approach outperforms previous state-of-the-art models on large-scale novel object detection datasets, and our scaling study reveals that class quantity is more important than image quantity for WSOD pretraining. The code is available at https://github.com/tmlabonte/weakly-supervised-DETR.
summary: A critical object detection task is finetuning an existing model to detect novel objects, but the standard workflow requires bounding box annotations which are time-consuming and expensive to collect. Weakly supervised object detection (WSOD) offers an appealing alternative, where object detectors can be trained using image-level labels. However, the practical application of current WSOD models is limited, as they only operate at small data scales and require multiple rounds of training and refinement. To address this, we propose the Weakly Supervised Detection Transformer, which enables efficient knowledge transfer from a large-scale pretraining dataset to WSOD finetuning on hundreds of novel objects. Additionally, we leverage pretrained knowledge to improve the multiple instance learning (MIL) framework often used in WSOD methods. Our experiments show that our approach outperforms previous state-of-the-art models on large-scale novel object detection datasets, and our scaling study reveals that class quantity is more important than image quantity for WSOD pretraining. The code is available at https://github.com/tmlabonte/weakly-supervised-DETR.
abstract_zh: 关键的对象检测任务是微调现有模型以检测新对象，但标准工作流程需要边界框注释，收集起来既耗时又昂贵。弱监督对象检测（WSOD）提供了一种有吸引力的替代方案，可以使用图像级标签来训练对象检测器。然而，当前 WSOD 模型的实际应用受到限制，因为它们仅在小数据规模下运行，并且需要多轮训练和细化。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了弱监督检测变压器，它能够实现从大规模预训练数据集到数百个新对象的 WSOD 微调的高效知识转移。此外，我们利用预训练的知识来改进 WSOD 方法中常用的多实例学习 (MIL) 框架。我们的实验表明，我们的方法在大规模新颖对象检测数据集上优于以前最先进的模型，并且我们的扩展研究表明，对于 WSOD 预训练，类数量比图像数量更重要。该代码位于 https://github.com/tmlabonte/weakly-supervised-DETR。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种弱监督检测Transformer模型，用于在大规模数据集上高效地进行新对象检测的微调。
AI.motivation: 当前弱监督目标检测（WSOD）方法在实际应用中受到限制，因为它们仅适用于小规模数据集且需要多次训练和优化。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种弱监督检测Transformer模型，利用预训练知识改进多实例学习（MIL）框架，并实现了从大规模预训练数据集到数百个新对象的高效知识迁移。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在大规模新对象检测数据集上优于现有最先进的模型，并揭示了类数量比图像数量对WSOD预训练更为重要。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的弱监督检测Transformer模型在大规模新对象检测任务中表现优异，证明了类数量在WSOD预训练中的重要性。

authors_text: Walter Zimmer,Jialong Wu,Xingcheng Zhou,Alois C. Knoll
title: Real-Time And Robust 3D Object Detection with Roadside LiDARs
title_zh: 使用路边 LiDAR 进行实时、鲁棒的 3D 物体检测
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.00132
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.00132
abstract: This work aims to address the challenges in autonomous driving by focusing on the 3D perception of the environment using roadside LiDARs. We design a 3D object detection model that can detect traffic participants in roadside LiDARs in real-time. Our model uses an existing 3D detector as a baseline and improves its accuracy. To prove the effectiveness of our proposed modules, we train and evaluate the model on three different vehicle and infrastructure datasets. To show the domain adaptation ability of our detector, we train it on an infrastructure dataset from China and perform transfer learning on a different dataset recorded in Germany. We do several sets of experiments and ablation studies for each module in the detector that show that our model outperforms the baseline by a significant margin, while the inference speed is at 45 Hz (22 ms). We make a significant contribution with our LiDAR-based 3D detector that can be used for smart city applications to provide connected and automated vehicles with a far-reaching view. Vehicles that are connected to the roadside sensors can get information about other vehicles around the corner to improve their path and maneuver planning and to increase road traffic safety.
summary: This work aims to address the challenges in autonomous driving by focusing on the 3D perception of the environment using roadside LiDARs. We design a 3D object detection model that can detect traffic participants in roadside LiDARs in real-time. Our model uses an existing 3D detector as a baseline and improves its accuracy. To prove the effectiveness of our proposed modules, we train and evaluate the model on three different vehicle and infrastructure datasets. To show the domain adaptation ability of our detector, we train it on an infrastructure dataset from China and perform transfer learning on a different dataset recorded in Germany. We do several sets of experiments and ablation studies for each module in the detector that show that our model outperforms the baseline by a significant margin, while the inference speed is at 45 Hz (22 ms). We make a significant contribution with our LiDAR-based 3D detector that can be used for smart city applications to provide connected and automated vehicles with a far-reaching view. Vehicles that are connected to the roadside sensors can get information about other vehicles around the corner to improve their path and maneuver planning and to increase road traffic safety.
abstract_zh: 这项工作旨在通过专注于使用路边激光雷达对环境的 3D 感知来解决自动驾驶的挑战。我们设计了一个 3D 对象检测模型，可以实时检测路边 LiDAR 中的交通参与者。我们的模型使用现有的 3D 检测器作为基线并提高其准确性。为了证明我们提出的模块的有效性，我们在三个不同的车辆和基础设施数据集上训练和评估模型。为了展示我们的检测器的域适应能力，我们在中国的基础设施数据集上对其进行训练，并在德国记录的不同数据集上进行迁移学习。我们对检测器中的每个模块进行了几组实验和消融研究，结果表明我们的模型显着优于基线，而推理速度为 45 Hz（22 ms）。我们基于 LiDAR 的 3D 探测器做出了重大贡献，该探测器可用于智慧城市应用，为联网和自动化车辆提供深远的视野。连接到路边传感器的车辆可以获得拐角处其他车辆的信息，以改进其路径和机动规划并提高道路交通安全。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于路边LiDAR的实时且鲁棒的3D目标检测方法，用于自动驾驶环境感知与智慧城市应用。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需解决环境3D感知难题，传统传感器存在视野限制，路边LiDAR可提供更远距离的环境信息以提升车辆安全性和路径规划能力。
AI.method: 以现有3D检测器为基线，改进模型精度；在三个车路协同数据集上训练评估，并通过中国到德国的跨域迁移学习验证模型适应性。
AI.result: 模型在精度上显著优于基线，推理速度达45Hz（22ms），跨域实验验证了良好的领域适应能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的LiDAR检测器可为智能网联车辆提供远距离环境感知，有效提升道路安全与自动驾驶水平。

authors_text: Bohan Tang,Yiqi Zhong,Chenxin Xu,Wei-Tao Wu,Ulrich Neumann,Yanfeng Wang,Ya Zhang,Siheng Chen
title: Collaborative Uncertainty Benefits Multi-Agent Multi-Modal Trajectory Forecasting
title_zh: 协作不确定性有利于多智能体多模式轨迹预测
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.13947
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.13947
abstract: In multi-modal multi-agent trajectory forecasting, two major challenges have not been fully tackled: 1) how to measure the uncertainty brought by the interaction module that causes correlations among the predicted trajectories of multiple agents; 2) how to rank the multiple predictions and select the optimal predicted trajectory. In order to handle these challenges, this work first proposes a novel concept, collaborative uncertainty (CU), which models the uncertainty resulting from interaction modules. Then we build a general CU-aware regression framework with an original permutation-equivariant uncertainty estimator to do both tasks of regression and uncertainty estimation. Further, we apply the proposed framework to current SOTA multi-agent multi-modal forecasting systems as a plugin module, which enables the SOTA systems to 1) estimate the uncertainty in the multi-agent multi-modal trajectory forecasting task; 2) rank the multiple predictions and select the optimal one based on the estimated uncertainty. We conduct extensive experiments on a synthetic dataset and two public large-scale multi-agent trajectory forecasting benchmarks. Experiments show that: 1) on the synthetic dataset, the CU-aware regression framework allows the model to appropriately approximate the ground-truth Laplace distribution; 2) on the multi-agent trajectory forecasting benchmarks, the CU-aware regression framework steadily helps SOTA systems improve their performances. Specially, the proposed framework helps VectorNet improve by 262 cm regarding the Final Displacement Error of the chosen optimal prediction on the nuScenes dataset; 3) for multi-agent multi-modal trajectory forecasting systems, prediction uncertainty is positively correlated with future stochasticity; and 4) the estimated CU values are highly related to the interactive information among agents.
summary: In multi-modal multi-agent trajectory forecasting, two major challenges have not been fully tackled: 1) how to measure the uncertainty brought by the interaction module that causes correlations among the predicted trajectories of multiple agents; 2) how to rank the multiple predictions and select the optimal predicted trajectory. In order to handle these challenges, this work first proposes a novel concept, collaborative uncertainty (CU), which models the uncertainty resulting from interaction modules. Then we build a general CU-aware regression framework with an original permutation-equivariant uncertainty estimator to do both tasks of regression and uncertainty estimation. Further, we apply the proposed framework to current SOTA multi-agent multi-modal forecasting systems as a plugin module, which enables the SOTA systems to 1) estimate the uncertainty in the multi-agent multi-modal trajectory forecasting task; 2) rank the multiple predictions and select the optimal one based on the estimated uncertainty. We conduct extensive experiments on a synthetic dataset and two public large-scale multi-agent trajectory forecasting benchmarks. Experiments show that: 1) on the synthetic dataset, the CU-aware regression framework allows the model to appropriately approximate the ground-truth Laplace distribution; 2) on the multi-agent trajectory forecasting benchmarks, the CU-aware regression framework steadily helps SOTA systems improve their performances. Specially, the proposed framework helps VectorNet improve by 262 cm regarding the Final Displacement Error of the chosen optimal prediction on the nuScenes dataset; 3) for multi-agent multi-modal trajectory forecasting systems, prediction uncertainty is positively correlated with future stochasticity; and 4) the estimated CU values are highly related to the interactive information among agents.
abstract_zh: 在多模态多智能体轨迹预测中，两大挑战尚未完全解决：1）如何衡量交互模块带来的导致多个智能体预测轨迹之间相关性的不确定性； 2）如何对多个预测进行排序并选择最优的预测轨迹。为了应对这些挑战，这项工作首先提出了一个新的概念：协作不确定性（CU），它对交互模块产生的不确定性进行建模。然后，我们使用原始的排列等变不确定性估计器构建了一个通用的 CU 感知回归框架，以完成回归和不确定性估计的任务。此外，我们将所提出的框架作为插件模块应用于当前的SOTA多智能体多模态预测系统，这使得SOTA系统能够1）估计多智能体多模态轨迹预测任务中的不确定性； 2）对多个预测进行排序，并根据估计的不确定性选择最优的一个。我们对合成数据集和两个公共大规模多智能体轨迹预测基准进行了广泛的实验。实验表明：1）在合成数据集上，CU-aware回归框架允许模型适当地逼近真实拉普拉斯分布； 2）在多智能体轨迹预测基准上，CU感知回归框架稳步帮助SOTA系统提高性能。特别是，所提出的框架帮助 VectorNet 将 nuScenes 数据集上所选最佳预测的最终位移误差提高了 262 cm； 3）对于多智能体多模态轨迹预测系统，预测不确定性与未来随机性正相关； 4）估计的CU值与代理之间的交互信息高度相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种协作不确定性（CU）框架，用于解决多智能体多模态轨迹预测中的不确定性建模与预测排序问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以准确量化多智能体交互导致的轨迹预测不确定性，且缺乏有效的多预测排序机制，影响预测可靠性与决策优化。
AI.method: 提出协作不确定性概念，设计具有置换等变性不确定估计器的CU感知回归框架，作为插件模块集成到主流预测系统中，实现不确定性估计与最优轨迹选择。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和nuScenes等基准测试中，CU框架使VectorNet的最终位移误差降低262cm，验证了不确定性与未来随机性的正相关性，且CU估计值与智能体交互信息高度相关。
AI.conclusion: 协作不确定性框架有效提升了多智能体轨迹预测系统的性能与可靠性，为不确定性驱动的决策优化提供了新思路。

search_text: Collaborative Uncertainty Benefits Multi-Agent Multi-Modal Trajectory Forecasting 协作不确定性有利于多智能体多模式轨迹预测 In multi-modal multi-agent trajectory forecasting, two major challenges have not been fully tackled: 1) how to measure the uncertainty brought by the interaction module that causes correlations among the predicted trajectories of multiple agents; 2) how to rank the multiple predictions and select the optimal predicted trajectory. In order to handle these challenges, this work first proposes a novel concept, collaborative uncertainty (CU), which models the uncertainty resulting from interaction modules. Then we build a general CU-aware regression framework with an original permutation-equivariant uncertainty estimator to do both tasks of regression and uncertainty estimation. Further, we apply the proposed framework to current SOTA multi-agent multi-modal forecasting systems as a plugin module, which enables the SOTA systems to 1) estimate the uncertainty in the multi-agent multi-modal trajectory forecasting task; 2) rank the multiple predictions and select the optimal one based on the estimated uncertainty. We conduct extensive experiments on a synthetic dataset and two public large-scale multi-agent trajectory forecasting benchmarks. Experiments show that: 1) on the synthetic dataset, the CU-aware regression framework allows the model to appropriately approximate the ground-truth Laplace distribution; 2) on the multi-agent trajectory forecasting benchmarks, the CU-aware regression framework steadily helps SOTA systems improve their performances. Specially, the proposed framework helps VectorNet improve by 262 cm regarding the Final Displacement Error of the chosen optimal prediction on the nuScenes dataset; 3) for multi-agent multi-modal trajectory forecasting systems, prediction uncertainty is positively correlated with future stochasticity; and 4) the estimated CU values are highly related to the interactive information among agents. 在多模态多智能体轨迹预测中，两大挑战尚未完全解决：1）如何衡量交互模块带来的导致多个智能体预测轨迹之间相关性的不确定性； 2）如何对多个预测进行排序并选择最优的预测轨迹。为了应对这些挑战，这项工作首先提出了一个新的概念：协作不确定性（CU），它对交互模块产生的不确定性进行建模。然后，我们使用原始的排列等变不确定性估计器构建了一个通用的 CU 感知回归框架，以完成回归和不确定性估计的任务。此外，我们将所提出的框架作为插件模块应用于当前的SOTA多智能体多模态预测系统，这使得SOTA系统能够1）估计多智能体多模态轨迹预测任务中的不确定性； 2）对多个预测进行排序，并根据估计的不确定性选择最优的一个。我们对合成数据集和两个公共大规模多智能体轨迹预测基准进行了广泛的实验。实验表明：1）在合成数据集上，CU-aware回归框架允许模型适当地逼近真实拉普拉斯分布； 2）在多智能体轨迹预测基准上，CU感知回归框架稳步帮助SOTA系统提高性能。特别是，所提出的框架帮助 VectorNet 将 nuScenes 数据集上所选最佳预测的最终位移误差提高了 262 cm； 3）对于多智能体多模态轨迹预测系统，预测不确定性与未来随机性正相关； 4）估计的CU值与代理之间的交互信息高度相关。 本文提出了一种协作不确定性（CU）框架，用于解决多智能体多模态轨迹预测中的不确定性建模与预测排序问题。 Bohan Tang,Yiqi Zhong,Chenxin Xu,Wei-Tao Wu,Ulrich Neumann,Yanfeng Wang,Ya Zhang,Siheng Chen cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Ziang Xu,Sharib Ali,Soumya Gupta,Simon Leedham,James E East,Jens Rittscher
title: Patch-level instance-group discrimination with pretext-invariant learning for colitis scoring
title_zh: 结肠炎评分的补丁级实例组歧视和借口不变学习
abstract: Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), in particular ulcerative colitis (UC), is graded by endoscopists and this assessment is the basis for risk stratification and therapy monitoring. Presently, endoscopic characterisation is largely operator dependant leading to sometimes undesirable clinical outcomes for patients with IBD. We focus on the Mayo Endoscopic Scoring (MES) system which is widely used but requires the reliable identification of subtle changes in mucosal inflammation. Most existing deep learning classification methods cannot detect these fine-grained changes which make UC grading such a challenging task. In this work, we introduce a novel patch-level instance-group discrimination with pretext-invariant representation learning (PLD-PIRL) for self-supervised learning (SSL). Our experiments demonstrate both improved accuracy and robustness compared to the baseline supervised network and several state-of-the-art SSL methods. Compared to the baseline (ResNet50) supervised classification our proposed PLD-PIRL obtained an improvement of 4.75% on hold-out test data and 6.64% on unseen center test data for top-1 accuracy.
summary: Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), in particular ulcerative colitis (UC), is graded by endoscopists and this assessment is the basis for risk stratification and therapy monitoring. Presently, endoscopic characterisation is largely operator dependant leading to sometimes undesirable clinical outcomes for patients with IBD. We focus on the Mayo Endoscopic Scoring (MES) system which is widely used but requires the reliable identification of subtle changes in mucosal inflammation. Most existing deep learning classification methods cannot detect these fine-grained changes which make UC grading such a challenging task. In this work, we introduce a novel patch-level instance-group discrimination with pretext-invariant representation learning (PLD-PIRL) for self-supervised learning (SSL). Our experiments demonstrate both improved accuracy and robustness compared to the baseline supervised network and several state-of-the-art SSL methods. Compared to the baseline (ResNet50) supervised classification our proposed PLD-PIRL obtained an improvement of 4.75% on hold-out test data and 6.64% on unseen center test data for top-1 accuracy.
abstract_zh: 炎症性肠病（IBD），特别是溃疡性结肠炎（UC），由内窥镜医师进行分级，该评估是风险分层和治疗监测的基础。目前，内窥镜表征很大程度上依赖于操作者，有时会导致 IBD 患者出现不良的临床结果。我们重点关注广泛使用的梅奥内窥镜评分 (MES) 系统，但需要可靠地识别粘膜炎症的细微变化。大多数现有的深度学习分类方法无法检测这些细粒度的变化，这使得 UC 评分成为一项具有挑战性的任务。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种用于自监督学习（SSL）的新颖的补丁级实例组歧视和借口不变表示学习（PLD-PIRL）。我们的实验证明，与基线监督网络和几种最先进的 SSL 方法相比，准确性和鲁棒性都有所提高。与基线 (ResNet50) 监督分类相比，我们提出的 PLD-PIRL 在保留测试数据上获得了 4.75% 的改进，在未见过的中心测试数据上获得了 6.64% 的 top-1 精度改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的新型方法PLD-PIRL，用于提高结肠炎（特别是溃疡性结肠炎）内镜评分的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法难以检测黏膜炎症的细微变化，导致溃疡性结肠炎分级任务存在较大挑战，且内镜评估结果依赖操作者经验。
AI.method: 引入基于补丁级别的实例组判别与预文本不变表示学习（PLD-PIRL）框架，通过自监督学习提升模型对炎症特征的感知能力。
AI.result: 在独立测试数据集上，PLD-PIRL相较ResNet50监督模型提升4.75%准确率，在未见中心测试数据上提升6.64%。
AI.conclusion: PLD-PIRL方法在结肠炎评分任务中展现出更高的准确性和鲁棒性，为内镜图像分析提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Nandana Mihindukulasooriya,Mike Sava,Gaetano Rossiello,Md Faisal Mahbub Chowdhury,Irene Yachbes,Aditya Gidh,Jillian Duckwitz,Kovit Nisar,Michael Santos,Alfio Gliozzo
title: Knowledge Graph Induction enabling Recommending and Trend Analysis: A Corporate Research Community Use Case
title_zh: 支持推荐和趋势分析的知识图归纳：企业研究社区用例
abstract: A research division plays an important role of driving innovation in an organization. Drawing insights, following trends, keeping abreast of new research, and formulating strategies are increasingly becoming more challenging for both researchers and executives as the amount of information grows in both velocity and volume. In this paper we present a use case of how a corporate research community, IBM Research, utilizes Semantic Web technologies to induce a unified Knowledge Graph from both structured and textual data obtained by integrating various applications used by the community related to research projects, academic papers, datasets, achievements and recognition. In order to make the Knowledge Graph more accessible to application developers, we identified a set of common patterns for exploiting the induced knowledge and exposed them as APIs. Those patterns were born out of user research which identified the most valuable use cases or user pain points to be alleviated. We outline two distinct scenarios: recommendation and analytics for business use. We will discuss these scenarios in detail and provide an empirical evaluation on entity recommendation specifically. The methodology used and the lessons learned from this work can be applied to other organizations facing similar challenges.
summary: A research division plays an important role of driving innovation in an organization. Drawing insights, following trends, keeping abreast of new research, and formulating strategies are increasingly becoming more challenging for both researchers and executives as the amount of information grows in both velocity and volume. In this paper we present a use case of how a corporate research community, IBM Research, utilizes Semantic Web technologies to induce a unified Knowledge Graph from both structured and textual data obtained by integrating various applications used by the community related to research projects, academic papers, datasets, achievements and recognition. In order to make the Knowledge Graph more accessible to application developers, we identified a set of common patterns for exploiting the induced knowledge and exposed them as APIs. Those patterns were born out of user research which identified the most valuable use cases or user pain points to be alleviated. We outline two distinct scenarios: recommendation and analytics for business use. We will discuss these scenarios in detail and provide an empirical evaluation on entity recommendation specifically. The methodology used and the lessons learned from this work can be applied to other organizations facing similar challenges.
abstract_zh: 研究部门在推动组织创新方面发挥着重要作用。随着信息量的速度和数量不断增长，对于研究人员和管理人员来说，获取见解、跟踪趋势、跟上新研究的步伐以及制定策略变得越来越具有挑战性。在本文中，我们介绍了一个用例，说明企业研究社区 IBM Research 如何利用语义 Web 技术从结构化数据和文本数据中导出统一的知识图，这些数据是通过集成社区使用的与研究项目、学术论文、数据集、成就和认可相关的各种应用程序而获得的。为了使应用程序开发人员更容易访问知识图，我们确定了一组用于利用诱导知识的常见模式，并将它们作为 API 公开。这些模式源于用户研究，确定了最有价值的用例或需要缓解的用户痛点。我们概述了两种不同的场景：商业用途的推荐和分析。我们将详细讨论这些场景，并具体提供对实体推荐的实证评估。使用的方法和从这项工作中吸取的经验教训可以应用于面临类似挑战的其他组织。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了IBM研究部门如何利用语义网络技术构建统一的知识图谱，以支持企业研究社区的推荐与趋势分析。
AI.motivation: 随着信息量的快速增长，研究人员和高管面临信息过载问题，需有效工具提取洞察、跟踪趋势并制定策略。
AI.method: 整合结构化与非结构化数据构建知识图谱，通过用户研究识别核心需求，设计API暴露知识图谱模式，应用于推荐与业务分析场景。
AI.result: 成功实现知识图谱的推荐与分析功能，通过实体推荐实证评估验证方法有效性，并提炼出可复用的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法论可为其他面临相似挑战的组织提供参考，通过知识图谱技术提升信息处理与决策效率。

search_text: Knowledge Graph Induction enabling Recommending and Trend Analysis: A Corporate Research Community Use Case 支持推荐和趋势分析的知识图归纳：企业研究社区用例 A research division plays an important role of driving innovation in an organization. Drawing insights, following trends, keeping abreast of new research, and formulating strategies are increasingly becoming more challenging for both researchers and executives as the amount of information grows in both velocity and volume. In this paper we present a use case of how a corporate research community, IBM Research, utilizes Semantic Web technologies to induce a unified Knowledge Graph from both structured and textual data obtained by integrating various applications used by the community related to research projects, academic papers, datasets, achievements and recognition. In order to make the Knowledge Graph more accessible to application developers, we identified a set of common patterns for exploiting the induced knowledge and exposed them as APIs. Those patterns were born out of user research which identified the most valuable use cases or user pain points to be alleviated. We outline two distinct scenarios: recommendation and analytics for business use. We will discuss these scenarios in detail and provide an empirical evaluation on entity recommendation specifically. The methodology used and the lessons learned from this work can be applied to other organizations facing similar challenges. 研究部门在推动组织创新方面发挥着重要作用。随着信息量的速度和数量不断增长，对于研究人员和管理人员来说，获取见解、跟踪趋势、跟上新研究的步伐以及制定策略变得越来越具有挑战性。在本文中，我们介绍了一个用例，说明企业研究社区 IBM Research 如何利用语义 Web 技术从结构化数据和文本数据中导出统一的知识图，这些数据是通过集成社区使用的与研究项目、学术论文、数据集、成就和认可相关的各种应用程序而获得的。为了使应用程序开发人员更容易访问知识图，我们确定了一组用于利用诱导知识的常见模式，并将它们作为 API 公开。这些模式源于用户研究，确定了最有价值的用例或需要缓解的用户痛点。我们概述了两种不同的场景：商业用途的推荐和分析。我们将详细讨论这些场景，并具体提供对实体推荐的实证评估。使用的方法和从这项工作中吸取的经验教训可以应用于面临类似挑战的其他组织。 本文介绍了IBM研究部门如何利用语义网络技术构建统一的知识图谱，以支持企业研究社区的推荐与趋势分析。 Nandana Mihindukulasooriya,Mike Sava,Gaetano Rossiello,Md Faisal Mahbub Chowdhury,Irene Yachbes,Aditya Gidh,Jillian Duckwitz,Kovit Nisar,Michael Santos,Alfio Gliozzo cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.IR

authors_text: Jeffrey Byrne,Greg Castanon,Zhongheng Li,Gil Ettinger
title: Fine-grained Activities of People Worldwide
title_zh: 全世界人们的细粒度活动
abstract: Every day, humans perform many closely related activities that involve subtle discriminative motions, such as putting on a shirt vs. putting on a jacket, or shaking hands vs. giving a high five. Activity recognition by ethical visual AI could provide insights into our patterns of daily life, however existing activity recognition datasets do not capture the massive diversity of these human activities around the world. To address this limitation, we introduce Collector, a free mobile app to record video while simultaneously annotating objects and activities of consented subjects. This new data collection platform was used to curate the Consented Activities of People (CAP) dataset, the first large-scale, fine-grained activity dataset of people worldwide. The CAP dataset contains 1.45M video clips of 512 fine grained activity labels of daily life, collected by 780 subjects in 33 countries. We provide activity classification and activity detection benchmarks for this dataset, and analyze baseline results to gain insight into how people around with world perform common activities. The dataset, benchmarks, evaluation tools, public leaderboards and mobile apps are available for use at visym.github.io/cap.
summary: Every day, humans perform many closely related activities that involve subtle discriminative motions, such as putting on a shirt vs. putting on a jacket, or shaking hands vs. giving a high five. Activity recognition by ethical visual AI could provide insights into our patterns of daily life, however existing activity recognition datasets do not capture the massive diversity of these human activities around the world. To address this limitation, we introduce Collector, a free mobile app to record video while simultaneously annotating objects and activities of consented subjects. This new data collection platform was used to curate the Consented Activities of People (CAP) dataset, the first large-scale, fine-grained activity dataset of people worldwide. The CAP dataset contains 1.45M video clips of 512 fine grained activity labels of daily life, collected by 780 subjects in 33 countries. We provide activity classification and activity detection benchmarks for this dataset, and analyze baseline results to gain insight into how people around with world perform common activities. The dataset, benchmarks, evaluation tools, public leaderboards and mobile apps are available for use at visym.github.io/cap.
abstract_zh: 每天，人类都会进行许多密切相关的活动，其中涉及微妙的歧视性动作，例如穿衬衫与穿夹克，或者握手与击掌。通过道德视觉人工智能进行的活动识别可以深入了解我们的日常生活模式，但是现有的活动识别数据集无法捕捉到世界各地这些人类活动的巨大多样性。为了解决这一限制，我们推出了 Collector，这是一款免费的移动应用程序，用于录制视频，同时注释同意主体的对象和活动。这个新的数据收集平台用于管理人们的同意活动（CAP）数据集，这是全球第一个大规模、细粒度的人们活动数据集。 CAP 数据集包含 145 万个日常生活中的 512 个细粒度活动标签的视频片段，由 33 个国家的 780 名受试者收集。我们为此数据集提供活动分类和活动检测基准，并分析基准结果以深入了解世界各地的人们如何执行常见活动。数据集、基准测试、评估工具、公共排行榜和移动应用程序可在 visym.github.io/cap 上使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Collector移动应用及全球细粒度人类活动数据集CAP，解决现有活动识别数据集多样性不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有活动识别数据集无法捕捉全球人类日常活动中细微动作的多样性，限制了视觉AI对人类行为模式的理解。
AI.method: 开发Collector应用同步采集视频与标注数据，构建包含33国780名受试者145万视频片段的CAP数据集，并建立分类与检测基准测试。
AI.result: CAP数据集包含512个细粒度活动标签，提供基准测试结果分析，揭示全球不同地区人群日常活动模式差异。
AI.conclusion: CAP数据集为细粒度人类活动研究提供首个大规模全球数据资源，推动视觉AI在跨文化行为分析领域的应用发展。

authors_text: Masud An Nur Islam Fahim,Nazmus Saqib,Shafkat Khan Siam,Ho Yub Jung
title: Denoising single images by feature ensemble revisited
title_zh: 重新审视通过特征集合对单幅图像进行去噪
abstract: Image denoising is still a challenging issue in many computer vision sub-domains. Recent studies show that significant improvements are made possible in a supervised setting. However, few challenges, such as spatial fidelity and cartoon-like smoothing remain unresolved or decisively overlooked. Our study proposes a simple yet efficient architecture for the denoising problem that addresses the aforementioned issues. The proposed architecture revisits the concept of modular concatenation instead of long and deeper cascaded connections, to recover a cleaner approximation of the given image. We find that different modules can capture versatile representations, and concatenated representation creates a richer subspace for low-level image restoration. The proposed architecture's number of parameters remains smaller than the number for most of the previous networks and still achieves significant improvements over the current state-of-the-art networks.
summary: Image denoising is still a challenging issue in many computer vision sub-domains. Recent studies show that significant improvements are made possible in a supervised setting. However, few challenges, such as spatial fidelity and cartoon-like smoothing remain unresolved or decisively overlooked. Our study proposes a simple yet efficient architecture for the denoising problem that addresses the aforementioned issues. The proposed architecture revisits the concept of modular concatenation instead of long and deeper cascaded connections, to recover a cleaner approximation of the given image. We find that different modules can capture versatile representations, and concatenated representation creates a richer subspace for low-level image restoration. The proposed architecture's number of parameters remains smaller than the number for most of the previous networks and still achieves significant improvements over the current state-of-the-art networks.
abstract_zh: 图像去噪在许多计算机视觉子领域仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。最近的研究表明，在监督环境下可以取得重大改进。然而，几乎没有什么挑战，例如空间保真度和卡通般的平滑仍然没有得到解决或被彻底忽视。我们的研究提出了一种简单而有效的去噪问题架构，解决了上述问题。所提出的架构重新审视了模块化串联的概念，而不是长而更深的级联连接，以恢复给定图像的更清晰的近似值。我们发现不同的模块可以捕获多种表示，并且串联表示为低级图像恢复创建了更丰富的子空间。所提出的架构的参数数量仍然小于大多数先前网络的参数数量，并且仍然比当前最先进的网络实现了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种简单高效的图像去噪架构，通过模块化特征拼接解决空间保真度和卡通平滑问题。
AI.motivation: 现有监督学习方法在图像去噪中仍存在空间细节丢失和卡通化过度平滑的缺陷，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用模块化特征拼接结构替代深层级联连接，整合多模块的多样化表征以构建更丰富的恢复子空间。
AI.result: 参数量低于多数现有网络，却在去噪效果上显著超越当前最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 模块化特征集成架构在保持轻量化的同时，有效提升了图像去噪的质量与细节保留能力。

search_text: Denoising single images by feature ensemble revisited 重新审视通过特征集合对单幅图像进行去噪 Image denoising is still a challenging issue in many computer vision sub-domains. Recent studies show that significant improvements are made possible in a supervised setting. However, few challenges, such as spatial fidelity and cartoon-like smoothing remain unresolved or decisively overlooked. Our study proposes a simple yet efficient architecture for the denoising problem that addresses the aforementioned issues. The proposed architecture revisits the concept of modular concatenation instead of long and deeper cascaded connections, to recover a cleaner approximation of the given image. We find that different modules can capture versatile representations, and concatenated representation creates a richer subspace for low-level image restoration. The proposed architecture's number of parameters remains smaller than the number for most of the previous networks and still achieves significant improvements over the current state-of-the-art networks. 图像去噪在许多计算机视觉子领域仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。最近的研究表明，在监督环境下可以取得重大改进。然而，几乎没有什么挑战，例如空间保真度和卡通般的平滑仍然没有得到解决或被彻底忽视。我们的研究提出了一种简单而有效的去噪问题架构，解决了上述问题。所提出的架构重新审视了模块化串联的概念，而不是长而更深的级联连接，以恢复给定图像的更清晰的近似值。我们发现不同的模块可以捕获多种表示，并且串联表示为低级图像恢复创建了更丰富的子空间。所提出的架构的参数数量仍然小于大多数先前网络的参数数量，并且仍然比当前最先进的网络实现了显着改进。 本文提出一种简单高效的图像去噪架构，通过模块化特征拼接解决空间保真度和卡通平滑问题。 Masud An Nur Islam Fahim,Nazmus Saqib,Shafkat Khan Siam,Ho Yub Jung cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Hao Sun,Boris van Breugel,Jonathan Crabbe,Nabeel Seedat,Mihaela van der Schaar
title: What is Flagged in Uncertainty Quantification? Latent Density Models for Uncertainty Categorization
title_zh: 不确定性量化中标记了什么？用于不确定性分类的潜在密度模型
abstract: Uncertainty Quantification (UQ) is essential for creating trustworthy machine learning models. Recent years have seen a steep rise in UQ methods that can flag suspicious examples, however, it is often unclear what exactly these methods identify. In this work, we propose a framework for categorizing uncertain examples flagged by UQ methods in classification tasks. We introduce the confusion density matrix -- a kernel-based approximation of the misclassification density -- and use this to categorize suspicious examples identified by a given uncertainty method into three classes: out-of-distribution (OOD) examples, boundary (Bnd) examples, and examples in regions of high in-distribution misclassification (IDM). Through extensive experiments, we show that our framework provides a new and distinct perspective for assessing differences between uncertainty quantification methods, thereby forming a valuable assessment benchmark.
summary: Uncertainty Quantification (UQ) is essential for creating trustworthy machine learning models. Recent years have seen a steep rise in UQ methods that can flag suspicious examples, however, it is often unclear what exactly these methods identify. In this work, we propose a framework for categorizing uncertain examples flagged by UQ methods in classification tasks. We introduce the confusion density matrix -- a kernel-based approximation of the misclassification density -- and use this to categorize suspicious examples identified by a given uncertainty method into three classes: out-of-distribution (OOD) examples, boundary (Bnd) examples, and examples in regions of high in-distribution misclassification (IDM). Through extensive experiments, we show that our framework provides a new and distinct perspective for assessing differences between uncertainty quantification methods, thereby forming a valuable assessment benchmark.
abstract_zh: 不确定性量化 (UQ) 对于创建值得信赖的机器学习模型至关重要。近年来，可以标记可疑示例的昆士兰大学方法急剧增加，但是，通常不清楚这些方法到底能识别什么。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个框架，用于对分类任务中 UQ 方法标记的不确定示例进行分类。我们引入了混淆密度矩阵——基于核的错误分类密度近似值——并用它来将给定不确定性方法识别的可疑示例分为三类：分布外（OOD）示例、边界（Bnd）示例和高分布内错误分类（IDM）区域中的示例。通过大量的实验，我们表明我们的框架为评估不确定性量化方法之间的差异提供了一个新的、独特的视角，从而形成了一个有价值的评估基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于混淆密度矩阵的框架，用于对不确定性量化（UQ）方法在分类任务中标记的不确定样本进行分类。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有UQ方法能标记可疑样本，但其具体识别内容不明确，缺乏对不同UQ方法的系统性评估标准。
AI.method: 通过引入混淆密度矩阵（基于核方法的误分类密度近似），将UQ标记的样本分为三类：分布外样本（OOD）、边界样本（Bnd）和高分布内误分类区域样本（IDM）。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架能有效区分不同UQ方法的特性，为评估UQ方法提供了新的基准视角。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过样本分类视角，为不确定性量化方法的比较和评估建立了有价值的基准体系。

authors_text: Seungone Kim
title: Can Language Models perform Abductive Commonsense Reasoning?
title_zh: 语言模型可以进行归纳常识推理吗？
abstract: Abductive Reasoning is a task of inferring the most plausible hypothesis given a set of observations. In literature, the community has approached to solve this challenge by classifying/generating a likely hypothesis that does not contradict with a past observation and future observation. Some of the most well-known benchmarks that tackle this problem are aNLI and aNLG (pronounced as alpha-NLI and alpha-NLG). In this report, I review over some of the methodologies that were attempted to solve this challenge, re-implement the baseline models, and analyze some of the weaknesses that current approaches have. The code and the re-implemented results are available at this link.
summary: Abductive Reasoning is a task of inferring the most plausible hypothesis given a set of observations. In literature, the community has approached to solve this challenge by classifying/generating a likely hypothesis that does not contradict with a past observation and future observation. Some of the most well-known benchmarks that tackle this problem are aNLI and aNLG (pronounced as alpha-NLI and alpha-NLG). In this report, I review over some of the methodologies that were attempted to solve this challenge, re-implement the baseline models, and analyze some of the weaknesses that current approaches have. The code and the re-implemented results are available at this link.
abstract_zh: 溯因推理是根据一组观察结果推断出最合理的假设的任务。在文献中，社区已经通过分类/生成与过去的观察和未来的观察不矛盾的可能假设来解决这一挑战。解决这个问题的一些最著名的基准是 aNLI 和 aNLG（发音为 alpha-NLI 和 alpha-NLG）。在本报告中，我回顾了试图解决这一挑战的一些方法，重新实现基线模型，并分析了当前方法的一些弱点。代码和重新实现的结果可在此链接中找到。

AI.tldr: 评估语言模型在归纳常识推理任务中的表现
AI.motivation: 探讨现有方法在归纳推理中的局限性并寻找改进方向
AI.method: 重新实现并评估现有基线模型，分析其在归纳推理任务中的表现
AI.result: 发现现有方法在生成合理假设和避免矛盾方面存在局限性
AI.conclusion: 需要改进模型结构和训练策略以提升归纳常识推理能力

authors_text: Benjamin Lukas Cajus Barzen,Fedor Glazov,Jonas Geistert,Thomas Sikora
title: Accelerated Deep Lossless Image Coding with Unified Paralleleized GPU Coding Architecture
title_zh: 使用统一并行化 GPU 编码架构加速深度无损图像编码
abstract: We propose Deep Lossless Image Coding (DLIC), a full resolution learned lossless image compression algorithm. Our algorithm is based on a neural network combined with an entropy encoder. The neural network performs a density estimation on each pixel of the source image. The density estimation is then used to code the target pixel, beating FLIF in terms of compression rate. Similar approaches have been attempted. However, long run times make them unfeasible for real world applications. We introduce a parallelized GPU based implementation, allowing for encoding and decoding of grayscale, 8-bit images in less than one second. Because DLIC uses a neural network to estimate the probabilities used for the entropy coder, DLIC can be trained on domain specific image data. We demonstrate this capability by adapting and training DLIC with Magnet Resonance Imaging (MRI) images.
summary: We propose Deep Lossless Image Coding (DLIC), a full resolution learned lossless image compression algorithm. Our algorithm is based on a neural network combined with an entropy encoder. The neural network performs a density estimation on each pixel of the source image. The density estimation is then used to code the target pixel, beating FLIF in terms of compression rate. Similar approaches have been attempted. However, long run times make them unfeasible for real world applications. We introduce a parallelized GPU based implementation, allowing for encoding and decoding of grayscale, 8-bit images in less than one second. Because DLIC uses a neural network to estimate the probabilities used for the entropy coder, DLIC can be trained on domain specific image data. We demonstrate this capability by adapting and training DLIC with Magnet Resonance Imaging (MRI) images.
abstract_zh: 我们提出深度无损图像编码（DLIC），一种全分辨率学习无损图像压缩算法。我们的算法基于神经网络与熵编码器的结合。神经网络对源图像的每个像素执行密度估计。然后使用密度估计对目标像素进行编码，在压缩率方面优于 FLIF。 Similar approaches have been attempted.然而，较长的运行时间使得它们在现实世界的应用中不可行。我们引入了基于 GPU 的并行实现，允许在不到一秒的时间内对灰度 8 位图像进行编码和解码。由于 DLIC 使用神经网络来估计熵编码器使用的概率，因此可以在特定领域的图像数据上训练 DLIC。我们通过使用磁共振成像 (MRI) 图像调整和训练 DLIC 来展示这种能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经网络和熵编码的全分辨率无损图像压缩算法DLIC，并通过GPU并行化实现加速。
AI.motivation: 现有无损图像压缩算法如FLIF在压缩率或运行效率上存在不足，难以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 结合神经网络进行像素密度估计与熵编码，采用GPU并行化架构实现快速编解码，并支持领域自适应训练。
AI.result: 在保持压缩率优于FLIF的同时，实现灰度8位图像秒级编解码，并成功适配MRI医学图像数据。
AI.conclusion: DLIC通过算法创新与硬件加速相结合，在无损压缩领域实现了速度与性能的突破，具有领域自适应应用潜力。

We demonstrate this capability by adapting and training DLIC with Magnet Resonance Imaging (MRI) images. 我们提出深度无损图像编码（DLIC），一种全分辨率学习无损图像压缩算法。我们的算法基于神经网络与熵编码器的结合。神经网络对源图像的每个像素执行密度估计。然后使用密度估计对目标像素进行编码，在压缩率方面优于 FLIF。 Similar approaches have been attempted.然而，较长的运行时间使得它们在现实世界的应用中不可行。我们引入了基于 GPU 的并行实现，允许在不到一秒的时间内对灰度 8 位图像进行编码和解码。由于 DLIC 使用神经网络来估计熵编码器使用的概率，因此可以在特定领域的图像数据上训练 DLIC。我们通过使用磁共振成像 (MRI) 图像调整和训练 DLIC 来展示这种能力。 本文提出了一种基于神经网络和熵编码的全分辨率无损图像压缩算法DLIC，并通过GPU并行化实现加速。 Benjamin Lukas Cajus Barzen,Fedor Glazov,Jonas Geistert,Thomas Sikora eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Vincent Cohen-Addad,Fabrizio Grandoni,Euiwoong Lee,Chris Schwiegelshohn
title: Breaching the 2 LMP Approximation Barrier for Facility Location with Applications to k-Median
title_zh: 通过 k 中值的应用突破设施选址的 2 LMP 近似障碍
comment: Conference version in SODA2023. This version corrects a confusing bug in the definition of the upperbounding LP
comments: Conference version in SODA2023. This version corrects a confusing bug in the definition of the upperbounding LP
abstract: The Uncapacitated Facility Location (UFL) problem is one of the most fundamental clustering problems: Given a set of clients $C$ and a set of facilities $F$ in a metric space $(C \cup F, dist)$ with facility costs $open : F \to \mathbb{R}^+$, the goal is to find a set of facilities $S \subseteq F$ to minimize the sum of the opening cost $open(S)$ and the connection cost $d(S) := \sum_{p \in C} \min_{c \in S} dist(p, c)$. An algorithm for UFL is called a Lagrangian Multiplier Preserving (LMP) $α$ approximation if it outputs a solution $S\subseteq F$ satisfying $open(S) + d(S) \leq open(S^*) + αd(S^*)$ for any $S^* \subseteq F$. The best-known LMP approximation ratio for UFL is at most $2$ by the JMS algorithm of Jain, Mahdian, and Saberi based on the Dual-Fitting technique. We present a (slightly) improved LMP approximation algorithm for UFL. This is achieved by combining the Dual-Fitting technique with Local Search, another popular technique to address clustering problems. From a conceptual viewpoint, our result gives a theoretical evidence that local search can be enhanced so as to avoid bad local optima by choosing the initial feasible solution with LP-based techniques. Using the framework of bipoint solutions, our result directly implies a (slightly) improved approximation for the $k$-Median problem from 2.6742 to 2.67059.
summary: The Uncapacitated Facility Location (UFL) problem is one of the most fundamental clustering problems: Given a set of clients $C$ and a set of facilities $F$ in a metric space $(C \cup F, dist)$ with facility costs $open : F \to \mathbb{R}^+$, the goal is to find a set of facilities $S \subseteq F$ to minimize the sum of the opening cost $open(S)$ and the connection cost $d(S) := \sum_{p \in C} \min_{c \in S} dist(p, c)$. An algorithm for UFL is called a Lagrangian Multiplier Preserving (LMP) $α$ approximation if it outputs a solution $S\subseteq F$ satisfying $open(S) + d(S) \leq open(S^*) + αd(S^*)$ for any $S^* \subseteq F$. The best-known LMP approximation ratio for UFL is at most $2$ by the JMS algorithm of Jain, Mahdian, and Saberi based on the Dual-Fitting technique. We present a (slightly) improved LMP approximation algorithm for UFL. This is achieved by combining the Dual-Fitting technique with Local Search, another popular technique to address clustering problems. From a conceptual viewpoint, our result gives a theoretical evidence that local search can be enhanced so as to avoid bad local optima by choosing the initial feasible solution with LP-based techniques. Using the framework of bipoint solutions, our result directly implies a (slightly) improved approximation for the $k$-Median problem from 2.6742 to 2.67059.
abstract_zh: 无能力设施位置 (UFL) 问题是最基本的聚类问题之一：给定度量空间 $(C \cup F, dist)$ 中的一组客户端 $C$ 和一组设施 $F$，设施成本 $open : F \to \mathbb{R}^+$，目标是找到一组设施 $S \subseteq F$ 以最小化开放成本 $open(S)$ 和连接成本的总和$d(S) := \sum_{p \in C} \min_{c \in S} dist(p, c)$。如果 UFL 算法对于任何 $S^* \subseteq F$ 输出满足 $open(S) + d(S) \leq open(S^*) + αd(S^*)$ 的解 $S\subseteq F$，则称为拉格朗日乘数保留 (LMP) $α$ 近似。 Jain、Mahdian 和 Saberi 的 JMS 算法基于 Dual-Fitting 技术，最著名的 UFL LMP 近似率最多为 2$。我们提出了一种（稍微）改进的 UFL LMP 近似算法。这是通过将双重拟合技术与本地搜索相结合来实现的，本地搜索是另一种解决聚类问题的流行技术。从概念的角度来看，我们的结果提供了理论证据，表明可以通过使用基于 LP 的技术选择初始可行解来增强局部搜索，以避免不良的局部最优。使用双点解决方案的框架，我们的结果直接意味着 $k$ 中值问题的近似值从 2.6742 到 2.67059（略有）改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的拉格朗日乘数保持（LMP）近似算法，用于解决无容量设施选址问题（UFL），并将其应用于k-中位问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的最佳LMP近似比为2，但通过结合双重拟合技术与局部搜索方法，可进一步优化近似效果，从而提升聚类问题的求解效率。
AI.method: 将双重拟合技术与局部搜索相结合，通过线性规划（LP）基技术选择初始可行解，避免陷入局部最优解。
AI.result: UFL的LMP近似比从2小幅提升，并将k-中位问题的近似比从2.6742改进至2.67059。
AI.conclusion: 理论证明了通过LP基方法优化初始解可增强局部搜索性能，为聚类问题提供了更优的近似算法框架。

authors_text: Jian Yang,Yuwei Yin,Shuming Ma,Dongdong Zhang,Shuangzhi Wu,Hongcheng Guo,Zhoujun Li,Furu Wei
title: UM4: Unified Multilingual Multiple Teacher-Student Model for Zero-Resource Neural Machine Translation
title_zh: UM4：零资源神经机器翻译的统一多语言多师生模型
abstract: Most translation tasks among languages belong to the zero-resource translation problem where parallel corpora are unavailable. Multilingual neural machine translation (MNMT) enables one-pass translation using shared semantic space for all languages compared to the two-pass pivot translation but often underperforms the pivot-based method. In this paper, we propose a novel method, named as Unified Multilingual Multiple teacher-student Model for NMT (UM4). Our method unifies source-teacher, target-teacher, and pivot-teacher models to guide the student model for the zero-resource translation. The source teacher and target teacher force the student to learn the direct source to target translation by the distilled knowledge on both source and target sides. The monolingual corpus is further leveraged by the pivot-teacher model to enhance the student model. Experimental results demonstrate that our model of 72 directions significantly outperforms previous methods on the WMT benchmark.
summary: Most translation tasks among languages belong to the zero-resource translation problem where parallel corpora are unavailable. Multilingual neural machine translation (MNMT) enables one-pass translation using shared semantic space for all languages compared to the two-pass pivot translation but often underperforms the pivot-based method. In this paper, we propose a novel method, named as Unified Multilingual Multiple teacher-student Model for NMT (UM4). Our method unifies source-teacher, target-teacher, and pivot-teacher models to guide the student model for the zero-resource translation. The source teacher and target teacher force the student to learn the direct source to target translation by the distilled knowledge on both source and target sides. The monolingual corpus is further leveraged by the pivot-teacher model to enhance the student model. Experimental results demonstrate that our model of 72 directions significantly outperforms previous methods on the WMT benchmark.
abstract_zh: 大多数语言之间的翻译任务属于零资源翻译问题，无法获得并行语料库。与两遍​​枢轴翻译相比，多语言神经机器翻译 (MNMT) 可以使用所有语言的共享语义空间实现一次性翻译，但通常性能低于基于枢轴的方法。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法，称为 NMT 统一多语言多师生模型（UM4）。我们的方法统一了源教师、目标教师和枢轴教师模型来指导学生模型进行零资源翻译。源教师和目标教师迫使学生通过源和目标双方的提炼知识来学习直接源到目标的翻译。枢轴教师模型进一步利用单语语料库来增强学生模型。实验结果表明，我们的 72 个方向模型在 WMT 基准上显着优于以前的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UM4模型，通过多教师-学生结构解决零资源神经机器翻译问题。
AI.motivation: 零资源翻译缺乏平行语料，传统多语言NMT性能不如基于中间语言的pivot方法，需新方法提升效果。
AI.method: 整合源语言教师、目标语言教师和pivot教师模型，利用单语语料指导学生模型学习直接翻译。
AI.result: 在WMT基准测试中，72个方向的UM4模型显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: UM4通过多教师协同机制有效提升零资源翻译性能，验证了多视角知识蒸馏的有效性。
