authors_text: Xuan Liu,Cagdas Onal,Jie Fu
title: Reinforcement Learning of CPG-regulated Locomotion Controller for a Soft Snake Robot
title_zh: 软蛇机器人 CPG 调节运动控制器的强化学习
comment: 20 pages, 17 figures, 4 tables, in IEEE Transactions on Robotics
comments: 20 pages, 17 figures, 4 tables, in IEEE Transactions on Robotics
abstract: Intelligent control of soft robots is challenging due to the nonlinear and difficult-to-model dynamics. One promising model-free approach for soft robot control is reinforcement learning (RL). However, model-free RL methods tend to be computationally expensive and data-inefficient and may not yield natural and smooth locomotion patterns for soft robots. In this work, we develop a bio-inspired design of a learning-based goal-tracking controller for a soft snake robot. The controller is composed of two modules: An RL module for learning goal-tracking behaviors given the unmodeled and stochastic dynamics of the robot, and a central pattern generator (CPG) with the Matsuoka oscillators for generating stable and diverse locomotion patterns. We theoretically investigate the maneuverability of Matsuoka CPG's oscillation bias, frequency, and amplitude for steering control, velocity control, and sim-to-real adaptation of the soft snake robot. Based on this analysis, we proposed a composition of RL and CPG modules such that the RL module regulates the tonic inputs to the CPG system given state feedback from the robot, and the output of the CPG module is then transformed into pressure inputs to pneumatic actuators of the soft snake robot. This design allows the RL agent to naturally learn to entrain the desired locomotion patterns determined by the CPG maneuverability. We validated the optimality and robustness of the control design in both simulation and real experiments, and performed extensive comparisons with state-of-art RL methods to demonstrate the benefit of our bio-inspired control design.
summary: Intelligent control of soft robots is challenging due to the nonlinear and difficult-to-model dynamics. One promising model-free approach for soft robot control is reinforcement learning (RL). However, model-free RL methods tend to be computationally expensive and data-inefficient and may not yield natural and smooth locomotion patterns for soft robots. In this work, we develop a bio-inspired design of a learning-based goal-tracking controller for a soft snake robot. The controller is composed of two modules: An RL module for learning goal-tracking behaviors given the unmodeled and stochastic dynamics of the robot, and a central pattern generator (CPG) with the Matsuoka oscillators for generating stable and diverse locomotion patterns. We theoretically investigate the maneuverability of Matsuoka CPG's oscillation bias, frequency, and amplitude for steering control, velocity control, and sim-to-real adaptation of the soft snake robot. Based on this analysis, we proposed a composition of RL and CPG modules such that the RL module regulates the tonic inputs to the CPG system given state feedback from the robot, and the output of the CPG module is then transformed into pressure inputs to pneumatic actuators of the soft snake robot. This design allows the RL agent to naturally learn to entrain the desired locomotion patterns determined by the CPG maneuverability. We validated the optimality and robustness of the control design in both simulation and real experiments, and performed extensive comparisons with state-of-art RL methods to demonstrate the benefit of our bio-inspired control design.
abstract_zh: 由于非线性且难以建模的动力学，软机器人的智能控制具有挑战性。强化学习（RL）是一种有前景的软机器人控制无模型方法。然而，无模型强化学习方法往往计算成本昂贵且数据效率低下，并且可能无法为软机器人产生自然且平滑的运动模式。在这项工作中，我们为软蛇机器人开发了一种基于学习的目标跟踪控制器的仿生设计。该控制器由两个模块组成：一个 RL 模块，用于在给定机器人的未建模和随机动力学的情况下学习目标跟踪行为；以及一个带有松冈振荡器的中央模式生成器 (CPG)，用于生成稳定且多样化的运动模式。我们从理论上研究了松冈 CPG 的振荡偏差、频率和振幅用于软蛇机器人的转向控制、速度控制和模拟到真实自适应的可操作性。基于此分析，我们提出了 RL 和 CPG 模块的组合，其中 RL 模块根据机器人的状态反馈来调节 CPG 系统的强直输入，然后 CPG 模块的输出转换为软蛇机器人气动执行器的压力输入。这种设计使 RL 智能体能够自然地学习由 CPG 机动性确定的所需运动模式。我们在模拟和实际实验中验证了控制设计的最优性和鲁棒性，并与最先进的 RL 方法进行了广泛的比较，以证明我们的仿生控制设计的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合强化学习（RL）与中枢模式发生器（CPG）的控制器，用于软体蛇形机器人的运动控制。
AI.motivation: 软体机器人因非线性动态特性难以建模，传统模型自由RL方法存在计算成本高、数据效率低且难以生成自然运动模式的问题。
AI.method: 设计包含RL模块（学习目标跟踪）与Matsuoka振荡器CPG模块（生成稳定运动模式）的双模块控制器，通过理论分析CPG参数对转向、速度及仿真到现实适应的影响，并结合状态反馈调节CPG输入。
AI.result: 在仿真与实物实验中验证了控制方法的最优性与鲁棒性，相比现有RL方法展现出更高效的运动模式学习能力。
AI.conclusion: 生物启发的RL-CPG混合控制架构有效解决了软体机器人运动控制的效率与自然性问题，为复杂动态环境下的控制提供了新思路。

search_text: Reinforcement Learning of CPG-regulated Locomotion Controller for a Soft Snake Robot 软蛇机器人 CPG 调节运动控制器的强化学习 Intelligent control of soft robots is challenging due to the nonlinear and difficult-to-model dynamics. One promising model-free approach for soft robot control is reinforcement learning (RL). However, model-free RL methods tend to be computationally expensive and data-inefficient and may not yield natural and smooth locomotion patterns for soft robots. In this work, we develop a bio-inspired design of a learning-based goal-tracking controller for a soft snake robot. The controller is composed of two modules: An RL module for learning goal-tracking behaviors given the unmodeled and stochastic dynamics of the robot, and a central pattern generator (CPG) with the Matsuoka oscillators for generating stable and diverse locomotion patterns. We theoretically investigate the maneuverability of Matsuoka CPG's oscillation bias, frequency, and amplitude for steering control, velocity control, and sim-to-real adaptation of the soft snake robot. Based on this analysis, we proposed a composition of RL and CPG modules such that the RL module regulates the tonic inputs to the CPG system given state feedback from the robot, and the output of the CPG module is then transformed into pressure inputs to pneumatic actuators of the soft snake robot. This design allows the RL agent to naturally learn to entrain the desired locomotion patterns determined by the CPG maneuverability. We validated the optimality and robustness of the control design in both simulation and real experiments, and performed extensive comparisons with state-of-art RL methods to demonstrate the benefit of our bio-inspired control design. 由于非线性且难以建模的动力学，软机器人的智能控制具有挑战性。强化学习（RL）是一种有前景的软机器人控制无模型方法。然而，无模型强化学习方法往往计算成本昂贵且数据效率低下，并且可能无法为软机器人产生自然且平滑的运动模式。在这项工作中，我们为软蛇机器人开发了一种基于学习的目标跟踪控制器的仿生设计。该控制器由两个模块组成：一个 RL 模块，用于在给定机器人的未建模和随机动力学的情况下学习目标跟踪行为；以及一个带有松冈振荡器的中央模式生成器 (CPG)，用于生成稳定且多样化的运动模式。我们从理论上研究了松冈 CPG 的振荡偏差、频率和振幅用于软蛇机器人的转向控制、速度控制和模拟到真实自适应的可操作性。基于此分析，我们提出了 RL 和 CPG 模块的组合，其中 RL 模块根据机器人的状态反馈来调节 CPG 系统的强直输入，然后 CPG 模块的输出转换为软蛇机器人气动执行器的压力输入。这种设计使 RL 智能体能够自然地学习由 CPG 机动性确定的所需运动模式。我们在模拟和实际实验中验证了控制设计的最优性和鲁棒性，并与最先进的 RL 方法进行了广泛的比较，以证明我们的仿生控制设计的优势。 本文提出了一种结合强化学习（RL）与中枢模式发生器（CPG）的控制器，用于软体蛇形机器人的运动控制。 Xuan Liu,Cagdas Onal,Jie Fu cs.RO,math.DS

authors_text: Zhun Zhong,Yuyang Zhao,Gim Hee Lee,Nicu Sebe
title: Adversarial Style Augmentation for Domain Generalized Urban-Scene Segmentation
title_zh: 域广义城市场景分割的对抗风格增强
abstract: In this paper, we consider the problem of domain generalization in semantic segmentation, which aims to learn a robust model using only labeled synthetic (source) data. The model is expected to perform well on unseen real (target) domains. Our study finds that the image style variation can largely influence the model's performance and the style features can be well represented by the channel-wise mean and standard deviation of images. Inspired by this, we propose a novel adversarial style augmentation (AdvStyle) approach, which can dynamically generate hard stylized images during training and thus can effectively prevent the model from overfitting on the source domain. Specifically, AdvStyle regards the style feature as a learnable parameter and updates it by adversarial training. The learned adversarial style feature is used to construct an adversarial image for robust model training. AdvStyle is easy to implement and can be readily applied to different models. Experiments on two synthetic-to-real semantic segmentation benchmarks demonstrate that AdvStyle can significantly improve the model performance on unseen real domains and show that we can achieve the state of the art. Moreover, AdvStyle can be employed to domain generalized image classification and produces a clear improvement on the considered datasets.
summary: In this paper, we consider the problem of domain generalization in semantic segmentation, which aims to learn a robust model using only labeled synthetic (source) data. The model is expected to perform well on unseen real (target) domains. Our study finds that the image style variation can largely influence the model's performance and the style features can be well represented by the channel-wise mean and standard deviation of images. Inspired by this, we propose a novel adversarial style augmentation (AdvStyle) approach, which can dynamically generate hard stylized images during training and thus can effectively prevent the model from overfitting on the source domain. Specifically, AdvStyle regards the style feature as a learnable parameter and updates it by adversarial training. The learned adversarial style feature is used to construct an adversarial image for robust model training. AdvStyle is easy to implement and can be readily applied to different models. Experiments on two synthetic-to-real semantic segmentation benchmarks demonstrate that AdvStyle can significantly improve the model performance on unseen real domains and show that we can achieve the state of the art. Moreover, AdvStyle can be employed to domain generalized image classification and produces a clear improvement on the considered datasets.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑语义分割中的领域泛化问题，其目的是仅使用标记的合成（源）数据来学习鲁棒模型。该模型预计在看不见的真实（目标）领域表现良好。我们的研究发现，图像风格变化在很大程度上影响模型的性能，并且图像的通道均值和标准差可以很好地表示风格特征。受此启发，我们提出了一种新颖的对抗风格增强（AdvStyle）方法，该方法可以在训练期间动态生成硬风格化图像，从而可以有效防止模型在源域上过度拟合。具体来说，AdvStyle 将风格特征视为可学习的参数，并通过对抗性训练来更新它。学习到的对抗风格特征用于构建对抗图像以进行鲁棒模型训练。 AdvStyle 易于实现，并且可以轻松应用于不同的模型。对两个合成到真实语义分割基准的实验表明，AdvStyle 可以显着提高未见过的真实领域的模型性能，并表明我们可以实现最先进的技术。此外，AdvStyle 可用于领域广义图像分类，并对所考虑的数据集产生明显的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种对抗性风格增强方法（AdvStyle），用于提升城市场景语义分割的领域泛化能力，使模型在未见过的真实领域中表现更优。
AI.motivation: 领域泛化语义分割需在仅使用合成数据的情况下适应真实场景，但现有方法对风格变化敏感，导致模型性能下降。
AI.method: 通过通道均值和标准差表征图像风格特征，设计对抗训练机制动态生成风格化图像，将风格特征作为可学习参数更新模型。
AI.result: 在两个合成到真实的分割基准数据集上，AdvStyle显著提升模型性能并达到SOTA；同时在领域泛化图像分类任务中也取得明显改进。
AI.conclusion: AdvStyle通过对抗性风格增强有效提升模型领域适应性，方法实现简单且具有通用性，可推广至多种视觉任务。

authors_text: Sijia Lu,Feng Xu
title: Linear Leaky-Integrate-and-Fire Neuron Model Based Spiking Neural Networks and Its Mapping Relationship to Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 基于线性漏积分激发神经元模型的尖峰神经网络及其与深度神经网络的映射关系
abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are brain-inspired machine learning algorithms with merits such as biological plausibility and unsupervised learning capability. Previous works have shown that converting Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs) into SNNs is a practical and efficient approach for implementing an SNN. However, the basic principle and theoretical groundwork are lacking for training a non-accuracy-loss SNN. This paper establishes a precise mathematical mapping between the biological parameters of the Linear Leaky-Integrate-and-Fire model (LIF)/SNNs and the parameters of ReLU-AN/Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). Such mapping relationship is analytically proven under certain conditions and demonstrated by simulation and real data experiments. It can serve as the theoretical basis for the potential combination of the respective merits of the two categories of neural networks.
summary: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are brain-inspired machine learning algorithms with merits such as biological plausibility and unsupervised learning capability. Previous works have shown that converting Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs) into SNNs is a practical and efficient approach for implementing an SNN. However, the basic principle and theoretical groundwork are lacking for training a non-accuracy-loss SNN. This paper establishes a precise mathematical mapping between the biological parameters of the Linear Leaky-Integrate-and-Fire model (LIF)/SNNs and the parameters of ReLU-AN/Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). Such mapping relationship is analytically proven under certain conditions and demonstrated by simulation and real data experiments. It can serve as the theoretical basis for the potential combination of the respective merits of the two categories of neural networks.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络（SNN）是受大脑启发的机器学习算法，具有生物学合理性和无监督学习能力等优点。先前的工作表明，将人工神经网络 (ANN) 转换为 SNN 是实现 SNN 的实用且有效的方法。然而，训练非精度损失SNN缺乏基本原理和理论基础。本文在线性泄漏积分与火模型（LIF）/SNN 的生物参数与 ReLU-AN/深度神经网络（DNN）的参数之间建立了精确的数学映射。这种映射关系在一定条件下得到了分析证明，并通过模拟和真实数据实验得到了证明。它可以作为两类神经网络各自优点的潜在组合的理论基础。

AI.tldr: 本文建立线性漏积分火神经元模型（LIF）/脉冲神经网络（SNN）与深度神经网络（DNN）参数的精确数学映射关系，为无精度损失的SNN训练提供理论基础。
AI.motivation: 尽管将人工神经网络（ANN）转换为SNN是可行的，但缺乏训练无精度损失SNN的理论基础，需通过参数映射整合两种网络优势。
AI.method: 通过分析LIF模型生物参数与ReLU激活函数DNN参数的关系，建立数学映射并进行理论证明，结合仿真与真实数据实验验证。
AI.result: 在特定条件下证明了LIF/SNN与DNN参数的映射关系，实验表明该映射可有效结合两类网络的优势。
AI.conclusion: 该映射关系为SNN与DNN的融合提供了理论依据，有助于发挥两者在生物学合理性与深度学习性能上的互补性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文建立线性漏积分火神经元模型（LIF）/脉冲神经网络（SNN）与深度神经网络（DNN）参数的精确数学映射关系，为无精度损失的SNN训练提供理论基础。

search_text: Linear Leaky-Integrate-and-Fire Neuron Model Based Spiking Neural Networks and Its Mapping Relationship to Deep Neural Networks 基于线性漏积分激发神经元模型的尖峰神经网络及其与深度神经网络的映射关系 Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are brain-inspired machine learning algorithms with merits such as biological plausibility and unsupervised learning capability. Previous works have shown that converting Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs) into SNNs is a practical and efficient approach for implementing an SNN. However, the basic principle and theoretical groundwork are lacking for training a non-accuracy-loss SNN. This paper establishes a precise mathematical mapping between the biological parameters of the Linear Leaky-Integrate-and-Fire model (LIF)/SNNs and the parameters of ReLU-AN/Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). Such mapping relationship is analytically proven under certain conditions and demonstrated by simulation and real data experiments. It can serve as the theoretical basis for the potential combination of the respective merits of the two categories of neural networks. 尖峰神经网络（SNN）是受大脑启发的机器学习算法，具有生物学合理性和无监督学习能力等优点。先前的工作表明，将人工神经网络 (ANN) 转换为 SNN 是实现 SNN 的实用且有效的方法。然而，训练非精度损失SNN缺乏基本原理和理论基础。本文在线性泄漏积分与火模型（LIF）/SNN 的生物参数与 ReLU-AN/深度神经网络（DNN）的参数之间建立了精确的数学映射。这种映射关系在一定条件下得到了分析证明，并通过模拟和真实数据实验得到了证明。它可以作为两类神经网络各自优点的潜在组合的理论基础。 本文建立线性漏积分火神经元模型（LIF）/脉冲神经网络（SNN）与深度神经网络（DNN）参数的精确数学映射关系，为无精度损失的SNN训练提供理论基础。 Sijia Lu,Feng Xu cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Andrey Grabovsky,Vitaly Vanchurin
title: Bio-inspired Machine Learning: programmed death and replication
title_zh: 仿生机器学习：程序性死亡和复制
abstract: We analyze algorithmic and computational aspects of biological phenomena, such as replication and programmed death, in the context of machine learning. We use two different measures of neuron efficiency to develop machine learning algorithms for adding neurons to the system (i.e. replication algorithm) and removing neurons from the system (i.e. programmed death algorithm). We argue that the programmed death algorithm can be used for compression of neural networks and the replication algorithm can be used for improving performance of the already trained neural networks. We also show that a combined algorithm of programmed death and replication can improve the learning efficiency of arbitrary machine learning systems. The computational advantages of the bio-inspired algorithms are demonstrated by training feedforward neural networks on the MNIST dataset of handwritten images.
summary: We analyze algorithmic and computational aspects of biological phenomena, such as replication and programmed death, in the context of machine learning. We use two different measures of neuron efficiency to develop machine learning algorithms for adding neurons to the system (i.e. replication algorithm) and removing neurons from the system (i.e. programmed death algorithm). We argue that the programmed death algorithm can be used for compression of neural networks and the replication algorithm can be used for improving performance of the already trained neural networks. We also show that a combined algorithm of programmed death and replication can improve the learning efficiency of arbitrary machine learning systems. The computational advantages of the bio-inspired algorithms are demonstrated by training feedforward neural networks on the MNIST dataset of handwritten images.
abstract_zh: 我们在机器学习的背景下分析生物现象的算法和计算方面，例如复制和程序性死亡。我们使用两种不同的神经元效率度量来开发机器学习算法，用于向系统添加神经元（即复制算法）和从系统中删除神经元（即程序性死亡算法）。我们认为程序死亡算法可用于神经网络的压缩，而复制算法可用于提高已训练神经网络的性能。我们还表明，程序性死亡和复制的组合算法可以提高任意机器学习系统的学习效率。通过在手写图像的 MNIST 数据集上训练前馈神经网络，证明了仿生算法的计算优势。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了受生物学启发的机器学习算法，通过模拟生物体的复制和程序性死亡机制，提出神经网络的增删神经元算法。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络在训练过程中缺乏动态调整结构的能力，导致效率与性能难以平衡，需借鉴生物进化机制优化模型。
AI.method: 基于神经元效率的两种度量标准，分别设计神经元添加（复制算法）和移除（程序性死亡算法），并验证其组合效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，程序性死亡算法可压缩网络规模，复制算法可提升已训练网络性能，组合算法显著提高MNIST数据集上的学习效率。
AI.conclusion: 生物启发式算法为机器学习系统提供了动态结构优化的新思路，兼具压缩性与性能提升优势。

authors_text: Chikako Dozono,Mina Aragaki,Hana Hebishima,Shin-ichi Inage
title: Proposal and Verification of Novel Machine Learning on Classification Problems
title_zh: 关于分类问题的新型机器学习的提出和验证
abstract: This paper aims at proposing a new machine learning for classification problems. The classification problem has a wide range of applications, and there are many approaches such as decision trees, neural networks, and Bayesian nets. In this paper, we focus on the action of neurons in the brain, especially the EPSP/IPSP cancellation between excitatory and inhibitory synapses, and propose a Machine Learning that does not belong to any conventional method. The feature is to consider one neuron and give it a multivariable Xj (j = 1, 2,.) and its function value F(Xj) as data to the input layer. The multivariable input layer and processing neuron are linked by two lines to each variable node. One line is called an EPSP edge, and the other is called an IPSP edge, and a parameter Δj common to each edge is introduced. The processing neuron is divided back and forth into two parts, and at the front side, a pulse having a width 2Δj and a height 1 is defined around an input X . The latter half of the processing neuron defines a pulse having a width 2Δj centered on the input Xj and a height F(Xj) based on a value obtained from the input layer of F(Xj). This information is defined as belonging to group i. In other words, the group i has a width of 2Δj centered on the input Xj, is defined in a region of height F(Xj), and all outputs of xi within the variable range are F(Xi). This group is learned and stored by a few minutes of the Teaching signals, and the output of the TEST signals is predicted by which group the TEST signals belongs to. The parameter Δj is optimized so that the accuracy of the prediction is maximized. The proposed method was applied to the flower species classification problem of Iris, the rank classification problem of used cars, and the ring classification problem of abalone, and the calculation was compared with the neural networks.
summary: This paper aims at proposing a new machine learning for classification problems. The classification problem has a wide range of applications, and there are many approaches such as decision trees, neural networks, and Bayesian nets. In this paper, we focus on the action of neurons in the brain, especially the EPSP/IPSP cancellation between excitatory and inhibitory synapses, and propose a Machine Learning that does not belong to any conventional method. The feature is to consider one neuron and give it a multivariable Xj (j = 1, 2,.) and its function value F(Xj) as data to the input layer. The multivariable input layer and processing neuron are linked by two lines to each variable node. One line is called an EPSP edge, and the other is called an IPSP edge, and a parameter Δj common to each edge is introduced. The processing neuron is divided back and forth into two parts, and at the front side, a pulse having a width 2Δj and a height 1 is defined around an input X . The latter half of the processing neuron defines a pulse having a width 2Δj centered on the input Xj and a height F(Xj) based on a value obtained from the input layer of F(Xj). This information is defined as belonging to group i. In other words, the group i has a width of 2Δj centered on the input Xj, is defined in a region of height F(Xj), and all outputs of xi within the variable range are F(Xi). This group is learned and stored by a few minutes of the Teaching signals, and the output of the TEST signals is predicted by which group the TEST signals belongs to. abstract_zh: 本文旨在提出一种新的机器学习方法来解决分类问题。分类问题的应用范围很广，有决策树、神经网络、贝叶斯网络等多种方法。在本文中，我们关注大脑中神经元的作用，特别是兴奋性突触和抑制性突触之间的 EPSP/IPSP 取消，并提出了一种不属于任何常规方法的机器学习。特征是考虑一个神经元，赋予它一个多变量Xj(j = 1, 2,.)及其函数值F(Xj)作为输入层的数据。多变量输入层和处理神经元通过两条线连接到每个变量节点。一条线称为EPSP边缘，另一条线称为IPSP边缘，并且引入每条边缘公共的参数Δj。处理神经元被前后分成两部分，并且在前侧，围绕输入X定义具有宽度2Δj和高度1的脉冲。处理神经元的后半部分定义了一个脉冲，该脉冲具有以输入 Xj 为中心的宽度 2Δj 和基于从输入层 F(Xj) 获得的值的高度 F(Xj)。该信息被定义为属于组 i。换句话说，组i以输入Xj为中心具有2Δj的宽度，被定义在高度F(Xj)的区域中，并且可变范围内的xi的所有输出都是F(Xi)。该组是通过几分钟的示教信号来学习和存储的，并且通过TEST信号属于哪一组来预测TEST信号的输出。参数 Δj 被优化，使得预测的准确性最大化。将该方法应用于鸢尾花品种分类问题、二手车等级分类问题、鲍鱼环分类问题，并与神经网络进行计算比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经元EPSP/IPSP机制的新型机器学习方法，用于解决分类问题。
AI.motivation: 传统分类方法（如决策树、神经网络）存在局限性，本文受大脑神经元兴奋性与抑制性突触作用机制启发，尝试构建全新分类模型。
AI.method: 通过模拟神经元处理多变量输入的机制，引入EPSP/IPSP边与参数Δj，将输入数据划分为基于脉冲宽度和高度的组别，利用教学信号学习并预测测试数据所属组别。
AI.result: 该方法在鸢尾花分类、二手车等级分类和鲍鱼环分类任务中均得到验证，并与神经网络方法进行了性能对比。
AI.conclusion: 提出的神经元机制分类方法为机器学习提供了新视角，但需进一步验证其在更复杂场景下的泛化能力与计算效率。

The latter half of the processing neuron defines a pulse having a width 2Δj centered on the input Xj and a height F(Xj) based on a value obtained from the input layer of F(Xj). This information is defined as belonging to group i. In other words, the group i has a width of 2Δj centered on the input Xj, is defined in a region of height F(Xj), and all outputs of xi within the variable range are F(Xi). This group is learned and stored by a few minutes of the Teaching signals, and the output of the TEST signals is predicted by which group the TEST signals belongs to. The parameter Δj is optimized so that the accuracy of the prediction is maximized. The proposed method was applied to the flower species classification problem of Iris, the rank classification problem of used cars, and the ring classification problem of abalone, and the calculation was compared with the neural networks. 本文旨在提出一种新的机器学习方法来解决分类问题。分类问题的应用范围很广，有决策树、神经网络、贝叶斯网络等多种方法。在本文中，我们关注大脑中神经元的作用，特别是兴奋性突触和抑制性突触之间的 EPSP/IPSP 取消，并提出了一种不属于任何常规方法的机器学习。特征是考虑一个神经元，赋予它一个多变量Xj(j = 1, 2,.)及其函数值F(Xj)作为输入层的数据。多变量输入层和处理神经元通过两条线连接到每个变量节点。一条线称为EPSP边缘，另一条线称为IPSP边缘，并且引入每条边缘公共的参数Δj。处理神经元被前后分成两部分，并且在前侧，围绕输入X定义具有宽度2Δj和高度1的脉冲。处理神经元的后半部分定义了一个脉冲，该脉冲具有以输入 Xj 为中心的宽度 2Δj 和基于从输入层 F(Xj) 获得的值的高度 F(Xj)。该信息被定义为属于组 i。换句话说，组i以输入Xj为中心具有2Δj的宽度，被定义在高度F(Xj)的区域中，并且可变范围内的xi的所有输出都是F(Xi)。该组是通过几分钟的示教信号来学习和存储的，并且通过TEST信号属于哪一组来预测TEST信号的输出。参数 Δj 被优化，使得预测的准确性最大化。将该方法应用于鸢尾花品种分类问题、二手车等级分类问题、鲍鱼环分类问题，并与神经网络进行计算比较。 本文提出一种基于神经元EPSP/IPSP机制的新型机器学习方法，用于解决分类问题。 Chikako Dozono,Mina Aragaki,Hana Hebishima,Shin-ichi Inage cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Davide Liberato Manna,Alex Vicente Sola,Paul Kirkland,Trevor Bihl,Gaetano Di Caterina
title: Simple and complex spiking neurons: perspectives and analysis in a simple STDP scenario
title_zh: 简单和复杂的尖峰神经元：简单 STDP 场景中的观点和分析
abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are largely inspired by biology and neuroscience and leverage ideas and theories to create fast and efficient learning systems. Spiking neuron models are adopted as core processing units in neuromorphic systems because they enable event-based processing. The integrate-and-fire (I&F) models are often adopted, with the simple Leaky I&F (LIF) being the most used. The reason for adopting such models is their efficiency and/or biological plausibility. Nevertheless, rigorous justification for adopting LIF over other neuron models for use in artificial learning systems has not yet been studied. This work considers various neuron models in the literature and then selects computational neuron models that are single-variable, efficient, and display different types of complexities. From this selection, we make a comparative study of three simple I&F neuron models, namely the LIF, the Quadratic I&F (QIF) and the Exponential I&F (EIF), to understand whether the use of more complex models increases the performance of the system and whether the choice of a neuron model can be directed by the task to be completed. Neuron models are tested within an SNN trained with Spike-Timing Dependent Plasticity (STDP) on a classification task on the N-MNIST and DVS Gestures datasets. Experimental results reveal that more complex neurons manifest the same ability as simpler ones to achieve high levels of accuracy on a simple dataset (N-MNIST), albeit requiring comparably more hyper-parameter tuning. However, when the data possess richer Spatio-temporal features, the QIF and EIF neuron models steadily achieve better results. This suggests that accurately selecting the model based on the richness of the feature spectrum of the data could improve the whole system's performance. Finally, the code implementing the spiking neurons in the SpykeTorch framework is made publicly available.

Spiking neuron models are adopted as core processing units in neuromorphic systems because they enable event-based processing. The integrate-and-fire (I&F) models are often adopted, with the simple Leaky I&F (LIF) being the most used. The reason for adopting such models is their efficiency and/or biological plausibility. Nevertheless, rigorous justification for adopting LIF over other neuron models for use in artificial learning systems has not yet been studied. This work considers various neuron models in the literature and then selects computational neuron models that are single-variable, efficient, and display different types of complexities. From this selection, we make a comparative study of three simple I&F neuron models, namely the LIF, the Quadratic I&F (QIF) and the Exponential I&F (EIF), to understand whether the use of more complex models increases the performance of the system and whether the choice of a neuron model can be directed by the task to be completed. Neuron models are tested within an SNN trained with Spike-Timing Dependent Plasticity (STDP) on a classification task on the N-MNIST and DVS Gestures datasets. Experimental results reveal that more complex neurons manifest the same ability as simpler ones to achieve high levels of accuracy on a simple dataset (N-MNIST), albeit requiring comparably more hyper-parameter tuning. However, when the data possess richer Spatio-temporal features, the QIF and EIF neuron models steadily achieve better results. This suggests that accurately selecting the model based on the richness of the feature spectrum of the data could improve the whole system's performance. Finally, the code implementing the spiking neurons in the SpykeTorch framework is made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 在很大程度上受到生物学和神经科学的启发，并利用思想和理论来创建快速高效的学习系统。尖峰神经元模型被用作神经形态系统中的核心处理单元，因为它们能够实现基于事件的处理。通常采用集成激发 (I&F) 模型，其中最常用的是简单的泄漏 I&F (LIF)。采用此类模型的原因是它们的效率和/或生物学合理性。然而，尚未研究在人工学习系统中采用 LIF 而非其他神经元模型的严格理由。这项工作考虑了文献中的各种神经元模型，然后选择单变量、高效且显示不同类型复杂性的计算神经元模型。由此选择，我们对三种简单的 I&F 神经元模型，即 LIF、二次 I&F (QIF) 和指数 I&F (EIF) 进行了比较研究，以了解使用更复杂的模型是否会提高系统的性能以及神经元模型的选择是否可以由要完成的任务来指导。神经元模型在 SNN 中进行测试，该 SNN 经过尖峰时序相关可塑性 (STDP) 训练，用于 N-MNIST 和 DVS 手势数据集的分类任务。实验结果表明，更复杂的神经元表现出与更简单的神经元相同的能力，可以在简单数据集 (N-MNIST) 上实现高精度，尽管需要更多的超参数调整。然而，当数据具有更丰富的时空特征时，QIF和EIF神经元模型稳步取得更好的结果。这表明根据数据特征谱的丰富性准确选择模型可以提高整个系统的性能。最后，在 SpykeTorch 框架中实现尖峰神经元的代码已公开。

AI.tldr: 该论文比较了三种简单脉冲神经元模型（LIF、QIF、EIF）在不同数据集上的性能，探讨复杂模型是否能提升脉冲神经网络的分类效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管漏积分脉冲神经元（LIF）因效率和生物合理性被广泛使用，但缺乏对其优于其他模型的严谨论证，需验证模型复杂性与任务需求的匹配性。
AI.method: 在SpykeTorch框架中，采用STDP训练脉冲神经网络，分别在N-MNIST和DVS Gestures数据集上测试LIF、QIF、EIF模型的分类性能，并分析超参数调优需求。
AI.result: 简单数据集（N-MNIST）中三类模型性能相近但复杂模型需更多调优；富含时空特征的数据集（DVS Gestures）中QIF和EIF表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 根据数据特征复杂度选择神经元模型可提升系统性能，复杂模型在处理高维时空特征时更具优势，代码已开源。

authors_text: Leonard Bruns,Patric Jensfelt
title: SDFEst: Categorical Pose and Shape Estimation of Objects from RGB-D using Signed Distance Fields
title_zh: SDFEst：使用有符号距离场从 RGB-D 估计物体的分类姿势和形状
comment: Accepted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (and IROS 2022). Project page: https://github.com/roym899/sdfest
comments: Accepted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (and IROS 2022). Project page: https://github.com/roym899/sdfest
abstract: Rich geometric understanding of the world is an important component of many robotic applications such as planning and manipulation. In this paper, we present a modular pipeline for pose and shape estimation of objects from RGB-D images given their category. The core of our method is a generative shape model, which we integrate with a novel initialization network and a differentiable renderer to enable 6D pose and shape estimation from a single or multiple views. We investigate the use of discretized signed distance fields as an efficient shape representation for fast analysis-by-synthesis optimization. Our modular framework enables multi-view optimization and extensibility. We demonstrate the benefits of our approach over state-of-the-art methods in several experiments on both synthetic and real data. We open-source our approach at https://github.com/roym899/sdfest.
summary: Rich geometric understanding of the world is an important component of many robotic applications such as planning and manipulation. In this paper, we present a modular pipeline for pose and shape estimation of objects from RGB-D images given their category. The core of our method is a generative shape model, which we integrate with a novel initialization network and a differentiable renderer to enable 6D pose and shape estimation from a single or multiple views. We investigate the use of discretized signed distance fields as an efficient shape representation for fast analysis-by-synthesis optimization. Our modular framework enables multi-view optimization and extensibility. We demonstrate the benefits of our approach over state-of-the-art methods in several experiments on both synthetic and real data. We open-source our approach at https://github.com/roym899/sdfest.
abstract_zh: 对世界的丰富几何理解是许多机器人应用（例如规划和操纵）的重要组成部分。在本文中，我们提出了一种模块化管道，用于根据给定类别的 RGB-D 图像对对象进行姿态和形状估计。我们方法的核心是生成形状模型，我们将其与新颖的初始化网络和可微渲染器集成，以实现从单个或多个视图进行 6D 姿态和形状估计。我们研究了使用离散符号距离场作为快速分析综合优化的有效形状表示。我们的模块化框架可实现多视图优化和可扩展性。我们在合成数据和真实数据的多次实验中证明了我们的方法相对于最先进方法的优势。我们在 https://github.com/roym899/sdfest 开源了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SDFEst方法，利用符号距离场（SDF）从RGB-D图像中进行物体的6D姿态和形状估计。
AI.motivation: 几何理解对机器人应用至关重要，但现有方法在多视图优化和形状表示效率上存在不足，需更高效且可扩展的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合生成形状模型、初始化网络和可微分渲染器，采用离散化SDF作为高效形状表示，实现单/多视图的6D姿态与形状估计，并支持模块化扩展。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上优于现有方法，开源代码验证了方法的有效性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: SDFEst通过高效SDF表示和模块化框架，提升了多视图姿态-形状联合估计的性能，为相关应用提供了可扩展的解决方案。

Our modular framework enables multi-view optimization and extensibility. We demonstrate the benefits of our approach over state-of-the-art methods in several experiments on both synthetic and real data. We open-source our approach at https://github.com/roym899/sdfest. 对世界的丰富几何理解是许多机器人应用（例如规划和操纵）的重要组成部分。在本文中，我们提出了一种模块化管道，用于根据给定类别的 RGB-D 图像对对象进行姿态和形状估计。我们方法的核心是生成形状模型，我们将其与新颖的初始化网络和可微渲染器集成，以实现从单个或多个视图进行 6D 姿态和形状估计。我们研究了使用离散符号距离场作为快速分析综合优化的有效形状表示。我们的模块化框架可实现多视图优化和可扩展性。我们在合成数据和真实数据的多次实验中证明了我们的方法相对于最先进方法的优势。我们在 https://github.com/roym899/sdfest 开源了我们的方法。 本文提出SDFEst方法，利用符号距离场（SDF）从RGB-D图像中进行物体的6D姿态和形状估计。 Leonard Bruns,Patric Jensfelt cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Shao-Qun Zhang,Jia-Yi Chen,Jin-Hui Wu,Gao Zhang,Huan Xiong,Bin Gu,Zhi-Hua Zhou
title: On the Intrinsic Structures of Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 尖峰神经网络的内在结构
abstract: Recent years have emerged a surge of interest in SNNs owing to their remarkable potential to handle time-dependent and event-driven data. The performance of SNNs hinges not only on selecting an apposite architecture and fine-tuning connection weights, similar to conventional ANNs, but also on the meticulous configuration of intrinsic structures within spiking computations. However, there has been a dearth of comprehensive studies examining the impact of intrinsic structures. Consequently, developers often find it challenging to apply a standardized configuration of SNNs across diverse datasets or tasks. This work delves deep into the intrinsic structures of SNNs. Initially, we unveil two pivotal components of intrinsic structures: the integration operation and firing-reset mechanism, by elucidating their influence on the expressivity of SNNs. Furthermore, we draw two key conclusions: the membrane time hyper-parameter is intimately linked to the eigenvalues of the integration operation, dictating the functional topology of spiking dynamics, and various hyper-parameters of the firing-reset mechanism govern the overall firing capacity of an SNN, mitigating the injection ratio or sampling density of input data. These findings elucidate why the efficacy of SNNs hinges heavily on the configuration of intrinsic structures and lead to a recommendation that enhancing the adaptability of these structures contributes to improving the overall performance and applicability of SNNs. Inspired by this recognition, we propose two feasible approaches to enhance SNN learning. These involve leveraging self-connection architectures and employing stochastic spiking neurons to augment the adaptability of the integration operation and firing-reset mechanism, respectively. We verify the effectiveness of the proposed methods from perspectives of theory and practice.

The performance of SNNs hinges not only on selecting an apposite architecture and fine-tuning connection weights, similar to conventional ANNs, but also on the meticulous configuration of intrinsic structures within spiking computations. However, there has been a dearth of comprehensive studies examining the impact of intrinsic structures. Consequently, developers often find it challenging to apply a standardized configuration of SNNs across diverse datasets or tasks. This work delves deep into the intrinsic structures of SNNs. Initially, we unveil two pivotal components of intrinsic structures: the integration operation and firing-reset mechanism, by elucidating their influence on the expressivity of SNNs. Furthermore, we draw two key conclusions: the membrane time hyper-parameter is intimately linked to the eigenvalues of the integration operation, dictating the functional topology of spiking dynamics, and various hyper-parameters of the firing-reset mechanism govern the overall firing capacity of an SNN, mitigating the injection ratio or sampling density of input data. These findings elucidate why the efficacy of SNNs hinges heavily on the configuration of intrinsic structures and lead to a recommendation that enhancing the adaptability of these structures contributes to improving the overall performance and applicability of SNNs. Inspired by this recognition, we propose two feasible approaches to enhance SNN learning. These involve leveraging self-connection architectures and employing stochastic spiking neurons to augment the adaptability of the integration operation and firing-reset mechanism, respectively. We verify the effectiveness of the proposed methods from perspectives of theory and practice.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们对 SNN 的兴趣激增，因为它们在处理时间相关和事件驱动的数据方面具有巨大的潜力。 SNN 的性能不仅取决于选择合适的架构和微调连接权重（类似于传统的 ANN），还取决于尖峰计算中内在结构的细致配置。然而，缺乏对内在结构影响的全面研究。因此，开发人员经常发现在不同的数据集或任务中应用 SNN 的标准化配置具有挑战性。这项工作深入研究了 SNN 的内在结构。首先，我们通过阐明内在结构的两个关键组成部分：积分操作和触发重置机制，阐明它们对 SNN 表达能力的影响。此外，我们得出两个关键结论：膜时间超参数与积分运算的特征值密切相关，决定了尖峰动力学的功能拓扑，而发射重置机制的各种超参数控制着 SNN 的整体发射能力，减轻了输入数据的注入比或采样密度。这些发现阐明了为什么 SNN 的功效在很大程度上取决于内在结构的配置，并提出了增强这些结构的适应性有助于提高 SNN 的整体性能和适用性的建议。受这一认识的启发，我们提出了两种增强 SNN 学习的可行方法。这些涉及利用自连接架构和采用随机尖峰神经元来分别增强积分操作和触发重置机制的适应性。我们从理论和实践的角度验证了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文深入研究脉冲神经网络（SNN）的内在结构，揭示其关键组件并提出改进方法以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对SNN内在结构影响的系统分析，导致难以标准化配置SNN以适应不同任务和数据集。
AI.method: 通过解析积分操作和发放重置机制的影响，建立膜时间超参数与积分操作特征值的关联，并提出自连接架构与随机脉冲神经元以增强结构适应性。
AI.result: 理论与实验验证表明，所提方法能有效提升SNN的表达能力与数据采样适应性。
AI.conclusion: SNN性能高度依赖内在结构配置，增强其适应性是提升模型泛化能力的关键方向。

authors_text: Paweł Morawiecki,Andrii Krutsylo,Maciej Wołczyk,Marek Śmieja
title: Hebbian Continual Representation Learning
title_zh: 赫布连续表示学习
abstract: Continual Learning aims to bring machine learning into a more realistic scenario, where tasks are learned sequentially and the i.i.d. assumption is not preserved. Although this setting is natural for biological systems, it proves very difficult for machine learning models such as artificial neural networks. To reduce this performance gap, we investigate the question whether biologically inspired Hebbian learning is useful for tackling continual challenges. In particular, we highlight a realistic and often overlooked unsupervised setting, where the learner has to build representations without any supervision. By combining sparse neural networks with Hebbian learning principle, we build a simple yet effective alternative (HebbCL) to typical neural network models trained via the gradient descent. Due to Hebbian learning, the network have easily interpretable weights, which might be essential in critical application such as security or healthcare. We demonstrate the efficacy of HebbCL in an unsupervised learning setting applied to MNIST and Omniglot datasets. We also adapt the algorithm to the supervised scenario and obtain promising results in the class-incremental learning.
summary: Continual Learning aims to bring machine learning into a more realistic scenario, where tasks are learned sequentially and the i.i.d. assumption is not preserved. Although this setting is natural for biological systems, it proves very difficult for machine learning models such as artificial neural networks. To reduce this performance gap, we investigate the question whether biologically inspired Hebbian learning is useful for tackling continual challenges. In particular, we highlight a realistic and often overlooked unsupervised setting, where the learner has to build representations without any supervision. By combining sparse neural networks with Hebbian learning principle, we build a simple yet effective alternative (HebbCL) to typical neural network models trained via the gradient descent. Due to Hebbian learning, the network have easily interpretable weights, which might be essential in critical application such as security or healthcare. We demonstrate the efficacy of HebbCL in an unsupervised learning setting applied to MNIST and Omniglot datasets. We also adapt the algorithm to the supervised scenario and obtain promising results in the class-incremental learning.
abstract_zh: 持续学习旨在将机器学习带入更现实的场景，其中任务是按顺序学习的，并且 i.i.d. assumption is not preserved.尽管这种设置对于生物系统来说是很自然的，但对于人工神经网络等机器学习模型来说却非常困难。为了缩小这种表现差距，我们研究了受生物学启发的赫布学习是否有助于应对持续挑战的问题。我们特别强调了一个现实且经常被忽视的无监督环境，其中学习者必须在没有任何监督的情况下构建表示。通过将稀疏神经网络与赫布学习原理相结合，我们为通过梯度下降训练的典型神经网络模型构建了一个简单而有效的替代方案（HebbCL）。由于赫布学习，网络具有易于解释的权重，这在安全或医疗保健等关键应用中可能至关重要。我们展示了 HebbCL 在应用于 MNIST 和 Omniglot 数据集的无监督学习环境中的功效。我们还使算法适应监督场景，并在类增量学习中获得了有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Hebbian学习的持续表示学习方法HebbCL，用于解决机器学习在序列任务学习中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习模型在持续学习场景下表现不佳，而生物系统可通过Hebbian机制实现自然的序列学习，需探索其在无监督设置下的有效性。
AI.method: 结合稀疏神经网络与Hebbian学习规则，构建无需梯度下降的可解释权重更新机制，适用于无监督和监督场景。
AI.result: 在MNIST和Omniglot数据集的无监督实验中验证有效性，并在监督的类别增量学习任务中取得有竞争力的结果。
AI.conclusion: HebbCL为持续学习提供了可解释的替代方案，尤其适合安全与医疗等对模型可解释性要求较高的领域。

authors_text: Elias Ramzi,Nicolas Audebert,Nicolas Thome,Clément Rambour,Xavier Bitot
title: Hierarchical Average Precision Training for Pertinent Image Retrieval
title_zh: 相关图像检索的分层平均精度训练
abstract: Image Retrieval is commonly evaluated with Average Precision (AP) or Recall@k. Yet, those metrics, are limited to binary labels and do not take into account errors' severity. This paper introduces a new hierarchical AP training method for pertinent image retrieval (HAP-PIER). HAPPIER is based on a new H-AP metric, which leverages a concept hierarchy to refine AP by integrating errors' importance and better evaluate rankings. To train deep models with H-AP, we carefully study the problem's structure and design a smooth lower bound surrogate combined with a clustering loss that ensures consistent ordering. Extensive experiments on 6 datasets show that HAPPIER significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods for hierarchical retrieval, while being on par with the latest approaches when evaluating fine-grained ranking performances. Finally, we show that HAPPIER leads to better organization of the embedding space, and prevents most severe failure cases of non-hierarchical methods. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/elias-ramzi/HAPPIER.
summary: Image Retrieval is commonly evaluated with Average Precision (AP) or Recall@k. Yet, those metrics, are limited to binary labels and do not take into account errors' severity. Finally, we show that HAPPIER leads to better organization of the embedding space, and prevents most severe failure cases of non-hierarchical methods. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/elias-ramzi/HAPPIER.
abstract_zh: 图像检索通常使用平均精度 (AP) 或 Recall@k 进行评估。然而，这些指标仅限于二进制标签，并且不考虑错误的严重性。本文介绍了一种新的相关图像检索分层AP训练方法（HAP-PIER）。 HAPPIER 基于新的 H-AP 指标，该指标利用概念层次结构，通过整合错误的重要性并更好地评估排名来细化 AP。为了使用 H-AP 训练深度模型，我们仔细研究了问题的结构，并设计了一个平滑的下界代理，并结合了确保排序一致的聚类损失。对 6 个数据集的大量实验表明，HAPPIER 显着优于最先进的分层检索方法，同时在评估细粒度排名性能时与最新方法不相上下。最后，我们证明 HAPPIER 可以更好地组织嵌入空间，并防止非分层方法的最严重的失败情况。我们的代码公开于：https://github.com/elias-ramzi/HAPPIER。

AI.motivation: 传统的图像检索评估指标如平均精度（AP）和Recall@k，仅适用于二元标签，无法考虑错误的严重性，因此需要一种更有效的评估方法。
AI.method: 本文引入了一种新的层次平均精度（H-AP）指标，结合概念层次结构以优化排名，并设计了一种平滑的下界代理函数与聚类损失，以确保排序一致性。
AI.result: 在6个数据集上的实验表明，HAPPIER在层次检索任务上显著优于现有方法，且在细粒度排序性能上与最新方法相当。
AI.conclusion: HAPPIER能够更好地组织嵌入空间，避免非层次方法中最严重的失败情况，且代码已公开。

search_text: Hierarchical Average Precision Training for Pertinent Image Retrieval 相关图像检索的分层平均精度训练 Image Retrieval is commonly evaluated with Average Precision (AP) or Recall@k. Yet, those metrics, are limited to binary labels and do not take into account errors' severity. This paper introduces a new hierarchical AP training method for pertinent image retrieval (HAP-PIER). HAPPIER is based on a new H-AP metric, which leverages a concept hierarchy to refine AP by integrating errors' importance and better evaluate rankings. To train deep models with H-AP, we carefully study the problem's structure and design a smooth lower bound surrogate combined with a clustering loss that ensures consistent ordering. Extensive experiments on 6 datasets show that HAPPIER significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods for hierarchical retrieval, while being on par with the latest approaches when evaluating fine-grained ranking performances. Finally, we show that HAPPIER leads to better organization of the embedding space, and prevents most severe failure cases of non-hierarchical methods. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/elias-ramzi/HAPPIER. 图像检索通常使用平均精度 (AP) 或 Recall@k 进行评估。然而，这些指标仅限于二进制标签，并且不考虑错误的严重性。本文介绍了一种新的相关图像检索分层AP训练方法（HAP-PIER）。 HAPPIER 基于新的 H-AP 指标，该指标利用概念层次结构，通过整合错误的重要性并更好地评估排名来细化 AP。为了使用 H-AP 训练深度模型，我们仔细研究了问题的结构，并设计了一个平滑的下界代理，并结合了确保排序一致的聚类损失。对 6 个数据集的大量实验表明，HAPPIER 显着优于最先进的分层检索方法，同时在评估细粒度排名性能时与最新方法不相上下。最后，我们证明 HAPPIER 可以更好地组织嵌入空间，并防止非分层方法的最严重的失败情况。我们的代码公开于：https://github.com/elias-ramzi/HAPPIER。 本文提出了一种基于层次平均精度（H-AP）的训练方法，用于改进相关图像检索的性能。 Elias Ramzi,Nicolas Audebert,Nicolas Thome,Clément Rambour,Xavier Bitot cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Jelle J. Oostveen,Erik Jan van Leeuwen
title: Parameterized Complexity of Streaming Diameter and Connectivity Problems
title_zh: 流径的参数化复杂性和连通性问题
abstract: We initiate the investigation of the parameterized complexity of Diameter and Connectivity in the streaming paradigm. On the positive end, we show that knowing a vertex cover of size $k$ allows for algorithms in the Adjacency List (AL) streaming model whose number of passes is constant and memory is $O(\log n)$ for any fixed $k$. Underlying these algorithms is a method to execute a breadth-first search in $O(k)$ passes and $O(k \log n)$ bits of memory. On the negative end, we show that many other parameters lead to lower bounds in the AL model, where $Ω(n/p)$ bits of memory is needed for any $p$-pass algorithm even for constant parameter values. In particular, this holds for graphs with a known modulator (deletion set) of constant size to a graph that has no induced subgraph isomorphic to a fixed graph $H$, for most $H$. For some cases, we can also show one-pass, $Ω(n \log n)$ bits of memory lower bounds. We also prove a much stronger $Ω(n^2/p)$ lower bound for Diameter on bipartite graphs. Finally, using the insights we developed into streaming parameterized graph exploration algorithms, we show a new streaming kernelization algorithm for computing a vertex cover of size $k$. This yields a kernel of $2k$ vertices (with $O(k^2)$ edges) produced as a stream in $\text{poly}(k)$ passes and only $O(k \log n)$ bits of memory.
summary: We initiate the investigation of the parameterized complexity of Diameter and Connectivity in the streaming paradigm. On the positive end, we show that knowing a vertex cover of size $k$ allows for algorithms in the Adjacency List (AL) streaming model whose number of passes is constant and memory is $O(\log n)$ for any fixed $k$. Underlying these algorithms is a method to execute a breadth-first search in $O(k)$ passes and $O(k \log n)$ bits of memory. On the negative end, we show that many other parameters lead to lower bounds in the AL model, where $Ω(n/p)$ bits of memory is needed for any $p$-pass algorithm even for constant parameter values. In particular, this holds for graphs with a known modulator (deletion set) of constant size to a graph that has no induced subgraph isomorphic to a fixed graph $H$, for most $H$. For some cases, we can also show one-pass, $Ω(n \log n)$ bits of memory lower bounds. We also prove a much stronger $Ω(n^2/p)$ lower bound for Diameter on bipartite graphs. Finally, using the insights we developed into streaming parameterized graph exploration algorithms, we show a new streaming kernelization algorithm for computing a vertex cover of size $k$. This yields a kernel of $2k$ vertices (with $O(k^2)$ edges) produced as a stream in $\text{poly}(k)$ passes and only $O(k \log n)$ bits of memory.
abstract_zh: 我们开始研究流范式中直径和连接性的参数化复杂性。从积极的角度来看，我们表明，知道大小为 $k$ 的顶点覆盖允许邻接列表 (AL) 流模型中的算法，其传递次数是恒定的，并且对于任何固定的 $k$ ，内存为 $O(\log n)$。这些算法的基础是一种在 $O(k)$ 遍和 $O(k \log n)$ 位内存中执行广度优先搜索的方法。从消极的角度来看，我们表明许多其他参数会导致 AL 模型中的下限，其中任何 $p$-pass 算法甚至对于恒定参数值都需要 $Ω(n/p)$ 位内存。特别是，对于大多数 $H$ 来说，这适用于具有恒定大小的已知调制器（删除集）的图，以及没有与固定图 $H$ 同构的诱导子图的图。对于某些情况，我们还可以显示一次性的 $Ω(n \log n)$ 位内存下限。我们还证明二分图上直径的 $Ω(n^2/p)$ 下界更强。最后，利用我们对流参数化图探索算法开发的见解，我们展示了一种新的流内核化算法，用于计算大小为 $k$ 的顶点覆盖。这会产生一个包含 $2k$ 个顶点（具有 $O(k^2)$ 边）的内核，在 $\text{poly}(k)$ 通道中作为流生成，并且仅占用 $O(k \log n)$ 位内存。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了流式模型下直径和连通性问题的参数化复杂性，探讨了不同参数对算法效率的影响。
AI.motivation: 在流式计算场景中，传统算法难以高效处理大规模图的直径和连通性问题，需通过参数化方法寻找更优解决方案。
AI.method: 利用顶点覆盖等参数设计流式算法，结合广度优先搜索（BFS）分多轮处理；同时通过下界证明分析其他参数的局限性，并提出流式核化算法。
AI.result: 对于固定大小的顶点覆盖参数k，提出常数轮次、O(log n)内存的算法；证明其他参数需Ω(n/p)内存下界，且二分图直径问题需Ω(n²/p)下界；设计流式核化算法生成2k顶点的核。
AI.conclusion: 顶点覆盖等参数可有效提升流式图问题的处理效率，但多数其他参数存在内存限制。研究为参数化流式算法设计提供了理论框架和新方法。

authors_text: Hadi Hajieghrary,Marc Peter Deisenroth,Yasemin Bekiroglu
title: Bayesian Optimization-based Nonlinear Adaptive PID Controller Design for Robust Mobile Manipulation
title_zh: 基于贝叶斯优化的非线性自适应 PID 控制器设计用于鲁棒移动操纵
comment: Accepted to be presented at 2022 IEEE International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE 2022)
comments: Accepted to be presented at 2022 IEEE International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE 2022)
abstract: In this paper, we propose to use a nonlinear adaptive PID controller to regulate the joint variables of a mobile manipulator. The motion of the mobile base forces undue disturbances on the joint controllers of the manipulator. In designing a conventional PID controller, one should make a trade-off between the performance and agility of the closed-loop system and its stability margins. The proposed nonlinear adaptive PID controller provides a mechanism to relax the need for such a compromise by adapting the gains according to the magnitude of the error without expert tuning. Therefore, we can achieve agile performance for the system while seeing damped overshoot in the output and track the reference as close as possible, even in the presence of external disturbances and uncertainties in the modeling of the system. We have employed a Bayesian optimization approach to choose the parameters of a nonlinear adaptive PID controller to achieve the best performance in tracking the reference input and rejecting disturbances. The results demonstrate that a well-designed nonlinear adaptive PID controller can effectively regulate a mobile manipulator's joint variables while carrying an unspecified heavy load and an abrupt base movement occurs.
summary: In this paper, we propose to use a nonlinear adaptive PID controller to regulate the joint variables of a mobile manipulator. The motion of the mobile base forces undue disturbances on the joint controllers of the manipulator. In designing a conventional PID controller, one should make a trade-off between the performance and agility of the closed-loop system and its stability margins. The proposed nonlinear adaptive PID controller provides a mechanism to relax the need for such a compromise by adapting the gains according to the magnitude of the error without expert tuning. Therefore, we can achieve agile performance for the system while seeing damped overshoot in the output and track the reference as close as possible, even in the presence of external disturbances and uncertainties in the modeling of the system. We have employed a Bayesian optimization approach to choose the parameters of a nonlinear adaptive PID controller to achieve the best performance in tracking the reference input and rejecting disturbances. The results demonstrate that a well-designed nonlinear adaptive PID controller can effectively regulate a mobile manipulator's joint variables while carrying an unspecified heavy load and an abrupt base movement occurs.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们建议使用非线性自适应PID控制器来调节移动机械臂的关节变量。移动底座的运动会对机械手的关节控制器造成过度干扰。在设计传统的 PID 控制器时，应该在闭环系统的性能和敏捷性及其稳定性裕度之间进行权衡。所提出的非线性自适应 PID 控制器提供了一种机制，通过根据误差大小调整增益而无需专家调整，从而放松对这种折衷的需要。因此，即使在系统建模中存在外部干扰和不确定性的情况下，我们也可以实现系统的敏捷性能，同时看到输出中的阻尼超调并尽可能接近地跟踪参考值。我们采用贝叶斯优化方法来选择非线性自适应 PID 控制器的参数，以实现跟踪参考输入和抑制干扰的最佳性能。结果表明，精心设计的非线性自适应 PID 控制器可以有效地调节移动机械手的关节变量，同时承载未指定的重负载并发生突然的基座运动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯优化的非线性自适应PID控制器，用于提升移动机械臂在复杂工况下的鲁棒控制性能。
AI.motivation: 传统PID控制器需在系统性能与稳定性间权衡，且依赖专家调参，难以应对移动机械臂的外部干扰与模型不确定性。
AI.method: 结合非线性自适应PID控制机制与贝叶斯优化算法，通过误差自适应调整控制器增益，实现参数自动优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，该控制器在携带未知重物及突发底座运动时，可有效抑制超调并精准跟踪目标轨迹，展现强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 非线性自适应PID控制器联合贝叶斯优化方法，无需人工干预即可实现移动机械臂的高精度鲁棒控制。

search_text: Bayesian Optimization-based Nonlinear Adaptive PID Controller Design for Robust Mobile Manipulation 基于贝叶斯优化的非线性自适应 PID 控制器设计用于鲁棒移动操纵 In this paper, we propose to use a nonlinear adaptive PID controller to regulate the joint variables of a mobile manipulator. The motion of the mobile base forces undue disturbances on the joint controllers of the manipulator. In designing a conventional PID controller, one should make a trade-off between the performance and agility of the closed-loop system and its stability margins. The proposed nonlinear adaptive PID controller provides a mechanism to relax the need for such a compromise by adapting the gains according to the magnitude of the error without expert tuning. Therefore, we can achieve agile performance for the system while seeing damped overshoot in the output and track the reference as close as possible, even in the presence of external disturbances and uncertainties in the modeling of the system. We have employed a Bayesian optimization approach to choose the parameters of a nonlinear adaptive PID controller to achieve the best performance in tracking the reference input and rejecting disturbances. The results demonstrate that a well-designed nonlinear adaptive PID controller can effectively regulate a mobile manipulator's joint variables while carrying an unspecified heavy load and an abrupt base movement occurs. 在本文中，我们建议使用非线性自适应PID控制器来调节移动机械臂的关节变量。移动底座的运动会对机械手的关节控制器造成过度干扰。在设计传统的 PID 控制器时，应该在闭环系统的性能和敏捷性及其稳定性裕度之间进行权衡。所提出的非线性自适应 PID 控制器提供了一种机制，通过根据误差大小调整增益而无需专家调整，从而放松对这种折衷的需要。因此，即使在系统建模中存在外部干扰和不确定性的情况下，我们也可以实现系统的敏捷性能，同时看到输出中的阻尼超调并尽可能接近地跟踪参考值。我们采用贝叶斯优化方法来选择非线性自适应 PID 控制器的参数，以实现跟踪参考输入和抑制干扰的最佳性能。结果表明，精心设计的非线性自适应 PID 控制器可以有效地调节移动机械手的关节变量，同时承载未指定的重负载并发生突然的基座运动。 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯优化的非线性自适应PID控制器，用于提升移动机械臂在复杂工况下的鲁棒控制性能。 Hadi Hajieghrary,Marc Peter Deisenroth,Yasemin Bekiroglu cs.RO

authors_text: Jinbin Bai,Chunhui Liu,Feiyue Ni,Haofan Wang,Mengying Hu,Xiaofeng Guo,Lele Cheng
title: LaT: Latent Translation with Cycle-Consistency for Video-Text Retrieval
title_zh: LaT：用于视频文本检索的具有循环一致性的潜在翻译
abstract: Video-text retrieval is a class of cross-modal representation learning problems, where the goal is to select the video which corresponds to the text query between a given text query and a pool of candidate videos. The contrastive paradigm of vision-language pretraining has shown promising success with large-scale datasets and unified transformer architecture, and demonstrated the power of a joint latent space. Despite this, the intrinsic divergence between the visual domain and textual domain is still far from being eliminated, and projecting different modalities into a joint latent space might result in the distorting of the information inside the single modality. To overcome the above issue, we present a novel mechanism for learning the translation relationship from a source modality space $\mathcal{S}$ to a target modality space $\mathcal{T}$ without the need for a joint latent space, which bridges the gap between visual and textual domains. Furthermore, to keep cycle consistency between translations, we adopt a cycle loss involving both forward translations from $\mathcal{S}$ to the predicted target space $\mathcal{T'}$, and backward translations from $\mathcal{T'}$ back to $\mathcal{S}$. Extensive experiments conducted on MSR-VTT, MSVD, and DiDeMo datasets demonstrate the superiority and effectiveness of our LaT approach compared with vanilla state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Video-text retrieval is a class of cross-modal representation learning problems, where the goal is to select the video which corresponds to the text query between a given text query and a pool of candidate videos. The contrastive paradigm of vision-language pretraining has shown promising success with large-scale datasets and unified transformer architecture, and demonstrated the power of a joint latent space. Despite this, the intrinsic divergence between the visual domain and textual domain is still far from being eliminated, and projecting different modalities into a joint latent space might result in the distorting of the information inside the single modality. To overcome the above issue, we present a novel mechanism for learning the translation relationship from a source modality space $\mathcal{S}$ to a target modality space $\mathcal{T}$ without the need for a joint latent space, which bridges the gap between visual and textual domains. Furthermore, to keep cycle consistency between translations, we adopt a cycle loss involving both forward translations from $\mathcal{S}$ to the predicted target space $\mathcal{T'}$, and backward translations from $\mathcal{T'}$ back to $\mathcal{S}$. Extensive experiments conducted on MSR-VTT, MSVD, and DiDeMo datasets demonstrate the superiority and effectiveness of our LaT approach compared with vanilla state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 视频文本检索是一类跨模式表示学习问题，其目标是在给定文本查询和候选视频池之间选择与文本查询相对应的视频。视觉语言预训练的对比范式在大规模数据集和统一变压器架构方面取得了巨大的成功，并展示了联合潜在空间的力量。尽管如此，视觉域和文本域之间的内在分歧仍然远未消除，并且将不同的模态投射到联合潜在空间中可能会导致单一模态内的信息失真。为了克服上述问题，我们提出了一种新颖的机制，用于学习从源模态空间 $\mathcal{S}$ 到目标模态空间 $\mathcal{T}$ 的翻译关系，而不需要联合潜在空间，从而弥合了视觉域和文本域之间的差距。此外，为了保持翻译之间的循环一致性，我们采用了循环损失，涉及从 $\mathcal{S}$ 到预测目标空间 $\mathcal{T'}$ 的前向翻译，以及从 $\mathcal{T'}$ 回到 $\mathcal{S}$ 的后向翻译。在 MSR-VTT、MSVD 和 DiDeMo 数据集上进行的大量实验证明了我们的 LaT 方法与最先进的方法相比的优越性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需联合潜在空间的跨模态翻译方法LaT，通过循环一致性损失解决视频-文本检索中视觉与文本领域间的固有差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对比预训练方法虽在联合潜在空间取得进展，但视觉与文本模态间的信息扭曲问题仍未解决，直接投影到共享空间可能导致单模态信息丢失。
AI.method: 设计源模态空间到目标模态空间的翻译机制，采用包含前向翻译（S→T'）和反向翻译（T'→S）的循环损失，建立跨模态对齐关系。
AI.result: 在MSR-VTT、MSVD和DiDeMo数据集上实验表明，LaT方法在视频-文本检索任务中优于现有最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: LaT通过循环一致性翻译机制有效弥合视觉与文本模态鸿沟，在无需联合潜在空间的前提下实现了更准确的跨模态检索性能。

authors_text: David Herel,Dominika Zogatova,Matej Kripner,Tomas Mikolov
title: Emergence of Novelty in Evolutionary Algorithms
title_zh: 进化算法中新颖性的出现
abstract: One of the main problems of evolutionary algorithms is the convergence of the population to local minima. In this paper, we explore techniques that can avoid this problem by encouraging a diverse behavior of the agents through a shared reward system. The rewards are randomly distributed in the environment, and the agents are only rewarded for collecting them first. This leads to an emergence of a novel behavior of the agents. We introduce our approach to the maze problem and compare it to the previously proposed solution, denoted as Novelty Search (Lehman and Stanley, 2011a). We find that our solution leads to an improved performance while being significantly simpler. Building on that, we generalize the problem and apply our approach to a more advanced set of tasks, Atari Games, where we observe a similar performance quality with much less computational power needed.
summary: One of the main problems of evolutionary algorithms is the convergence of the population to local minima. In this paper, we explore techniques that can avoid this problem by encouraging a diverse behavior of the agents through a shared reward system. The rewards are randomly distributed in the environment, and the agents are only rewarded for collecting them first. This leads to an emergence of a novel behavior of the agents. We introduce our approach to the maze problem and compare it to the previously proposed solution, denoted as Novelty Search (Lehman and Stanley, 2011a). We find that our solution leads to an improved performance while being significantly simpler. Building on that, we generalize the problem and apply our approach to a more advanced set of tasks, Atari Games, where we observe a similar performance quality with much less computational power needed.
abstract_zh: 进化算法的主要问题之一是种群收敛到局部最小值。在本文中，我们探索了通过共享奖励系统鼓励代理多样化行为来避免此问题的技术。奖励是随机分布在环境中的，只有先收集奖励的代理才会获得奖励。这导致代理出现新的行为。我们介绍了我们解决迷宫问题的方法，并将其与之前提出的解决方案进行比较，称为新颖性搜索（Lehman 和 Stanley，2011a）。我们发现我们的解决方案可以提高性能，同时显着简化。在此基础上，我们概括了这个问题，并将我们的方法应用于一组更高级的任务，Atari Games，我们观察到类似的性能质量，而所需的计算能力要少得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过共享奖励系统促进进化算法多样性的方法，解决局部最优问题并在多个任务中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统进化算法易陷入局部最优，需通过鼓励多样化行为提升探索能力。
AI.method: 设计随机分布奖励机制，仅奖励率先收集奖励的代理，结合迷宫和Atari游戏验证方法。
AI.result: 在迷宫任务中优于Novelty Search且更简洁，在Atari游戏中以更低计算成本达到相似效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效避免局部最优，兼具性能优势和计算效率，适用于复杂任务场景。

We introduce our approach to the maze problem and compare it to the previously proposed solution, denoted as Novelty Search (Lehman and Stanley, 2011a). We find that our solution leads to an improved performance while being significantly simpler. Building on that, we generalize the problem and apply our approach to a more advanced set of tasks, Atari Games, where we observe a similar performance quality with much less computational power needed. 进化算法的主要问题之一是种群收敛到局部最小值。在本文中，我们探索了通过共享奖励系统鼓励代理多样化行为来避免此问题的技术。奖励是随机分布在环境中的，只有先收集奖励的代理才会获得奖励。这导致代理出现新的行为。我们介绍了我们解决迷宫问题的方法，并将其与之前提出的解决方案进行比较，称为新颖性搜索（Lehman 和 Stanley，2011a）。我们发现我们的解决方案可以提高性能，同时显着简化。在此基础上，我们概括了这个问题，并将我们的方法应用于一组更高级的任务，Atari Games，我们观察到类似的性能质量，而所需的计算能力要少得多。 本文提出一种通过共享奖励系统促进进化算法多样性的方法，解决局部最优问题并在多个任务中验证其有效性。 David Herel,Dominika Zogatova,Matej Kripner,Tomas Mikolov cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Aso M. Aladdin,Jaza M. Abdullah,Kazhan Othman Mohammed Salih,Tarik A. Rashid,Rafid Sagban,Abeer Alsaddon,Nebojsa Bacanin,Amit Chhabra,S. Vimal,Indradip Banerjee
title: Fitness Dependent Optimizer for IoT Healthcare using Adapted Parameters: A Case Study Implementation
title_zh: 使用适应参数的物联网医疗保健的健身相关优化器：案例研究实施
abstract: This discusses a case study on Fitness Dependent Optimizer or so-called FDO and adapting its parameters to the Internet of Things (IoT) healthcare. The reproductive way is sparked by the bee swarm and the collaborative decision-making of FDO. As opposed to the honey bee or artificial bee colony algorithms, this algorithm has no connection to them. In FDO, the search agent's position is updated using speed or velocity, but it's done differently. It creates weights based on the fitness function value of the problem, which assists lead the agents through the exploration and exploitation processes. Other algorithms are evaluated and compared to FDO as Genetic Algorithm (GA) and Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) in the original work. The key current algorithms:The Salp-Swarm Algorithms (SSA), Dragonfly Algorithm (DA), and Whale Optimization Algorithm (WOA) have been evaluated against FDO in terms of their results. Using these FDO experimental findings, we may conclude that FDO outperforms the other techniques stated. There are two primary goals for this chapter: first, the implementation of FDO will be shown step-by-step so that readers can better comprehend the algorithm method and apply FDO to solve real-world applications quickly. The second issue deals with how to tweak the FDO settings to make the meta-heuristic evolutionary algorithm better in the IoT health service system at evaluating big quantities of information. Ultimately, the target of this chapter's enhancement is to adapt the IoT healthcare framework based on FDO to spawn effective IoT healthcare applications for reasoning out real-world optimization, aggregation, prediction, segmentation, and other technological problems.
summary: This discusses a case study on Fitness Dependent Optimizer or so-called FDO and adapting its parameters to the Internet of Things (IoT) healthcare. The reproductive way is sparked by the bee swarm and the collaborative decision-making of FDO. As opposed to the honey bee or artificial bee colony algorithms, this algorithm has no connection to them. In FDO, the search agent's position is updated using speed or velocity, but it's done differently. It creates weights based on the fitness function value of the problem, which assists lead the agents through the exploration and exploitation processes. Other algorithms are evaluated and compared to FDO as Genetic Algorithm (GA) and Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) in the original work. The key current algorithms:The Salp-Swarm Algorithms (SSA), Dragonfly Algorithm (DA), and Whale Optimization Algorithm (WOA) have been evaluated against FDO in terms of their results. Using these FDO experimental findings, we may conclude that FDO outperforms the other techniques stated. There are two primary goals for this chapter: first, the implementation of FDO will be shown step-by-step so that readers can better comprehend the algorithm method and apply FDO to solve real-world applications quickly. The second issue deals with how to tweak the FDO settings to make the meta-heuristic evolutionary algorithm better in the IoT health service system at evaluating big quantities of information. Ultimately, the target of this chapter's enhancement is to adapt the IoT healthcare framework based on FDO to spawn effective IoT healthcare applications for reasoning out real-world optimization, aggregation, prediction, segmentation, and other technological problems.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了有关健身相关优化器或所谓的 FDO 的案例研究，以及如何调整其参数以适应物联网 (IoT) 医疗保健。繁殖方式是由蜂群和FDO协同决策引发的。与蜜蜂或人工蜂群算法相反，该算法与它们没有任何联系。在 FDO 中，搜索代理的位置是使用速度或速度来更新的，但做法有所不同。它根据问题的适应度函数值创建权重，这有助于引导代理完成探索和利用过程。在原始工作中，对其他算法如遗传算法 (GA) 和粒子群优化 (PSO) 进行了评估并与 FDO 进行了比较。当前的关键算法：Salp-Swarm 算法 (SSA)、Dragonfly 算法 (DA) 和 Whale Optimization 算法 (WOA) 已针对 FDO 的结果进行了评估。使用这些 FDO 实验结果，我们可以得出结论：FDO 优于所述其他技术。本章的主要目标有两个：首先，将逐步展示FDO的实现，以便读者能够更好地理解算法方法并快速应用FDO来解决实际应用。第二个问题涉及如何调整 FDO 设置，以使元启发式进化算法在物联网健康服务系统中更好地评估大量信息。最终，本章增强的目标是调整基于 FDO 的物联网医疗保健框架，以产生有效的物联网医疗保健应用程序，以解决现实世界的优化、聚合、预测、分割和其他技术问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将Fitness Dependent Optimizer（FDO）算法应用于物联网医疗健康领域，并通过调整参数优化其性能，以解决大数据处理中的优化问题。
AI.motivation: 物联网医疗健康系统需处理海量数据，传统优化算法存在效率不足问题，需开发适应性强的新型优化方法以提升数据处理能力。
AI.method: 基于蜂群协作机制设计FDO算法，通过适应度函数动态生成权重引导搜索代理，结合速度更新机制实现探索与开发平衡，并与GA、PSO等经典算法进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验验证FDO在收敛速度、精度等指标上优于Salp-Swarm、Dragonfly等对比算法，有效解决了医疗数据优化、预测等实际问题。
AI.conclusion: FDO算法通过参数自适应调整可显著提升物联网医疗系统的优化效率，为复杂医疗数据分析提供可行的智能优化解决方案。

authors_text: Ibrahim Aliyu,Selinde van Engelenburg,Muhammed Bashir Muazu,Jinsul Kim,Chang Gyoon Lim
title: Statistical Detection of Adversarial examples in Blockchain-based Federated Forest In-vehicle Network Intrusion Detection Systems
title_zh: 基于区块链的联邦森林车载网络入侵检测系统中对抗样本的统计检测
abstract: The internet-of-Vehicle (IoV) can facilitate seamless connectivity between connected vehicles (CV), autonomous vehicles (AV), and other IoV entities. Intrusion Detection Systems (IDSs) for IoV networks can rely on machine learning (ML) to protect the in-vehicle network from cyber-attacks. Blockchain-based Federated Forests (BFFs) could be used to train ML models based on data from IoV entities while protecting the confidentiality of the data and reducing the risks of tampering with the data. However, ML models created this way are still vulnerable to evasion, poisoning, and exploratory attacks using adversarial examples. This paper investigates the impact of various possible adversarial examples on the BFF-IDS. We proposed integrating a statistical detector to detect and extract unknown adversarial samples. By including the unknown detected samples into the dataset of the detector, we augment the BFF-IDS with an additional model to detect original known attacks and the new adversarial inputs. The statistical adversarial detector confidently detected adversarial examples at the sample size of 50 and 100 input samples. Furthermore, the augmented BFF-IDS (BFF-IDS(AUG)) successfully mitigates the adversarial examples with more than 96% accuracy. With this approach, the model will continue to be augmented in a sandbox whenever an adversarial sample is detected and subsequently adopt the BFF-IDS(AUG) as the active security model. Consequently, the proposed integration of the statistical adversarial detector and the subsequent augmentation of the BFF-IDS with detected adversarial samples provides a sustainable security framework against adversarial examples and other unknown attacks.
summary: The internet-of-Vehicle (IoV) can facilitate seamless connectivity between connected vehicles (CV), autonomous vehicles (AV), and other IoV entities. Intrusion Detection Systems (IDSs) for IoV networks can rely on machine learning (ML) to protect the in-vehicle network from cyber-attacks. Blockchain-based Federated Forests (BFFs) could be used to train ML models based on data from IoV entities while protecting the confidentiality of the data and reducing the risks of tampering with the data. However, ML models created this way are still vulnerable to evasion, poisoning, and exploratory attacks using adversarial examples. This paper investigates the impact of various possible adversarial examples on the BFF-IDS. We proposed integrating a statistical detector to detect and extract unknown adversarial samples. By including the unknown detected samples into the dataset of the detector, we augment the BFF-IDS with an additional model to detect original known attacks and the new adversarial inputs. The statistical adversarial detector confidently detected adversarial examples at the sample size of 50 and 100 input samples. Furthermore, the augmented BFF-IDS (BFF-IDS(AUG)) successfully mitigates the adversarial examples with more than 96% accuracy. With this approach, the model will continue to be augmented in a sandbox whenever an adversarial sample is detected and subsequently adopt the BFF-IDS(AUG) as the active security model. Consequently, the proposed integration of the statistical adversarial detector and the subsequent augmentation of the BFF-IDS with detected adversarial samples provides a sustainable security framework against adversarial examples and other unknown attacks.
abstract_zh: 车联网 (IoV) 可以促进联网车辆 (CV)、自动驾驶车辆 (AV) 和其他车联网实体之间的无缝连接。 IoV 网络的入侵检测系统 (IDS) 可以依靠机器学习 (ML) 来保护车载网络免受网络攻击。基于区块链的联邦森林（BFF）可用于基于车联网实体的数据训练机器学习模型，同时保护数据的机密性并降低篡改数据的风险。然而，以这种方式创建的机器学习模型仍然容易受到使用对抗性示例的规避、中毒和探索性攻击。本文研究了各种可能的对抗性示例对 BFF-IDS 的影响。我们建议集成统计检测器来检测和提取未知的对抗样本。通过将检测到的未知样本包含到检测器的数据集中，我们使用附加模型来增强 BFF-IDS，以检测原始已知攻击和新的对抗性输入。统计对抗性检测器在 50 和 100 个输入样本的样本量下自信地检测到对抗性示例。此外，增强型 BFF-IDS (BFF-IDS(AUG)) 成功缓解了对抗性示例，准确率超过 96%。通过这种方法，每当检测到对抗样本时，模型将继续在沙箱中增强，并随后采用 BFF-IDS(AUG) 作为主动安全模型。因此，所提议的统计对抗性检测器的集成以及随后用检测到的对抗性样本增强 BFF-IDS 提供了针对对抗性示例和其他未知攻击的可持续安全框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于统计检测器的区块链联邦森林（BFF）入侵检测系统，用于识别和缓解车联网中的对抗样本攻击。
AI.motivation: 区块链联邦森林（BFF）虽能保护车联网数据隐私，但其机器学习模型仍易受对抗样本攻击，需增强系统对未知攻击的检测能力。
AI.method: 通过集成统计检测器识别对抗样本，并将检测到的样本纳入训练集以扩充BFF-IDS，形成增强型模型BFF-IDS(AUG)。
AI.result: 统计检测器在50至100个样本规模下可有效检测对抗样本，增强后的系统对对抗样本的缓解准确率超过96%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过动态扩充模型和沙箱机制，为车联网提供了可持续的对抗样本防御框架。

However, ML models created this way are still vulnerable to evasion, poisoning, and exploratory attacks using adversarial examples. This paper investigates the impact of various possible adversarial examples on the BFF-IDS. We proposed integrating a statistical detector to detect and extract unknown adversarial samples. By including the unknown detected samples into the dataset of the detector, we augment the BFF-IDS with an additional model to detect original known attacks and the new adversarial inputs. The statistical adversarial detector confidently detected adversarial examples at the sample size of 50 and 100 input samples. Furthermore, the augmented BFF-IDS (BFF-IDS(AUG)) successfully mitigates the adversarial examples with more than 96% accuracy. With this approach, the model will continue to be augmented in a sandbox whenever an adversarial sample is detected and subsequently adopt the BFF-IDS(AUG) as the active security model. Consequently, the proposed integration of the statistical adversarial detector and the subsequent augmentation of the BFF-IDS with detected adversarial samples provides a sustainable security framework against adversarial examples and other unknown attacks. 车联网 (IoV) 可以促进联网车辆 (CV)、自动驾驶车辆 (AV) 和其他车联网实体之间的无缝连接。 IoV 网络的入侵检测系统 (IDS) 可以依靠机器学习 (ML) 来保护车载网络免受网络攻击。基于区块链的联邦森林（BFF）可用于基于车联网实体的数据训练机器学习模型，同时保护数据的机密性并降低篡改数据的风险。然而，以这种方式创建的机器学习模型仍然容易受到使用对抗性示例的规避、中毒和探索性攻击。本文研究了各种可能的对抗性示例对 BFF-IDS 的影响。我们建议集成统计检测器来检测和提取未知的对抗样本。通过将检测到的未知样本包含到检测器的数据集中，我们使用附加模型来增强 BFF-IDS，以检测原始已知攻击和新的对抗性输入。统计对抗性检测器在 50 和 100 个输入样本的样本量下自信地检测到对抗性示例。此外，增强型 BFF-IDS (BFF-IDS(AUG)) 成功缓解了对抗性示例，准确率超过 96%。通过这种方法，每当检测到对抗样本时，模型将继续在沙箱中增强，并随后采用 BFF-IDS(AUG) 作为主动安全模型。因此，所提议的统计对抗性检测器的集成以及随后用检测到的对抗性样本增强 BFF-IDS 提供了针对对抗性示例和其他未知攻击的可持续安全框架。 本文提出了一种基于统计检测器的区块链联邦森林（BFF）入侵检测系统，用于识别和缓解车联网中的对抗样本攻击。 Ibrahim Aliyu,Selinde van Engelenburg,Muhammed Bashir Muazu,Jinsul Kim,Chang Gyoon Lim cs.CR,cs.AI

authors_text: Sarina Meyer,Florian Lux,Pavel Denisov,Julia Koch,Pascal Tilli,Ngoc Thang Vu
title: Speaker Anonymization with Phonetic Intermediate Representations
title_zh: 使用语音中间表示的说话人匿名化
abstract: In this work, we propose a speaker anonymization pipeline that leverages high quality automatic speech recognition and synthesis systems to generate speech conditioned on phonetic transcriptions and anonymized speaker embeddings. Using phones as the intermediate representation ensures near complete elimination of speaker identity information from the input while preserving the original phonetic content as much as possible. Our experimental results on LibriSpeech and VCTK corpora reveal two key findings: 1) although automatic speech recognition produces imperfect transcriptions, our neural speech synthesis system can handle such errors, making our system feasible and robust, and 2) combining speaker embeddings from different resources is beneficial and their appropriate normalization is crucial. Overall, our final best system outperforms significantly the baselines provided in the Voice Privacy Challenge 2020 in terms of privacy robustness against a lazy-informed attacker while maintaining high intelligibility and naturalness of the anonymized speech.
summary: In this work, we propose a speaker anonymization pipeline that leverages high quality automatic speech recognition and synthesis systems to generate speech conditioned on phonetic transcriptions and anonymized speaker embeddings. Using phones as the intermediate representation ensures near complete elimination of speaker identity information from the input while preserving the original phonetic content as much as possible. Our experimental results on LibriSpeech and VCTK corpora reveal two key findings: 1) although automatic speech recognition produces imperfect transcriptions, our neural speech synthesis system can handle such errors, making our system feasible and robust, and 2) combining speaker embeddings from different resources is beneficial and their appropriate normalization is crucial. Overall, our final best system outperforms significantly the baselines provided in the Voice Privacy Challenge 2020 in terms of privacy robustness against a lazy-informed attacker while maintaining high intelligibility and naturalness of the anonymized speech.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种说话人匿名化管道，它利用高质量的自动语音识别和合成系统来生成以语音转录和匿名说话人嵌入为条件的语音。使用音素作为中间表示可确保从输入中几乎完全消除说话者身份信息，同时尽可能保留原始语音内容。我们在 LibriSpeech 和 VCTK 语料库上的实验结果揭示了两个关键发现：1）尽管自动语音识别会产生不完美的转录，但我们的神经语音合成系统可以处理此类错误，使我们的系统可行且稳健；2）组合来自不同资源的说话者嵌入是有益的，并且它们适当的标准化至关重要。总体而言，我们最终的最佳系统在针对懒惰攻击者的隐私稳健性方面显着优于 2020 年语音隐私挑战赛中提供的基准，同时保持匿名语音的高清晰度和自然度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于音素中间表示的说话人匿名化方法，通过结合自动语音识别与合成技术，在消除说话人身份信息的同时保留语音内容。
AI.motivation: 现有匿名化技术难以在隐私保护与语音自然性间取得平衡，需探索更稳健的中间表示以兼顾信息保留与身份隐藏。
AI.method: 利用高质量ASR生成音素转录，结合匿名化说话人嵌入并通过神经语音合成系统生成最终语音，采用跨资源嵌入融合与归一化策略提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech和VCTK数据集上验证系统有效性，证明其可处理ASR错误并优于Voice Privacy Challenge 2020基线，在隐私性与可懂度间取得更好平衡。
AI.conclusion: 音素中间表示为说话人匿名化提供有效路径，嵌入融合策略与归一化处理对提升系统性能至关重要，未来可进一步优化多模态隐私保护方案。

authors_text: Rodrigo Simas,Luis Sa-Couto,Andreas Wichert
title: Classification and Generation of real-world data with an Associative Memory Model
title_zh: 使用关联记忆模型对现实世界数据进行分类和生成
abstract: Drawing from memory the face of a friend you have not seen in years is a difficult task. However, if you happen to cross paths, you would easily recognize each other. The biological memory is equipped with an impressive compression algorithm that can store the essential, and then infer the details to match perception. The Willshaw Memory is a simple abstract model for cortical computations which implements mechanisms of biological memories. Using our recently proposed sparse coding prescription for visual patterns, this model can store and retrieve an impressive amount of real-world data in a fault-tolerant manner. In this paper, we extend the capabilities of the basic Associative Memory Model by using a Multiple-Modality framework. In this setting, the memory stores several modalities (e.g., visual, or textual) of each pattern simultaneously. After training, the memory can be used to infer missing modalities when just a subset is perceived. Using a simple encoder-memory-decoder architecture, and a newly proposed iterative retrieval algorithm for the Willshaw Model, we perform experiments on the MNIST dataset. By storing both the images and labels as modalities, a single Memory can be used not only to retrieve and complete patterns but also to classify and generate new ones. We further discuss how this model could be used for other learning tasks, thus serving as a biologically-inspired framework for learning.
summary: Drawing from memory the face of a friend you have not seen in years is a difficult task. However, if you happen to cross paths, you would easily recognize each other. The biological memory is equipped with an impressive compression algorithm that can store the essential, and then infer the details to match perception. The Willshaw Memory is a simple abstract model for cortical computations which implements mechanisms of biological memories. Using our recently proposed sparse coding prescription for visual patterns, this model can store and retrieve an impressive amount of real-world data in a fault-tolerant manner. In this paper, we extend the capabilities of the basic Associative Memory Model by using a Multiple-Modality framework. In this setting, the memory stores several modalities (e.g., visual, or textual) of each pattern simultaneously. After training, the memory can be used to infer missing modalities when just a subset is perceived. Using a simple encoder-memory-decoder architecture, and a newly proposed iterative retrieval algorithm for the Willshaw Model, we perform experiments on the MNIST dataset. By storing both the images and labels as modalities, a single Memory can be used not only to retrieve and complete patterns but also to classify and generate new ones. We further discuss how this model could be used for other learning tasks, thus serving as a biologically-inspired framework for learning.
abstract_zh: 凭记忆画出多年未见的朋友的面孔是一项艰巨的任务。然而，如果你们碰巧相遇，你们很容易认出对方。生物记忆配备了令人印象深刻的压缩算法，可以存储必要的信息，然后推断细节以匹配感知。 Willshaw Memory 是一个用于皮层计算的简单抽象模型，它实现了生物记忆机制。使用我们最近提出的视觉模式稀疏编码方案，该模型可以以容错方式存储和检索大量现实世界数据。在本文中，我们通过使用多模态框架扩展了基本联想记忆模型的功能。在这种设置中，存储器同时存储每个模式的多种模式（例如，视觉或文本）。训练后，当仅感知到一个子集时，内存可用于推断缺失的模态。使用简单的编码器-内存-解码器架构以及新提出的 Willshaw 模型迭代检索算法，我们在 MNIST 数据集上进行实验。通过将图像和标签存储为模态，单个内存不仅可以用于检索和完成模式，还可以用于分类和生成新模式。我们进一步讨论如何将该模型用于其他学习任务，从而作为受生物学启发的学习框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于联想记忆模型的多模态框架，用于分类和生成真实世界数据。
AI.motivation: 受生物记忆机制启发，旨在解决数据存储与检索问题，通过多模态框架提升模型在部分数据缺失时的推理能力。
AI.method: 采用编码器-记忆-解码器架构，结合改进的迭代检索算法，利用Willshaw模型在MNIST数据集上存储图像与标签模态。
AI.result: 模型可完成模式检索、补全、分类及生成任务，并展示出在其他学习任务中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该生物启发框架有效实现了多模态数据处理，为联想记忆模型在复杂任务中的应用提供了新方向。
