authors_text: Antoine Legrand,Benoît Macq,Christophe De Vleeschouwer
title: Forward Error Correction applied to JPEG-XS codestreams
title_zh: 应用于 JPEG-XS 码流的前向纠错
abstract: JPEG-XS offers low complexity image compression for applications with constrained but reasonable bit-rate, and low latency. Our paper explores the deployment of JPEG-XS on lossy packet networks. To preserve low latency, Forward Error Correction (FEC) is envisioned as the protection mechanism of interest. Despite the JPEG-XS codestream is not scalable in essence, we observe that the loss of a codestream fraction impacts the decoded image quality differently, depending on whether this codestream fraction corresponds to codestream headers, to coefficients significance information, or to low/high frequency data, respectively. Hence, we propose a rate-distortion optimal unequal error protection scheme that adapts the redundancy level of Reed-Solomon codes according to the rate of channel losses and the type of information protected by the code. Our experiments demonstrate that, at 5% loss rates, it reduces the Mean Squared Error by up to 92% and 65%, compared to a transmission without and with optimal but equal protection, respectively.
summary: JPEG-XS offers low complexity image compression for applications with constrained but reasonable bit-rate, and low latency. Our paper explores the deployment of JPEG-XS on lossy packet networks. To preserve low latency, Forward Error Correction (FEC) is envisioned as the protection mechanism of interest. Despite the JPEG-XS codestream is not scalable in essence, we observe that the loss of a codestream fraction impacts the decoded image quality differently, depending on whether this codestream fraction corresponds to codestream headers, to coefficients significance information, or to low/high frequency data, respectively. Hence, we propose a rate-distortion optimal unequal error protection scheme that adapts the redundancy level of Reed-Solomon codes according to the rate of channel losses and the type of information protected by the code. Our experiments demonstrate that, at 5% loss rates, it reduces the Mean Squared Error by up to 92% and 65%, compared to a transmission without and with optimal but equal protection, respectively.
abstract_zh: JPEG-XS 为具有受限但合理比特率和低延迟的应用程序提供低复杂性图像压缩。我们的论文探讨了 JPEG-XS 在有损数据包网络上的部署。为了保持低延迟，前向纠错 (FEC) 被设想为重要的保护机制。尽管 JPEG-XS 码流本质上是不可扩展的，但我们观察到码流部分的丢失对解码图像质量的影响不同，具体取决于该码流部分是否分别对应于码流标头、系数重要性信息或低频/高频数据。因此，我们提出了一种速率失真最优不等差错保护方案，该方案根据信道丢失率和代码保护的信息类型来调整里德所罗门码的冗余级别。我们的实验表明，在 5% 的丢失率下，与没有和有最佳但同等保护的传输相比，均方误差分别降低了 92% 和 65%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究将前向纠错（FEC）应用于JPEG-XS码流，以在丢包网络中提升图像传输质量。
AI.motivation: JPEG-XS适用于低延迟和有限带宽场景，但其码流对丢包敏感。不同码流部分（如头信息、系数显著性、高低频数据）丢失对图像质量影响不同，需差异化保护。
AI.method: 提出基于率失真优化的非均匀错误保护方案，根据信道丢包率和保护数据类型动态调整里德-所罗门码的冗余度。
AI.result: 在5%丢包率下，该方案相比无保护和等保护方案分别将均方误差降低92%和65%。
AI.conclusion: 通过差异化冗余分配，可有效提升JPEG-XS在丢包网络中的鲁棒性，验证了非均匀保护方案的优越性。

search_text: Forward Error Correction applied to JPEG-XS codestreams 应用于 JPEG-XS 码流的前向纠错 JPEG-XS offers low complexity image compression for applications with constrained but reasonable bit-rate, and low latency. Our paper explores the deployment of JPEG-XS on lossy packet networks. To preserve low latency, Forward Error Correction (FEC) is envisioned as the protection mechanism of interest. Despite the JPEG-XS codestream is not scalable in essence, we observe that the loss of a codestream fraction impacts the decoded image quality differently, depending on whether this codestream fraction corresponds to codestream headers, to coefficients significance information, or to low/high frequency data, respectively. Hence, we propose a rate-distortion optimal unequal error protection scheme that adapts the redundancy level of Reed-Solomon codes according to the rate of channel losses and the type of information protected by the code. Our experiments demonstrate that, at 5% loss rates, it reduces the Mean Squared Error by up to 92% and 65%, compared to a transmission without and with optimal but equal protection, respectively. JPEG-XS 为具有受限但合理比特率和低延迟的应用程序提供低复杂性图像压缩。我们的论文探讨了 JPEG-XS 在有损数据包网络上的部署。为了保持低延迟，前向纠错 (FEC) 被设想为重要的保护机制。尽管 JPEG-XS 码流本质上是不可扩展的，但我们观察到码流部分的丢失对解码图像质量的影响不同，具体取决于该码流部分是否分别对应于码流标头、系数重要性信息或低频/高频数据。因此，我们提出了一种速率失真最优不等差错保护方案，该方案根据信道丢失率和代码保护的信息类型来调整里德所罗门码的冗余级别。我们的实验表明，在 5% 的丢失率下，与没有和有最佳但同等保护的传输相比，均方误差分别降低了 92% 和 65%。 本文研究将前向纠错（FEC）应用于JPEG-XS码流，以在丢包网络中提升图像传输质量。 Antoine Legrand,Benoît Macq,Christophe De Vleeschouwer eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.NI

authors_text: Varun Ojha,Jon Timmis,Giuseppe Nicosia
title: Assessing Ranking and Effectiveness of Evolutionary Algorithm Hyperparameters Using Global Sensitivity Analysis Methodologies
title_zh: 使用全局敏感性分析方法评估进化算法超参数的排名和有效性
abstract: We present a comprehensive global sensitivity analysis of two single-objective and two multi-objective state-of-the-art global optimization evolutionary algorithms as an algorithm configuration problem. That is, we investigate the quality of influence hyperparameters have on the performance of algorithms in terms of their direct effect and interaction effect with other hyperparameters. Using three sensitivity analysis methods, Morris LHS, Morris, and Sobol, to systematically analyze tunable hyperparameters of covariance matrix adaptation evolutionary strategy, differential evolution, non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm III, and multi-objective evolutionary algorithm based on decomposition, the framework reveals the behaviors of hyperparameters to sampling methods and performance metrics. That is, it answers questions like what hyperparameters influence patterns, how they interact, how much they interact, and how much their direct influence is. Consequently, the ranking of hyperparameters suggests their order of tuning, and the pattern of influence reveals the stability of the algorithms.
summary: We present a comprehensive global sensitivity analysis of two single-objective and two multi-objective state-of-the-art global optimization evolutionary algorithms as an algorithm configuration problem. That is, we investigate the quality of influence hyperparameters have on the performance of algorithms in terms of their direct effect and interaction effect with other hyperparameters. Using three sensitivity analysis methods, Morris LHS, Morris, and Sobol, to systematically analyze tunable hyperparameters of covariance matrix adaptation evolutionary strategy, differential evolution, non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm III, and multi-objective evolutionary algorithm based on decomposition, the framework reveals the behaviors of hyperparameters to sampling methods and performance metrics. That is, it answers questions like what hyperparameters influence patterns, how they interact, how much they interact, and how much their direct influence is. Consequently, the ranking of hyperparameters suggests their order of tuning, and the pattern of influence reveals the stability of the algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们将两种单目标和两种多目标最先进的全局优化进化算法作为算法配置问题进行全面的全局敏感性分析。也就是说，我们从超参数的直接影响和与其他超参数的交互影响方面研究超参数对算法性能的影响质量。该框架采用Morris LHS、Morris和Sobol三种敏感性分析方法，系统地分析了协方差矩阵自适应进化策略、差分进化、非支配排序遗传算法Ⅲ和基于分解的多目标进化算法的可调超参数，揭示了超参数对采样方法和性能指标的影响。也就是说，它回答了哪些超参数影响模式、它们如何相互作用、它们相互作用的程度以及它们的直接影响有多大等问题。因此，超参数的排名表明了它们的调整顺序，影响模式揭示了算法的稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过全局敏感性分析方法，评估两种单目标和两种多目标进化算法的超参数对算法性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 超参数调优对进化算法性能至关重要，但现有研究缺乏对超参数直接效应和交互效应的系统分析。
AI.method: 采用Morris LHS、Morris和Sobol三种敏感性分析方法，分析CMA-ES、差分进化、NSGA-III和MOEA/D四种算法的超参数。
AI.result: 确定了各算法关键超参数的排名，揭示了超参数间的交互作用模式及算法稳定性差异。
AI.conclusion: 敏感性分析为进化算法的超参数调优提供了理论依据，明确了不同算法的参数调整优先级。

authors_text: Jun Wang,Abhir Bhalerao,Yulan He
title: Cross-modal Prototype Driven Network for Radiology Report Generation
title_zh: 用于生成放射学报告的跨模式原型驱动网络
abstract: Radiology report generation (RRG) aims to describe automatically a radiology image with human-like language and could potentially support the work of radiologists, reducing the burden of manual reporting. Previous approaches often adopt an encoder-decoder architecture and focus on single-modal feature learning, while few studies explore cross-modal feature interaction. Here we propose a Cross-modal PROtotype driven NETwork (XPRONET) to promote cross-modal pattern learning and exploit it to improve the task of radiology report generation. This is achieved by three well-designed, fully differentiable and complementary modules: a shared cross-modal prototype matrix to record the cross-modal prototypes; a cross-modal prototype network to learn the cross-modal prototypes and embed the cross-modal information into the visual and textual features; and an improved multi-label contrastive loss to enable and enhance multi-label prototype learning. XPRONET obtains substantial improvements on the IU-Xray and MIMIC-CXR benchmarks, where its performance exceeds recent state-of-the-art approaches by a large margin on IU-Xray and comparable performance on MIMIC-CXR.
summary: Radiology report generation (RRG) aims to describe automatically a radiology image with human-like language and could potentially support the work of radiologists, reducing the burden of manual reporting. Previous approaches often adopt an encoder-decoder architecture and focus on single-modal feature learning, while few studies explore cross-modal feature interaction. Here we propose a Cross-modal PROtotype driven NETwork (XPRONET) to promote cross-modal pattern learning and exploit it to improve the task of radiology report generation. This is achieved by three well-designed, fully differentiable and complementary modules: a shared cross-modal prototype matrix to record the cross-modal prototypes; a cross-modal prototype network to learn the cross-modal prototypes and embed the cross-modal information into the visual and textual features; and an improved multi-label contrastive loss to enable and enhance multi-label prototype learning. XPRONET obtains substantial improvements on the IU-Xray and MIMIC-CXR benchmarks, where its performance exceeds recent state-of-the-art approaches by a large margin on IU-Xray and comparable performance on MIMIC-CXR.
abstract_zh: 放射学报告生成（RRG）旨在用类似人类的语言自动描述放射学图像，并有可能支持放射科医生的工作，减轻手动报告的负担。以前的方法通常采用编码器-解码器架构并专注于单模态特征学习，而很少有研究探索跨模态特征交互。在这里，我们提出了一个跨模态原型驱动网络（XPRONET）来促进跨模态模式学习并利用它来改进放射学报告生成的任务。这是通过三个精心设计、完全可微且互补的模块来实现的：共享的跨模态原型矩阵，用于记录跨模态原型；跨模态原型网络，用于学习跨模态原型并将跨模态信息嵌入到视觉和文本特征中；以及改进的多标签对比损失，以启用和增强多标签原型学习。 XPRONET 在 IU-Xray 和 MIMIC-CXR 基准上获得了实质性改进，其性能在 IU-Xray 上大大超过了最新的最先进方法，在 MIMIC-CXR 上的性能也相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨模态原型驱动网络（XPRONET），通过增强图像与文本间的跨模态特征交互，提升放射科报告生成的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多采用单模态特征学习，忽视图像与文本间的跨模态交互，限制了报告生成的准确性和自然性。
AI.method: 设计三个模块：1) 共享跨模态原型矩阵存储跨模态原型；2) 跨模态原型网络学习原型并融合多模态信息；3) 改进的多标签对比损失优化原型学习。
AI.result: 在IU-Xray和MIMIC-CXR数据集上，XPRONET在IU-Xray上显著超越现有方法，在MIMIC-CXR上表现相当。
AI.conclusion: XPRONET通过有效建模跨模态关系，为放射科报告生成提供了新思路，未来可扩展至其他多模态医疗任务。

Previous approaches often adopt an encoder-decoder architecture and focus on single-modal feature learning, while few studies explore cross-modal feature interaction. Here we propose a Cross-modal PROtotype driven NETwork (XPRONET) to promote cross-modal pattern learning and exploit it to improve the task of radiology report generation. This is achieved by three well-designed, fully differentiable and complementary modules: a shared cross-modal prototype matrix to record the cross-modal prototypes; a cross-modal prototype network to learn the cross-modal prototypes and embed the cross-modal information into the visual and textual features; and an improved multi-label contrastive loss to enable and enhance multi-label prototype learning. XPRONET obtains substantial improvements on the IU-Xray and MIMIC-CXR benchmarks, where its performance exceeds recent state-of-the-art approaches by a large margin on IU-Xray and comparable performance on MIMIC-CXR. 放射学报告生成（RRG）旨在用类似人类的语言自动描述放射学图像，并有可能支持放射科医生的工作，减轻手动报告的负担。以前的方法通常采用编码器-解码器架构并专注于单模态特征学习，而很少有研究探索跨模态特征交互。在这里，我们提出了一个跨模态原型驱动网络（XPRONET）来促进跨模态模式学习并利用它来改进放射学报告生成的任务。这是通过三个精心设计、完全可微且互补的模块来实现的：共享的跨模态原型矩阵，用于记录跨模态原型；跨模态原型网络，用于学习跨模态原型并将跨模态信息嵌入到视觉和文本特征中；以及改进的多标签对比损失，以启用和增强多标签原型学习。 XPRONET 在 IU-Xray 和 MIMIC-CXR 基准上获得了实质性改进，其性能在 IU-Xray 上大大超过了最新的最先进方法，在 MIMIC-CXR 上的性能也相当。 本文提出一种跨模态原型驱动网络（XPRONET），通过增强图像与文本间的跨模态特征交互，提升放射科报告生成的性能。 Jun Wang,Abhir Bhalerao,Yulan He cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Javier Galbally,Julian Fierrez-Aguilar,Joaquin Rodriguez-Gonzalez,Fernando Alonso-Fernandez,Javier Ortega-Garcia,Marino Tapiador
title: On the vulnerability of fingerprint verification systems to fake fingerprint attacks
title_zh: 指纹验证系统对假指纹攻击的脆弱性研究
comment: Published at IEEE International Carnahan Conference on Security Technology (ICCST)
comments: Published at IEEE International Carnahan Conference on Security Technology (ICCST)
abstract: A new method to generate gummy fingers is presented. A medium-size fake fingerprint database is described and two different fingerprint verification systems are evaluated on it. Three different scenarios are considered in the experiments, namely: enrollment and test with real fingerprints, enrollment and test with fake fingerprints, and enrollment with real fingerprints and test with fake fingerprints. Results for an optical and a thermal sweeping sensors are given. Both systems are shown to be vulnerable to direct attacks.
summary: A new method to generate gummy fingers is presented. A medium-size fake fingerprint database is described and two different fingerprint verification systems are evaluated on it. Three different scenarios are considered in the experiments, namely: enrollment and test with real fingerprints, enrollment and test with fake fingerprints, and enrollment with real fingerprints and test with fake fingerprints. Results for an optical and a thermal sweeping sensors are given. Both systems are shown to be vulnerable to direct attacks.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种生成软糖手指的新方法。描述了一个中等规模的假指纹数据库，并在其上评估了两种不同的指纹验证系统。实验中考虑了三种不同的场景，即：真实指纹注册和测试、假指纹注册和测试、真实指纹注册和假指纹测试。给出了光学和热扫描传感器的结果。这两个系统都被证明容易受到直接攻击。

AI.tldr: 研究指纹验证系统在假指纹攻击下的脆弱性，并评估两种系统的安全性
AI.motivation: 揭示现有指纹验证系统在面对假指纹攻击时的潜在安全漏洞，以推动更安全的生物识别技术发展
AI.method: 提出生成假指纹的新方法，构建中等规模假指纹数据库，并通过三种实验场景评估光学和热扫描传感器的指纹验证系统
AI.result: 实验结果显示，光学和热扫描传感器的指纹验证系统在直接假指纹攻击下均存在显著的安全漏洞
AI.conclusion: 两种主流指纹验证系统均易受直接假指纹攻击，需进一步提升生物识别技术的抗攻击能力

authors_text: Kristoffer Knutsen Wickstrøm,Eirik Agnalt Østmo,Keyur Radiya,Karl Øyvind Mikalsen,Michael Christian Kampffmeyer,Robert Jenssen
title: A clinically motivated self-supervised approach for content-based image retrieval of CT liver images
title_zh: 一种基于临床动机的自我监督方法，用于 CT 肝脏图像的基于内容的图像检索
abstract: Deep learning-based approaches for content-based image retrieval (CBIR) of CT liver images is an active field of research, but suffers from some critical limitations. First, they are heavily reliant on labeled data, which can be challenging and costly to acquire. Second, they lack transparency and explainability, which limits the trustworthiness of deep CBIR systems. We address these limitations by (1) proposing a self-supervised learning framework that incorporates domain-knowledge into the training procedure and (2) providing the first representation learning explainability analysis in the context of CBIR of CT liver images. Results demonstrate improved performance compared to the standard self-supervised approach across several metrics, as well as improved generalisation across datasets. Further, we conduct the first representation learning explainability analysis in the context of CBIR, which reveals new insights into the feature extraction process. Lastly, we perform a case study with cross-examination CBIR that demonstrates the usability of our proposed framework. We believe that our proposed framework could play a vital role in creating trustworthy deep CBIR systems that can successfully take advantage of unlabeled data.
summary: Deep learning-based approaches for content-based image retrieval (CBIR) of CT liver images is an active field of research, but suffers from some critical limitations. First, they are heavily reliant on labeled data, which can be challenging and costly to acquire. Second, they lack transparency and explainability, which limits the trustworthiness of deep CBIR systems. We address these limitations by (1) proposing a self-supervised learning framework that incorporates domain-knowledge into the training procedure and (2) providing the first representation learning explainability analysis in the context of CBIR of CT liver images. Results demonstrate improved performance compared to the standard self-supervised approach across several metrics, as well as improved generalisation across datasets. Further, we conduct the first representation learning explainability analysis in the context of CBIR, which reveals new insights into the feature extraction process. Lastly, we perform a case study with cross-examination CBIR that demonstrates the usability of our proposed framework. We believe that our proposed framework could play a vital role in creating trustworthy deep CBIR systems that can successfully take advantage of unlabeled data.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的 CT 肝脏图像基于内容的图像检索 (CBIR) 方法是一个活跃的研究领域，但存在一些严重的局限性。首先，它们严重依赖标记数据，而获取这些数据可能具有挑战性且成本高昂。其次，它们缺乏透明度和可解释性，这限制了深度 CBIR 系统的可信度。我们通过以下方法解决这些局限性：(1) 提出一种自我监督学习框架，将领域知识纳入训练过程；(2) 在 CT 肝脏图像的 CBIR 背景下提供第一个表示学习可解释性分析。结果表明，与标准自我监督方法相比，在多个指标上的性能有所提高，并且跨数据集的泛化能力有所提高。此外，我们在 CBIR 背景下进行了首次表示学习可解释性分析，揭示了对特征提取过程的新见解。最后，我们通过交叉检验 CBIR 进行案例研究，证明我们提出的框架的可用性。我们相信，我们提出的框架可以在创建可成功利用未标记数据的值得信赖的深度 CBIR 系统方面发挥至关重要的作用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于领域知识的自监督学习框架，用于改进CT肝脏图像的内容检索，并首次分析了表示学习的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习CBIR方法依赖标注数据且缺乏可解释性，难以在临床中广泛应用。本文旨在解决数据获取成本高和模型可信度低的问题。
AI.method: 设计融合领域知识的自监督学习框架，并通过可解释性分析揭示特征提取过程的内部机制，结合交叉验证案例研究验证框架有效性。
AI.result: 在多个指标上优于标准自监督方法，跨数据集泛化能力提升，首次揭示CBIR特征提取的可解释性规律，并通过临床案例验证实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为利用未标注数据构建可信的医学图像检索系统提供了新思路，有助于推动临床影像分析的可解释性发展。

authors_text: Javier Galbally,Fernando Alonso-Fernandez,Julian Fierrez,Javier Ortega-Garcia
title: Fingerprint Liveness Detection Based on Quality Measures
title_zh: 基于质量措施的指纹活体检测
comment: Published at IEEE International Conference on Biometrics, Identity and Security (BIdS). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.01898
comments: Published at IEEE International Conference on Biometrics, Identity and Security (BIdS). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.01898
abstract: A new fingerprint parameterization for liveness detection based on quality measures is presented. The novel feature set is used in a complete liveness detection system and tested on the development set of the LivDET competition, comprising over 4,500 real and fake images acquired with three different optical sensors. The proposed solution proves to be robust to the multi-sensor scenario, and presents an overall rate of 93% of correctly classified samples. Furthermore, the liveness detection method presented has the added advantage over previously studied techniques of needing just one image from a finger to decide whether it is real or fake.
summary: A new fingerprint parameterization for liveness detection based on quality measures is presented. The novel feature set is used in a complete liveness detection system and tested on the development set of the LivDET competition, comprising over 4,500 real and fake images acquired with three different optical sensors. The proposed solution proves to be robust to the multi-sensor scenario, and presents an overall rate of 93% of correctly classified samples. Furthermore, the liveness detection method presented has the added advantage over previously studied techniques of needing just one image from a finger to decide whether it is real or fake.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种基于质量测量的用于活体检测的新指纹参数化。该新颖的功能集用于完整的活体检测系统，并在 LivDET 竞赛的开发集上进行了测试，其中包括使用三种不同光学传感器采集的 4,500 多个真实和虚假图像。事实证明，所提出的解决方案对于多传感器场景具有鲁棒性，并且样本正确分类的总体率为 93%。此外，与之前研究的技术相比，所提出的活体检测方法具有额外的优势，只需来自手指的一张图像即可确定其是真还是假。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于质量度量的指纹活体检测新方法，通过单一指纹图像实现真实与伪造指纹的分类。
AI.motivation: 现有活体检测技术存在依赖多张图像或难以适应多传感器环境的局限性，需开发更高效鲁棒的检测方案。
AI.method: 构建新型质量度量特征集，利用单张指纹图像进行活体判断，并在包含4500余张多传感器采集图像的LivDET数据集上验证。
AI.result: 在多传感器场景下达到93%的样本正确分类率，验证了方法的鲁棒性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证检测精度的同时简化了输入需求，在实际应用中具有显著优势。

motivation: 现有活体检测技术存在依赖多张图像或难以适应多传感器环境的局限性，需开发更高效鲁棒的检测方案。
method: 构建新型质量度量特征集，利用单张指纹图像进行活体判断，并在包含4500余张多传感器采集图像的LivDET数据集上验证。

search_text: Fingerprint Liveness Detection Based on Quality Measures 基于质量措施的指纹活体检测 A new fingerprint parameterization for liveness detection based on quality measures is presented. The novel feature set is used in a complete liveness detection system and tested on the development set of the LivDET competition, comprising over 4,500 real and fake images acquired with three different optical sensors. The proposed solution proves to be robust to the multi-sensor scenario, and presents an overall rate of 93% of correctly classified samples. Furthermore, the liveness detection method presented has the added advantage over previously studied techniques of needing just one image from a finger to decide whether it is real or fake. 提出了一种基于质量测量的用于活体检测的新指纹参数化。该新颖的功能集用于完整的活体检测系统，并在 LivDET 竞赛的开发集上进行了测试，其中包括使用三种不同光学传感器采集的 4,500 多个真实和虚假图像。事实证明，所提出的解决方案对于多传感器场景具有鲁棒性，并且样本正确分类的总体率为 93%。此外，与之前研究的技术相比，所提出的活体检测方法具有额外的优势，只需来自手指的一张图像即可确定其是真还是假。 本文提出一种基于质量度量的指纹活体检测新方法，通过单一指纹图像实现真实与伪造指纹的分类。 Javier Galbally,Fernando Alonso-Fernandez,Julian Fierrez,Javier Ortega-Garcia cs.CV,cs.CR,eess.IV

authors_text: Zijie Wu,Zhen Zhu,Junping Du,Xiang Bai
title: CCPL: Contrastive Coherence Preserving Loss for Versatile Style Transfer
title_zh: CCPL：对比连贯性保留损失以实现多功能风格迁移
comment: Accepted by ECCV2022 as an oral paper; code url: https://github.com/JarrentWu1031/CCPL Video demo: https://youtu.be/scZuJCXhL14
comments: Accepted by ECCV2022 as an oral paper; code url: https://github.com/JarrentWu1031/CCPL Video demo: https://youtu.be/scZuJCXhL14
abstract: In this paper, we aim to devise a universally versatile style transfer method capable of performing artistic, photo-realistic, and video style transfer jointly, without seeing videos during training. Previous single-frame methods assume a strong constraint on the whole image to maintain temporal consistency, which could be violated in many cases. Instead, we make a mild and reasonable assumption that global inconsistency is dominated by local inconsistencies and devise a generic Contrastive Coherence Preserving Loss (CCPL) applied to local patches. CCPL can preserve the coherence of the content source during style transfer without degrading stylization. Moreover, it owns a neighbor-regulating mechanism, resulting in a vast reduction of local distortions and considerable visual quality improvement. Aside from its superior performance on versatile style transfer, it can be easily extended to other tasks, such as image-to-image translation. Besides, to better fuse content and style features, we propose Simple Covariance Transformation (SCT) to effectively align second-order statistics of the content feature with the style feature. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the resulting model for versatile style transfer, when armed with CCPL.
summary: In this paper, we aim to devise a universally versatile style transfer method capable of performing artistic, photo-realistic, and video style transfer jointly, without seeing videos during training. Previous single-frame methods assume a strong constraint on the whole image to maintain temporal consistency, which could be violated in many cases. Instead, we make a mild and reasonable assumption that global inconsistency is dominated by local inconsistencies and devise a generic Contrastive Coherence Preserving Loss (CCPL) applied to local patches. CCPL can preserve the coherence of the content source during style transfer without degrading stylization. Moreover, it owns a neighbor-regulating mechanism, resulting in a vast reduction of local distortions and considerable visual quality improvement. Aside from its superior performance on versatile style transfer, it can be easily extended to other tasks, such as image-to-image translation. Besides, to better fuse content and style features, we propose Simple Covariance Transformation (SCT) to effectively align second-order statistics of the content feature with the style feature. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the resulting model for versatile style transfer, when armed with CCPL.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们的目标是设计一种通用的风格迁移方法，能够联合执行艺术、照片真实和视频风格迁移，而无需在训练期间观看视频。以前的单帧方法假设对整个图像有很强的约束以保持时间一致性，但这在许多情况下可能会被违反。相反，我们做出一个温和而合理的假设，即全局不一致性由局部不一致性主导，并设计一种应用于局部补丁的通用对比一致性保持损失（CCPL）。 CCPL 可以在风格转移过程中保持内容源的连贯性，而不会降低风格化效果。此外，它还拥有邻居调节机制，可以大大减少局部扭曲并显着提高视觉质量。除了在多功能风格迁移方面的卓越性能之外，它还可以轻松扩展到其他任务，例如图像到图像的翻译。此外，为了更好地融合内容和风格特征，我们提出了简单协方差变换（SCT）来有效地将内容特征的二阶统计量与风格特征对齐。实验证明了使用 CCPL 时所得到的模型对于多功能风格迁移的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用的对比一致性保持损失（CCPL），用于实现无需视频训练数据的多任务风格迁移，包括艺术、写实和视频风格迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有单帧方法强约束全局图像一致性导致实际应用中易失效，需通过局部不一致主导全局不一致的合理假设，解决多任务风格迁移中的内容保持与风格化冲突问题。
AI.method: 设计对比一致性保持损失（CCPL）作用于局部补丁，结合邻域调节机制减少局部失真；提出简单协方差变换（SCT）对齐内容与风格特征的二阶统计特性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多任务风格迁移中显著提升视觉质量，有效减少局部扭曲，并可扩展至图像到图像转换等任务。
AI.conclusion: CCPL通过局部约束与特征对齐机制，在保持内容连贯性的同时提升风格迁移效果，为通用风格迁移提供新思路。

authors_text: Kanghao Chen,Weixian Lei,Rong Zhang,Shen Zhao,Wei-shi Zheng,Ruixuan Wang
title: PCCT: Progressive Class-Center Triplet Loss for Imbalanced Medical Image Classification
title_zh: PCCT：不平衡医学图像分类的渐进类中心三联体损失
abstract: Imbalanced training data is a significant challenge for medical image classification. In this study, we propose a novel Progressive Class-Center Triplet (PCCT) framework to alleviate the class imbalance issue particularly for diagnosis of rare diseases, mainly by carefully designing the triplet sampling strategy and the triplet loss formation. Specifically, the PCCT framework includes two successive stages. In the first stage, PCCT trains the diagnosis system via a class-balanced triplet loss to coarsely separate distributions of different classes. In the second stage, the PCCT framework further improves the diagnosis system via a class-center involved triplet loss to cause a more compact distribution for each class. For the class-balanced triplet loss, triplets are sampled equally for each class at each training iteration, thus alleviating the imbalanced data issue. For the class-center involved triplet loss, the positive and negative samples in each triplet are replaced by their corresponding class centers, which enforces data representations of the same class closer to the class center. Furthermore, the class-center involved triplet loss is extended to the pair-wise ranking loss and the quadruplet loss, which demonstrates the generalization of the proposed framework. Extensive experiments support that the PCCT framework works effectively for medical image classification with imbalanced training images. On two skin image datasets and one chest X-ray dataset, the proposed approach respectively obtains the mean F1 score 86.2, 65.2, and 90.66 over all classes and 81.4, 63.87, and 81.92 for rare classes, achieving state-of-the-art performance and outperforming the widely used methods for the class imbalance issue.
summary: Imbalanced training data is a significant challenge for medical image classification. In this study, we propose a novel Progressive Class-Center Triplet (PCCT) framework to alleviate the class imbalance issue particularly for diagnosis of rare diseases, mainly by carefully designing the triplet sampling strategy and the triplet loss formation. Specifically, the PCCT framework includes two successive stages. In the first stage, PCCT trains the diagnosis system via a class-balanced triplet loss to coarsely separate distributions of different classes. In the second stage, the PCCT framework further improves the diagnosis system via a class-center involved triplet loss to cause a more compact distribution for each class. For the class-balanced triplet loss, triplets are sampled equally for each class at each training iteration, thus alleviating the imbalanced data issue. For the class-center involved triplet loss, the positive and negative samples in each triplet are replaced by their corresponding class centers, which enforces data representations of the same class closer to the class center. Furthermore, the class-center involved triplet loss is extended to the pair-wise ranking loss and the quadruplet loss, which demonstrates the generalization of the proposed framework. Extensive experiments support that the PCCT framework works effectively for medical image classification with imbalanced training images. On two skin image datasets and one chest X-ray dataset, the proposed approach respectively obtains the mean F1 score 86.2, 65.2, and 90.66 over all classes and 81.4, 63.87, and 81.92 for rare classes, achieving state-of-the-art performance and outperforming the widely used methods for the class imbalance issue.
abstract_zh: 不平衡的训练数据是医学图像分类的重大挑战。在本研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的渐进类中心三元组（PCCT）框架，主要通过仔细设计三元组采样策略和三元组损失形成来缓解类别不平衡问题，特别是在罕见疾病的诊断中。具体来说，PCCT框架包括两个连续的阶段。在第一阶段，PCCT 通过类平衡三元组损失来训练诊断系统，以粗略地分离不同类的分布。在第二阶段，PCCT框架通过涉及三重态损失的类中心进一步改进了诊断系统，使每个类的分布更加紧凑。对于类平衡三元组损失，在每次训练迭代时对每个类均等地采样三元组，从而缓解数据不平衡问题。对于涉及三元组损失的类中心，每个三元组中的正样本和负样本被替换为相应的类中心，这使得同一类的数据表示更接近类中心。此外，涉及的类中心三元组损失扩展到成对排名损失和四元组损失，这证明了所提出的框架的泛化性。大量实验表明，PCCT 框架可以有效地用于具有不平衡训练图像的医学图像分类。在两个皮肤图像数据集和一个胸部 X 射线数据集上，所提出的方法分别获得所有类别的平均 F1 分数 86.2、65.2 和 90.66，以及罕见类别的平均 F1 分数 81.4、63.87 和 81.92，实现了最先进的性能，并且优于广泛使用的类别不平衡问题的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PCCT的渐进式类中心三元组损失框架，用于解决医学图像分类中的类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分类中罕见疾病的类别不平衡问题导致现有方法难以有效诊断，需设计新的损失函数以提升模型对少数类的识别能力。
AI.method: PCCT框架分两阶段训练：第一阶段采用类平衡三元组损失粗分各类分布；第二阶段引入类中心三元组损失使同类样本更紧凑，并扩展为成对排序损失和四元组损失以验证通用性。
AI.result: 在两个皮肤图像数据集和一个胸部X光数据集上，PCCT在所有类别和罕见类别上的平均F1分数分别为86.2/65.2/90.66和81.4/63.87/81.92，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: PCCT通过渐进式损失设计有效缓解了医学图像分类中的类别不平衡问题，验证了其在罕见疾病诊断中的先进性和泛化能力。

conclusion: PCCT通过渐进式损失设计有效缓解了医学图像分类中的类别不平衡问题，验证了其在罕见疾病诊断中的先进性和泛化能力。
search_text: PCCT: Progressive Class-Center Triplet Loss for Imbalanced Medical Image Classification PCCT：不平衡医学图像分类的渐进类中心三联体损失 Imbalanced training data is a significant challenge for medical image classification. In this study, we propose a novel Progressive Class-Center Triplet (PCCT) framework to alleviate the class imbalance issue particularly for diagnosis of rare diseases, mainly by carefully designing the triplet sampling strategy and the triplet loss formation. Specifically, the PCCT framework includes two successive stages. In the first stage, PCCT trains the diagnosis system via a class-balanced triplet loss to coarsely separate distributions of different classes. In the second stage, the PCCT framework further improves the diagnosis system via a class-center involved triplet loss to cause a more compact distribution for each class. For the class-balanced triplet loss, triplets are sampled equally for each class at each training iteration, thus alleviating the imbalanced data issue. For the class-center involved triplet loss, the positive and negative samples in each triplet are replaced by their corresponding class centers, which enforces data representations of the same class closer to the class center. Furthermore, the class-center involved triplet loss is extended to the pair-wise ranking loss and the quadruplet loss, which demonstrates the generalization of the proposed framework. Extensive experiments support that the PCCT framework works effectively for medical image classification with imbalanced training images. On two skin image datasets and one chest X-ray dataset, the proposed approach respectively obtains the mean F1 score 86.2, 65.2, and 90.66 over all classes and 81.4, 63.87, and 81.92 for rare classes, achieving state-of-the-art performance and outperforming the widely used methods for the class imbalance issue. 不平衡的训练数据是医学图像分类的重大挑战。在本研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的渐进类中心三元组（PCCT）框架，主要通过仔细设计三元组采样策略和三元组损失形成来缓解类别不平衡问题，特别是在罕见疾病的诊断中。具体来说，PCCT框架包括两个连续的阶段。在第一阶段，PCCT 通过类平衡三元组损失来训练诊断系统，以粗略地分离不同类的分布。在第二阶段，PCCT框架通过涉及三重态损失的类中心进一步改进了诊断系统，使每个类的分布更加紧凑。对于类平衡三元组损失，在每次训练迭代时对每个类均等地采样三元组，从而缓解数据不平衡问题。对于涉及三元组损失的类中心，每个三元组中的正样本和负样本被替换为相应的类中心，这使得同一类的数据表示更接近类中心。此外，涉及的类中心三元组损失扩展到成对排名损失和四元组损失，这证明了所提出的框架的泛化性。大量实验表明，PCCT 框架可以有效地用于具有不平衡训练图像的医学图像分类。在两个皮肤图像数据集和一个胸部 X 射线数据集上，所提出的方法分别获得所有类别的平均 F1 分数 86.2、65.2 和 90.66，以及罕见类别的平均 F1 分数 81.4、63.87 和 81.92，实现了最先进的性能，并且优于广泛使用的类别不平衡问题的方法。 本文提出了一种名为PCCT的渐进式类中心三元组损失框架，用于解决医学图像分类中的类别不平衡问题。 Kanghao Chen,Weixian Lei,Rong Zhang,Shen Zhao,Wei-shi Zheng,Ruixuan Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Rebeka Kropivšek Leskovar,Tadej Petrič
title: Increased Complexity of a Human-Robot Collaborative Task May Increase the Need for a Socially Competent Robot
title_zh: 人机协作任务复杂性的增加可能会增加对具有社交能力的机器人的需求
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, accepted and published in the IEEE Advanced Robotics and its Social Impacts 2022 conference proceedings
comments: 10 pages, 4 figures, accepted and published in the IEEE Advanced Robotics and its Social Impacts 2022 conference proceedings
abstract: An important factor in developing control models for human-robot collaboration is how acceptable they are to their human partners. One such method for creating acceptable control models is to attempt to mimic human-like behaviour in robots so that their actions appear more intuitive to humans. To investigate how task complexity affects human perception and acceptance of their robot partner, we propose a novel human-based robot control model for obstacle avoidance that can account for the leader-follower dynamics that normally occur in human collaboration. The performance and acceptance of the proposed control method were evaluated using an obstacle avoidance scenario in which we compared task performance between individual tasks and collaborative tasks with different leader-follower dynamics roles for the robotic partner. The evaluation results showed that the robot control method is able to replicate human behaviour to improve the overall task performance of the subject in collaboration. However, regarding the acceptance of the robotic partner, the participants' opinions were mixed. Compared to the results of a study with a similar control method developed for a less complex task, the new results show a lower acceptance of the proposed control model, even though the control method was adapted to the more complex task from a dynamic standpoint. This suggests that the complexity of the collaborative task at hand increases the need not only for a more complex control model but also a more socially competent control model.

One such method for creating acceptable control models is to attempt to mimic human-like behaviour in robots so that their actions appear more intuitive to humans. The performance and acceptance of the proposed control method were evaluated using an obstacle avoidance scenario in which we compared task performance between individual tasks and collaborative tasks with different leader-follower dynamics roles for the robotic partner. The evaluation results showed that the robot control method is able to replicate human behaviour to improve the overall task performance of the subject in collaboration. However, regarding the acceptance of the robotic partner, the participants' opinions were mixed. Compared to the results of a study with a similar control method developed for a less complex task, the new results show a lower acceptance of the proposed control model, even though the control method was adapted to the more complex task from a dynamic standpoint. This suggests that the complexity of the collaborative task at hand increases the need not only for a more complex control model but also a more socially competent control model.
abstract_zh: 开发人机协作控制模型的一个重要因素是它们对人类伙伴的接受程度。创建可接受的控制模型的一种方法是尝试在机器人中模仿人类的行为，以便它们的行为对人类来说更加直观。为了研究任务复杂性如何影响人类对机器人伙伴的感知和接受度，我们提出了一种新颖的基于人的机器人避障控制模型，该模型可以解释人类协作中通常发生的领导者-跟随者动态。使用避障场景评估了所提出的控制方法的性能和可接受性，在该场景中，我们比较了机器人伙伴具有不同领导者-跟随者动态角色的单独任务和协作任务之间的任务性能。评估结果表明，机器人控制方法能够复制人类行为，提高协作对象的整体任务表现。然而，对于机器人伙伴的接受程度，参与者的意见不一。与针对不太复杂的任务开发的类似控制方法的研究结果相比，新结果表明，尽管从动态角度来看，控制方法适应了更复杂的任务，但所提出的控制模型的接受度较低。这表明手头协作任务的复杂性不仅增加了对更复杂控制模型的需求，而且还增加了对更具社交能力的控制模型的需求。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了协作任务复杂度对人类对机器人接受度的影响，并提出了一种新型机器人控制模型以提升协作表现。
AI.motivation: 开发更符合人类预期的机器人控制模型是提升人机协作效率的关键，而复杂任务对机器人社会能力的需求可能被忽视。
AI.method: 设计基于人类领导者-跟随者动态的避障控制模型，通过对比个体任务与协作任务中的角色分配，评估模型性能与人类接受度。
AI.result: 该模型提升了协作任务表现，但参与者对复杂任务中机器人的接受度低于简单任务场景，表明复杂度增加需更强的社会能力。
AI.conclusion: 复杂协作任务不仅需要更复杂的控制模型，还需增强机器人的社会能力以维持人类接受度。

authors_text: Rebeka Kropivšek Leskovar,Jernej Čamernik,Tadej Petrič
title: Leader-Follower Dynamics in Complex Obstacle Avoidance Task
title_zh: 复杂避障任务中的领导者-跟随者动态
abstract: A question that many researchers in social robotics are addressing is how to create more human-like behaviour in robots to make the collaboration between a human and a robot more intuitive to the human partner. In order to develop a human-like collaborative robotic system, however, human collaboration must first be better understood. Human collaboration is something we are all familiar with, however not that much is known about it from a kinematic standpoint. One dynamic that hasn't been researched thoroughly, yet naturally occurs in human collaboration, is for instance leader-follower dynamics. In our previous study, we tackled the question of leader-follower role allocation in human dyads during a collaborative reaching task, where the results implied that the subjects who performed higher in the individual experiment would naturally assume the role of a leader when in physical collaboration. In this study, we build upon the leader-follower role allocation study in human dyads by observing how the leader-follower dynamics change when the collaborative task becomes more complex. Here, the study was performed on a reaching task, where one subject in a dyad was faced with an additional task of obstacle avoidance when performing a 2D reaching task, while their partner was not aware of the obstacle. We have found that subjects change their roles throughout the task in order to complete it successfully, however looking at the overall task leader the higher-performing individual will always dominate over the lower-performing one, regardless of whether they are aware of the additional task of obstacle avoidance or not.
summary: A question that many researchers in social robotics are addressing is how to create more human-like behaviour in robots to make the collaboration between a human and a robot more intuitive to the human partner. In order to develop a human-like collaborative robotic system, however, human collaboration must first be better understood. Human collaboration is something we are all familiar with, however not that much is known about it from a kinematic standpoint. One dynamic that hasn't been researched thoroughly, yet naturally occurs in human collaboration, is for instance leader-follower dynamics. In our previous study, we tackled the question of leader-follower role allocation in human dyads during a collaborative reaching task, where the results implied that the subjects who performed higher in the individual experiment would naturally assume the role of a leader when in physical collaboration. In this study, we build upon the leader-follower role allocation study in human dyads by observing how the leader-follower dynamics change when the collaborative task becomes more complex. Here, the study was performed on a reaching task, where one subject in a dyad was faced with an additional task of obstacle avoidance when performing a 2D reaching task, while their partner was not aware of the obstacle. We have found that subjects change their roles throughout the task in order to complete it successfully, however looking at the overall task leader the higher-performing individual will always dominate over the lower-performing one, regardless of whether they are aware of the additional task of obstacle avoidance or not.
abstract_zh: 许多社交机器人研究人员正在解决的一个问题是，如何在机器人中创造出更像人类的行为，使人类和机器人之间的协作对人类伙伴来说更加直观。然而，为了开发类人协作机器人系统，必须首先更好地理解人类协作。人类协作是我们都熟悉的事情，但从运动学的角度来看，人们对它知之甚少。一种尚未经过彻底研究但在人类协作中自然发生的动态就是领导者-追随者动态。在我们之前的研究中，我们解决了协作到达任务中人类二人组中领导者-追随者角色分配的问题，结果表明，在个人实验中表现较高的受试者在物理协作中自然会承担领导者的角色。在这项研究中，我们通过观察当协作任务变得更加复杂时领导者-追随者动态如何变化，建立在人类二人组中的领导者-追随者角色分配研究的基础上。在这里，这项研究是针对一项伸手任务进行的，其中二人中的一个受试者在执行二维伸手任务时面临额外的避障任务，而他们的搭档并没有意识到障碍物。我们发现，为了成功完成任务，受试者会在整个任务中改变自己的角色，但从整体任务领导者的角度来看，表现较高的个体总是会主导表现较低的个体，无论他们是否意识到避障的额外任务。

AI.tldr: 研究人类二元组在复杂避障任务中的领导者-跟随者动态变化，分析角色分配机制。
AI.motivation: 为提升人机协作的自然性，需深入理解人类协作中的领导者-跟随者动态，尤其是复杂任务下的角色分配规律。
AI.method: 通过二维抓取任务实验，让一组人中的一方需完成避障任务而另一方不知情，观察协作过程中的角色变化。
AI.result: 实验发现参与者会动态切换角色以完成任务，但整体任务中表现更优者始终主导，无论其是否知晓避障需求。
AI.conclusion: 复杂任务中人类协作仍遵循能力主导的领导者-跟随者模式，这对设计人机协作系统具有重要启示。

We have found that subjects change their roles throughout the task in order to complete it successfully, however looking at the overall task leader the higher-performing individual will always dominate over the lower-performing one, regardless of whether they are aware of the additional task of obstacle avoidance or not. 许多社交机器人研究人员正在解决的一个问题是，如何在机器人中创造出更像人类的行为，使人类和机器人之间的协作对人类伙伴来说更加直观。然而，为了开发类人协作机器人系统，必须首先更好地理解人类协作。人类协作是我们都熟悉的事情，但从运动学的角度来看，人们对它知之甚少。一种尚未经过彻底研究但在人类协作中自然发生的动态就是领导者-追随者动态。在我们之前的研究中，我们解决了协作到达任务中人类二人组中领导者-追随者角色分配的问题，结果表明，在个人实验中表现较高的受试者在物理协作中自然会承担领导者的角色。在这项研究中，我们通过观察当协作任务变得更加复杂时领导者-追随者动态如何变化，建立在人类二人组中的领导者-追随者角色分配研究的基础上。在这里，这项研究是针对一项伸手任务进行的，其中二人中的一个受试者在执行二维伸手任务时面临额外的避障任务，而他们的搭档并没有意识到障碍物。我们发现，为了成功完成任务，受试者会在整个任务中改变自己的角色，但从整体任务领导者的角度来看，表现较高的个体总是会主导表现较低的个体，无论他们是否意识到避障的额外任务。 研究人类二元组在复杂避障任务中的领导者-跟随者动态变化，分析角色分配机制。 Rebeka Kropivšek Leskovar,Jernej Čamernik,Tadej Petrič cs.RO

authors_text: Ben Xue,Shenghui Ran,Quan Chen,Rongfei Jia,Binqiang Zhao,Xing Tang
title: DCCF: Deep Comprehensible Color Filter Learning Framework for High-Resolution Image Harmonization
title_zh: DCCF：用于高分辨率图像协调的深度可理解滤色镜学习框架
abstract: Image color harmonization algorithm aims to automatically match the color distribution of foreground and background images captured in different conditions. Previous deep learning based models neglect two issues that are critical for practical applications, namely high resolution (HR) image processing and model comprehensibility. In this paper, we propose a novel Deep Comprehensible Color Filter (DCCF) learning framework for high-resolution image harmonization. Specifically, DCCF first downsamples the original input image to its low-resolution (LR) counter-part, then learns four human comprehensible neural filters (i.e. hue, saturation, value and attentive rendering filters) in an end-to-end manner, finally applies these filters to the original input image to get the harmonized result. Benefiting from the comprehensible neural filters, we could provide a simple yet efficient handler for users to cooperate with deep model to get the desired results with very little effort when necessary. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of DCCF learning framework and it outperforms state-of-the-art post-processing method on iHarmony4 dataset on images' full-resolutions by achieving 7.63% and 1.69% relative improvements on MSE and PSNR respectively.
summary: Image color harmonization algorithm aims to automatically match the color distribution of foreground and background images captured in different conditions. Previous deep learning based models neglect two issues that are critical for practical applications, namely high resolution (HR) image processing and model comprehensibility. In this paper, we propose a novel Deep Comprehensible Color Filter (DCCF) learning framework for high-resolution image harmonization. Specifically, DCCF first downsamples the original input image to its low-resolution (LR) counter-part, then learns four human comprehensible neural filters (i.e. hue, saturation, value and attentive rendering filters) in an end-to-end manner, finally applies these filters to the original input image to get the harmonized result. Benefiting from the comprehensible neural filters, we could provide a simple yet efficient handler for users to cooperate with deep model to get the desired results with very little effort when necessary. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of DCCF learning framework and it outperforms state-of-the-art post-processing method on iHarmony4 dataset on images' full-resolutions by achieving 7.63% and 1.69% relative improvements on MSE and PSNR respectively.
abstract_zh: 图像颜色协调算法旨在自动匹配不同条件下捕获的前景和背景图像的颜色分布。以前的基于深度学习的模型忽略了对实际应用至关重要的两个问题，即高分辨率（HR）图像处理和模型可理解性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的深度可理解滤色镜（DCCF）学习框架，用于高分辨率图像协调。具体来说，DCCF 首先将原始输入图像下采样为其低分辨率（LR）对应图像，然后以端到端的方式学习四个人类可理解的神经滤波器（即色调、饱和度、值和注意力渲染滤波器），最后将这些滤波器应用于原始输入图像以获得协调的结果。受益于可理解​​的神经过滤器，我们可以为用户提供一个简单而高效的处理程序，以便在必要时与深度模型合作，以很少的努力获得期望的结果。大量实验证明了 DCCF 学习框架的有效性，它在图像全分辨率的 iHarmony4 数据集上优于最先进的后处理方法，在 MSE 和 PSNR 上分别实现了 7.63% 和 1.69% 的相对改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DCCF的深度可解释色彩滤波学习框架，用于高分辨率图像调和，旨在解决现有模型在高分辨率处理和模型可解释性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的图像调和模型忽视了高分辨率图像处理和模型可解释性这两个关键问题，导致实际应用中效果受限且用户难以调整。
AI.method: DCCF首先将输入图像下采样为低分辨率版本，然后通过端到端学习四种可解释的神经滤波器（色相、饱和度、明度和注意力渲染滤波器），最后将这些滤波器应用于原始高分辨率图像以生成调和结果。
AI.result: 在iHarmony4数据集上，DCCF在全分辨率图像的MSE和PSNR指标上分别比现有最先进的后处理方法提升了7.63%和1.69%。
AI.conclusion: DCCF框架通过可解释的滤波器设计有效提升了高分辨率图像调和的效果，并为用户提供了一种简单高效的交互方式以配合深度模型实现目标结果。

authors_text: Matthew Hampsey,Pieter van Goor,Tarek Hamel,Robert Mahony
title: Exploiting Different Symmetries for Trajectory Tracking Control with Application to Quadrotors
title_zh: 利用不同对称性进行轨迹跟踪控制并应用于四旋翼飞行器
abstract: High performance trajectory tracking control of quadrotor vehicles is an important challenge in aerial robotics. Symmetry is a fundamental property of physical systems and offers the potential to provide a tool to design high-performance control algorithms. We propose a design methodology that takes any given symmetry, linearises the associated error in a single set of coordinates, and uses LQR design to obtain a high performance control; an approach we term Equivariant Regulator design. We show that quadrotor vehicles admit several different symmetries: the direct product symmetry, the extended pose symmetry and the pose and velocity symmetry, and show that each symmetry can be used to define a global error. We compare the linearised systems via simulation and find that the extended pose and pose and velocity symmetries outperform the direct product symmetry in the presence of large disturbances. This suggests that choices of equivariant and group affine symmetries have improved linearisation error.
summary: High performance trajectory tracking control of quadrotor vehicles is an important challenge in aerial robotics. Symmetry is a fundamental property of physical systems and offers the potential to provide a tool to design high-performance control algorithms. We propose a design methodology that takes any given symmetry, linearises the associated error in a single set of coordinates, and uses LQR design to obtain a high performance control; an approach we term Equivariant Regulator design. We show that quadrotor vehicles admit several different symmetries: the direct product symmetry, the extended pose symmetry and the pose and velocity symmetry, and show that each symmetry can be used to define a global error. We compare the linearised systems via simulation and find that the extended pose and pose and velocity symmetries outperform the direct product symmetry in the presence of large disturbances. This suggests that choices of equivariant and group affine symmetries have improved linearisation error.
abstract_zh: 四旋翼飞行器的高性能轨迹跟踪控制是空中机器人技术的一个重要挑战。对称性是物理系统的基本属性，并且有可能提供设计高性能控制算法的工具。我们提出了一种设计方法，该方法采用任何给定的对称性，将一组坐标中的相关误差线性化，并使用 LQR 设计来获得高性能控制；我们将这种方法称为等变调节器设计。我们证明四旋翼飞行器允许几种不同的对称性：直接乘积对称性、扩展姿态对称性以及姿态和速度对称性，并表明每种对称性都可以用来定义全局误差。我们通过仿真比较线性化系统，发现在存在大扰动的情况下，扩展位姿以及位姿和速度对称性优于直接乘积对称性。这表明等变和群仿射对称性的选择改善了线性化误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用不同对称性设计四旋翼飞行器轨迹跟踪控制方法，通过等变调节器设计提升控制性能。
AI.motivation: 四旋翼飞行器轨迹跟踪控制面临高精度需求，而对称性作为物理系统的基本属性可为控制算法设计提供新思路。
AI.method: 提出等变调节器设计方法，通过选择特定对称性线性化误差坐标，结合LQR设计控制律，并比较三种对称性（直接乘积、扩展姿态、姿态与速度）的性能差异。
AI.result: 仿真显示扩展姿态和姿态-速度对称性在线性化误差和抗扰动能力上优于直接乘积对称性，验证了对称性选择对控制性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: 合理选择等变或群仿射对称性可优化线性化误差，提升四旋翼飞行器轨迹跟踪控制的鲁棒性与精度。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出利用不同对称性设计四旋翼飞行器轨迹跟踪控制方法，通过等变调节器设计提升控制性能。

ai_content.result: 仿真显示扩展姿态和姿态-速度对称性在线性化误差和抗扰动能力上优于直接乘积对称性，验证了对称性选择对控制性能的影响。

authors_text: Shaoxiang Chen,Zequn Jie,Xiaolin Wei,Lin Ma
title: MT-Net Submission to the Waymo 3D Detection Leaderboard
title_zh: MT-Net 提交至 Waymo 3D 检测排行榜
abstract: In this technical report, we introduce our submission to the Waymo 3D Detection leaderboard. Our network is based on the Centerpoint architecture, but with significant improvements. We design a 2D backbone to utilize multi-scale features for better detecting objects with various sizes, together with an optimal transport-based target assignment strategy, which dynamically assigns richer supervision signals to the detection candidates. We also apply test-time augmentation and model-ensemble for further improvements. Our submission currently ranks 4th place with 78.45 mAPH on the Waymo 3D Detection leaderboard.
summary: In this technical report, we introduce our submission to the Waymo 3D Detection leaderboard. Our network is based on the Centerpoint architecture, but with significant improvements. We design a 2D backbone to utilize multi-scale features for better detecting objects with various sizes, together with an optimal transport-based target assignment strategy, which dynamically assigns richer supervision signals to the detection candidates. We also apply test-time augmentation and model-ensemble for further improvements. Our submission currently ranks 4th place with 78.45 mAPH on the Waymo 3D Detection leaderboard.
abstract_zh: 在这份技术报告中，我们介绍了我们向 Waymo 3D 检测排行榜提交的内容。我们的网络基于 Centerpoint 架构，但进行了重大改进。我们设计了一个 2D 主干网络，利用多尺度特征来更好地检测各种尺寸的物体，并结合基于传输的最佳目标分配策略，动态地将更丰富的监督信号分配给检测候选者。我们还应用测试时间增强和模型集成来进一步改进。我们提交的项目目前以 78.45 mAPH 在 Waymo 3D 检测排行榜上排名第四。

AI.result: 在Waymo 3D检测榜单中取得78.45 mAPH成绩，位列第四。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度特征融合与动态目标分配策略有效提升了检测性能。

authors_text: Will Ma
title: Order-optimal Correlated Rounding for Fulfilling Multi-item E-commerce Orders
title_zh: 用于履行多项目电子商务订单的订单最优相关舍入
abstract: We study the dynamic fulfillment problem in e-commerce, in which incoming (multi-item) customer orders must be immediately dispatched to (a combination of) fulfillment centers that have the required inventory. A prevailing approach to this problem, pioneered by Jasin and Sinha (2015), is to write a ``deterministic'' linear program that dictates, for each item in an incoming multi-item order from a particular region, how frequently it should be dispatched to each fulfillment center (FC). However, dispatching items in a way that satisfies these frequency constraints, without splitting the order across too many FC's, is challenging. Jasin and Sinha identify this as a correlated rounding problem, and propose an intricate rounding scheme that they prove is suboptimal by a factor of at most $\approx q/4$ on a $q$-item order. This paper provides to our knowledge the first substantially improved scheme for this correlated rounding problem, which is suboptimal by a factor of at most $1+\ln(q)$. We provide another scheme for sparse networks, which is suboptimal by a factor of at most $d$ if each item is stored in at most $d$ FC's. We show both of these guarantees to be tight in terms of the dependence on $q$ or $d$. Our schemes are simple and fast, based on an intuitive idea -- items wait for FC's to ``open'' at random times, but observe them on ``dilated'' time scales. This also implies a new randomized rounding method for the classical Set Cover problem, which could be of general interest. We numerically test our new rounding schemes under the same realistic setups as Jasin and Sinha (2015) and find that they improve runtimes, shorten code, and robustly improve performance. Our code is made publicly available.

A prevailing approach to this problem, pioneered by Jasin and Sinha (2015), is to write a ``deterministic'' linear program that dictates, for each item in an incoming multi-item order from a particular region, how frequently it should be dispatched to each fulfillment center (FC). However, dispatching items in a way that satisfies these frequency constraints, without splitting the order across too many FC's, is challenging. Jasin and Sinha identify this as a correlated rounding problem, and propose an intricate rounding scheme that they prove is suboptimal by a factor of at most $\approx q/4$ on a $q$-item order. This paper provides to our knowledge the first substantially improved scheme for this correlated rounding problem, which is suboptimal by a factor of at most $1+\ln(q)$. We provide another scheme for sparse networks, which is suboptimal by a factor of at most $d$ if each item is stored in at most $d$ FC's. We show both of these guarantees to be tight in terms of the dependence on $q$ or $d$. Our schemes are simple and fast, based on an intuitive idea -- items wait for FC's to ``open'' at random times, but observe them on ``dilated'' time scales. This also implies a new randomized rounding method for the classical Set Cover problem, which could be of general interest. We numerically test our new rounding schemes under the same realistic setups as Jasin and Sinha (2015) and find that they improve runtimes, shorten code, and robustly improve performance. Our code is made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 我们研究电子商务中的动态履行问题，其中传入的（多商品）客户订单必须立即发送到具有所需库存的（多个）履行中心。 Jasin 和 Sinha (2015) 首创的解决此问题的一种流行方法是编写一个“确定性”线性程序，该程序规定对于来自特定区域的传入多商品订单中的每个商品，应将其发送到每个履行中心 (FC) 的频率。然而，以满足这些频率限制的方式发送物品而不将订单分散到太多的 FC 是具有挑战性的。 Jasin 和 Sinha 将此视为相关舍入问题，并提出了一种复杂的舍入方案，他们证明该方案在 $q$ 项订单上最多为 $\approx q/4$ 的因子，不是最优的。据我们所知，本文为该相关舍入问题提供了第一个实质性改进的方案，该方案最多是 $1+\ln(q)$ 的次优方案。我们为稀疏网络提供了另一种方案，如果每个项目最多存储在 $d$ 个 FC 中，则该方案最多为 $d$ 次优。我们证明这两种保证在对 $q$ 或 $d$ 的依赖方面都是严格的。我们的方案简单而快速，基于一个直观的想法——项目等待 FC 在随机时间“打开”，但在“扩张”的时间尺度上观察它们。这也意味着经典集合覆盖问题的一种新的随机舍入方法，这可能会引起普遍的兴趣。我们在与 Jasin 和 Sinha (2015) 相同的实际设置下对新的舍入方案进行了数值测试，发现它们改善了运行时间、缩短了代码并显着提高了性能。我们的代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了电子商务中多商品订单的动态履约问题，提出了一种改进的关联取整方案以优化订单分配至仓储中心的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（如Jasin和Sinha的方案）在处理多商品订单时存在子最优性因子（约q/4），且难以平衡订单拆分与履约效率，需更优的取整策略。
AI.method: 提出基于随机时间尺度的直观方法，通过仓储中心随机开启时间进行关联取整，并针对稀疏网络设计独立方案，同时衍生出经典集合覆盖问题的新随机化取整方法。
AI.result: 新方案子最优性因子提升至1+ln(q)和d（稀疏网络），理论界严格证明其紧致性，实际测试显示运行时间缩短、代码简化且性能稳健提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在理论保证与实际应用中均优于现有方案，为多商品订单履约问题提供了高效且通用的解决方案，并可能扩展至其他组合优化领域。

authors_text: Maria Shoukat,Khubaib Ahmad,Naina Said,Nasir Ahmad,Mohammed Hassanuzaman,Kashif Ahmad
title: A Late Fusion Framework with Multiple Optimization Methods for Media Interestingness
title_zh: 具有多种媒体趣味性优化方法的后期融合框架
abstract: The recent advancement in Multimedia Analytical, Computer Vision (CV), and Artificial Intelligence (AI) algorithms resulted in several interesting tools allowing an automatic analysis and retrieval of multimedia content of users' interests. However, retrieving the content of interest generally involves analysis and extraction of semantic features, such as emotions and interestingness-level. The extraction of such meaningful information is a complex task and generally, the performance of individual algorithms is very low. One way to enhance the performance of the individual algorithms is to combine the predictive capabilities of multiple algorithms using fusion schemes. This allows the individual algorithms to complement each other, leading to improved performance. This paper proposes several fusion methods for the media interestingness score prediction task introduced in CLEF Fusion 2022. The proposed methods include both a naive fusion scheme, where all the inducers are treated equally and a merit-based fusion scheme where multiple weight optimization methods are employed to assign weights to the individual inducers. In total, we used six optimization methods including a Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO), a Genetic Algorithm (GA), Nelder Mead, Trust Region Constrained (TRC), and Limited-memory Broyden Fletcher Goldfarb Shanno Algorithm (LBFGSA), and Truncated Newton Algorithm (TNA). Overall better results are obtained with PSO and TNA achieving 0.109 mean average precision at 10. The task is complex and generally, scores are low. We believe the presented analysis will provide a baseline for future research in the domain.
summary: The recent advancement in Multimedia Analytical, Computer Vision (CV), and Artificial Intelligence (AI) algorithms resulted in several interesting tools allowing an automatic analysis and retrieval of multimedia content of users' interests. However, retrieving the content of interest generally involves analysis and extraction of semantic features, such as emotions and interestingness-level. The extraction of such meaningful information is a complex task and generally, the performance of individual algorithms is very low. One way to enhance the performance of the individual algorithms is to combine the predictive capabilities of multiple algorithms using fusion schemes. This allows the individual algorithms to complement each other, leading to improved performance. This paper proposes several fusion methods for the media interestingness score prediction task introduced in CLEF Fusion 2022. The proposed methods include both a naive fusion scheme, where all the inducers are treated equally and a merit-based fusion scheme where multiple weight optimization methods are employed to assign weights to the individual inducers. In total, we used six optimization methods including a Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO), a Genetic Algorithm (GA), Nelder Mead, Trust Region Constrained (TRC), and Limited-memory Broyden Fletcher Goldfarb Shanno Algorithm (LBFGSA), and Truncated Newton Algorithm (TNA). Overall better results are obtained with PSO and TNA achieving 0.109 mean average precision at 10. The task is complex and generally, scores are low. We believe the presented analysis will provide a baseline for future research in the domain.
abstract_zh: 多媒体分析、计算机视觉 (CV) 和人工智能 (AI) 算法的最新进展催生了一些有趣的工具，可以自动分析和检索用户感兴趣的多媒体内容。然而，检索感兴趣的内容通常涉及语义特征的分析和提取，例如情感和兴趣度。提取此类有意义的信息是一项复杂的任务，并且通常单个算法的性能非常低。增强单个算法性能的一种方法是使用融合方案组合多个算法的预测能力。这使得各个算法可以相互补充，从而提高性能。本文针对 CLEF Fusion 2022 中引入的媒体兴趣度评分预测任务提出了几种融合方法。所提出的方法包括朴素融合方案（其中所有诱导器均受到同等对待）和基于优点的融合方案（其中采用多种权重优化方法为各个诱导器分配权重）。我们总共使用了六种优化方法，包括粒子群优化（PSO）、遗传算法（GA）、Nelder Mead、信赖域约束（TRC）、有限内存 Broyden Fletcher Goldfarb Shanno 算法（LBFGSA）和截断牛顿算法（TNA）。总体而言，PSO 和 TNA 获得了更好的结果，平均精度为 10，达到 0.109。任务很复杂，通常得分较低。我们相信所提出的分析将为该领域的未来研究提供基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合多种优化方法的晚期融合框架，用于预测媒体内容的趣味性评分。
AI.motivation: 单一算法在提取媒体内容语义特征（如趣味性）时性能较低，需通过融合多算法预测能力以提升效果。
AI.method: 提出基于平等权重的朴素融合方案及基于多种优化方法（如PSO、GA、LBFGSA等）的 merit-based 融合方案。
AI.result: PSO 和 TNA 方法在 CLEF Fusion 2022 任务中取得 0.109 的平均精度均值（MAP@10），整体效果优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 该任务具有挑战性且得分普遍较低，本文方法为未来媒体趣味性分析研究提供了基准参考。

search_text: A Late Fusion Framework with Multiple Optimization Methods for Media Interestingness 具有多种媒体趣味性优化方法的后期融合框架 The recent advancement in Multimedia Analytical, Computer Vision (CV), and Artificial Intelligence (AI) algorithms resulted in several interesting tools allowing an automatic analysis and retrieval of multimedia content of users' interests. However, retrieving the content of interest generally involves analysis and extraction of semantic features, such as emotions and interestingness-level. The extraction of such meaningful information is a complex task and generally, the performance of individual algorithms is very low. One way to enhance the performance of the individual algorithms is to combine the predictive capabilities of multiple algorithms using fusion schemes. This allows the individual algorithms to complement each other, leading to improved performance. This paper proposes several fusion methods for the media interestingness score prediction task introduced in CLEF Fusion 2022. The proposed methods include both a naive fusion scheme, where all the inducers are treated equally and a merit-based fusion scheme where multiple weight optimization methods are employed to assign weights to the individual inducers. In total, we used six optimization methods including a Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO), a Genetic Algorithm (GA), Nelder Mead, Trust Region Constrained (TRC), and Limited-memory Broyden Fletcher Goldfarb Shanno Algorithm (LBFGSA), and Truncated Newton Algorithm (TNA). Overall better results are obtained with PSO and TNA achieving 0.109 mean average precision at 10. The task is complex and generally, scores are low. We believe the presented analysis will provide a baseline for future research in the domain. 多媒体分析、计算机视觉 (CV) 和人工智能 (AI) 算法的最新进展催生了一些有趣的工具，可以自动分析和检索用户感兴趣的多媒体内容。然而，检索感兴趣的内容通常涉及语义特征的分析和提取，例如情感和兴趣度。提取此类有意义的信息是一项复杂的任务，并且通常单个算法的性能非常低。增强单个算法性能的一种方法是使用融合方案组合多个算法的预测能力。这使得各个算法可以相互补充，从而提高性能。本文针对 CLEF Fusion 2022 中引入的媒体兴趣度评分预测任务提出了几种融合方法。所提出的方法包括朴素融合方案（其中所有诱导器均受到同等对待）和基于优点的融合方案（其中采用多种权重优化方法为各个诱导器分配权重）。我们总共使用了六种优化方法，包括粒子群优化（PSO）、遗传算法（GA）、Nelder Mead、信赖域约束（TRC）、有限内存 Broyden Fletcher Goldfarb Shanno 算法（LBFGSA）和截断牛顿算法（TNA）。总体而言，PSO 和 TNA 获得了更好的结果，平均精度为 10，达到 0.109。任务很复杂，通常得分较低。我们相信所提出的分析将为该领域的未来研究提供基线。 本文提出了一种结合多种优化方法的晚期融合框架，用于预测媒体内容的趣味性评分。 Maria Shoukat,Khubaib Ahmad,Naina Said,Nasir Ahmad,Mohammed Hassanuzaman,Kashif Ahmad cs.CV

authors_text: Bodong Cheng,Juncheng Li,Ying Chen,Shuyi Zhang,Tieyong Zeng
title: Snow Mask Guided Adaptive Residual Network for Image Snow Removal
title_zh: 用于图像除雪的雪掩模引导自适应残差网络
abstract: Image restoration under severe weather is a challenging task. Most of the past works focused on removing rain and haze phenomena in images. However, snow is also an extremely common atmospheric phenomenon that will seriously affect the performance of high-level computer vision tasks, such as object detection and semantic segmentation. Recently, some methods have been proposed for snow removing, and most methods deal with snow images directly as the optimization object. However, the distribution of snow location and shape is complex. Therefore, failure to detect snowflakes / snow streak effectively will affect snow removing and limit the model performance. To solve these issues, we propose a Snow Mask Guided Adaptive Residual Network (SMGARN). Specifically, SMGARN consists of three parts, Mask-Net, Guidance-Fusion Network (GF-Net), and Reconstruct-Net. Firstly, we build a Mask-Net with Self-pixel Attention (SA) and Cross-pixel Attention (CA) to capture the features of snowflakes and accurately localized the location of the snow, thus predicting an accurate snow mask. Secondly, the predicted snow mask is sent into the specially designed GF-Net to adaptively guide the model to remove snow. Finally, an efficient Reconstruct-Net is used to remove the veiling effect and correct the image to reconstruct the final snow-free image. Extensive experiments show that our SMGARN numerically outperforms all existing snow removal methods, and the reconstructed images are clearer in visual contrast. All codes will be available.
summary: Image restoration under severe weather is a challenging task. Most of the past works focused on removing rain and haze phenomena in images. However, snow is also an extremely common atmospheric phenomenon that will seriously affect the performance of high-level computer vision tasks, such as object detection and semantic segmentation. Recently, some methods have been proposed for snow removing, and most methods deal with snow images directly as the optimization object. However, the distribution of snow location and shape is complex. Therefore, failure to detect snowflakes / snow streak effectively will affect snow removing and limit the model performance. To solve these issues, we propose a Snow Mask Guided Adaptive Residual Network (SMGARN). Specifically, SMGARN consists of three parts, Mask-Net, Guidance-Fusion Network (GF-Net), and Reconstruct-Net. Firstly, we build a Mask-Net with Self-pixel Attention (SA) and Cross-pixel Attention (CA) to capture the features of snowflakes and accurately localized the location of the snow, thus predicting an accurate snow mask. Secondly, the predicted snow mask is sent into the specially designed GF-Net to adaptively guide the model to remove snow. Finally, an efficient Reconstruct-Net is used to remove the veiling effect and correct the image to reconstruct the final snow-free image. Extensive experiments show that our SMGARN numerically outperforms all existing snow removal methods, and the reconstructed images are clearer in visual contrast. All codes will be available.
abstract_zh: 恶劣天气下的图像恢复是一项具有挑战性的任务。过去的大部分工作都集中在去除图像中的雨雾现象。然而，雪也是一种极其常见的大气现象，会严重影响高级计算机视觉任务的性能，例如目标检测和语义分割。最近，已经提出了一些除雪方法，并且大多数方法直接将雪图像作为优化对象进行处理。然而，雪的位置和形状的分布是复杂的。因此，未能有效检测雪花/雪条纹将影响除雪并限制模型性能。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了雪掩模引导自适应残差网络（SMGARN）。具体来说，SMGARN由三部分组成，Mask-Net、Guidance-Fusion Network（GF-Net）和Reconstruct-Net。首先，我们建立了一个具有自像素注意力（SA）和跨像素注意力（CA）的Mask-Net来捕获雪花的特征并准确定位雪的位置，从而预测准确的雪掩模。其次，将预测的积雪掩模发送到专门设计的GF-Net中，自适应地指导模型除雪。最后，使用高效的Reconstruct-Net去除遮蔽效应并校正图像以重建最终的无雪图像。大量的实验表明，我们的 SMGARN 在数值上优于所有现有的除雪方法，并且重建的图像在视觉对比度上更加清晰。所有代码都将可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于雪掩膜引导的自适应残差网络（SMGARN），用于解决图像去雪问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注雨雾去除，而雪作为常见天气现象对计算机视觉任务影响显著，但现有方法难以有效处理雪的复杂分布和形状。
AI.method: SMGARN包含三部分：1) Mask-Net通过自像素注意力和跨像素注意力定位雪区域；2) Guidance-Fusion Network利用雪掩膜引导去雪过程；3) Reconstruct-Net消除遮蔽效应并重构清晰图像。
AI.result: 实验表明SMGARN在数值指标和视觉对比度上均优于现有方法，重建图像更清晰。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过雪掩膜引导机制有效解决了雪分布复杂性问题，为图像去雪提供了新思路。

authors_text: Chaonan Ji,Tao Yu,Kaiwen Guo,Jingxin Liu,Yebin Liu
title: Geometry-aware Single-image Full-body Human Relighting
title_zh: 几何感知单图像全身人体重新照明
abstract: Single-image human relighting aims to relight a target human under new lighting conditions by decomposing the input image into albedo, shape and lighting. Although plausible relighting results can be achieved, previous methods suffer from both the entanglement between albedo and lighting and the lack of hard shadows, which significantly decrease the realism. To tackle these two problems, we propose a geometry-aware single-image human relighting framework that leverages single-image geometry reconstruction for joint deployment of traditional graphics rendering and neural rendering techniques. For the de-lighting, we explore the shortcomings of UNet architecture and propose a modified HRNet, achieving better disentanglement between albedo and lighting. For the relighting, we introduce a ray tracing-based per-pixel lighting representation that explicitly models high-frequency shadows and propose a learning-based shading refinement module to restore realistic shadows (including hard cast shadows) from the ray-traced shading maps. Our framework is able to generate photo-realistic high-frequency shadows such as cast shadows under challenging lighting conditions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms previous methods on both synthetic and real images.
summary: Single-image human relighting aims to relight a target human under new lighting conditions by decomposing the input image into albedo, shape and lighting. Although plausible relighting results can be achieved, previous methods suffer from both the entanglement between albedo and lighting and the lack of hard shadows, which significantly decrease the realism. To tackle these two problems, we propose a geometry-aware single-image human relighting framework that leverages single-image geometry reconstruction for joint deployment of traditional graphics rendering and neural rendering techniques. For the de-lighting, we explore the shortcomings of UNet architecture and propose a modified HRNet, achieving better disentanglement between albedo and lighting. For the relighting, we introduce a ray tracing-based per-pixel lighting representation that explicitly models high-frequency shadows and propose a learning-based shading refinement module to restore realistic shadows (including hard cast shadows) from the ray-traced shading maps. Our framework is able to generate photo-realistic high-frequency shadows such as cast shadows under challenging lighting conditions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms previous methods on both synthetic and real images.
abstract_zh: 单图像人体重新照明旨在通过将输入图像分解为反照率、形状和照明，在新的照明条件下重新照亮目标人体。尽管可以实现合理的重新照明结果，但以前的方法存在反照率和照明之间的纠缠以及缺乏硬阴影的问题，从而显着降低了真实感。为了解决这两个问题，我们提出了一种几何感知的单图像人体重新照明框架，该框架利用单图像几何重建来联合部署传统图形渲染和神经渲染技术。对于去照明，我们探索了 UNet 架构的缺点，并提出了一种改进的 HRNet，实现了反照率和照明之间更好的分离。对于重新照明，我们引入了基于光线追踪的每像素照明表示，它可以显式地模拟高频阴影，并提出基于学习的着色细化模块，以从光线追踪着色贴图中恢复真实的阴影（包括硬投射阴影）。我们的框架能够生成逼真的高频阴影，例如在具有挑战性的照明条件下的投射阴影。大量的实验表明，我们提出的方法在合成图像和真实图像上都优于以前的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于几何感知的单图像全身人体重光照方法，通过解耦反照率与光照并生成真实阴影提升重光照效果。
AI.motivation: 现有单图像重光照方法存在反照率与光照纠缠、缺乏硬阴影等问题，导致生成结果不够真实。
AI.method: 构建几何感知框架，改进HRNet实现更优解耦，采用光线追踪生成像素级光照表示，并设计学习型阴影优化模块恢复高频阴影。
AI.result: 在合成与真实图像上均优于现有方法，可生成具有挑战性光照条件下的真实感高频率阴影。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合传统图形渲染与神经渲染技术，所提框架有效解决了重光照中的阴影缺失与光照解耦难题。

method: 构建几何感知框架，改进HRNet实现更优解耦，采用光线追踪生成像素级光照表示，并设计学习型阴影优化模块恢复高频阴影。
result: 在合成与真实图像上均优于现有方法，可生成具有挑战性光照条件下的真实感高频率阴影。
conclusion: 通过结合传统图形渲染与神经渲染技术，所提框架有效解决了重光照中的阴影缺失与光照解耦难题。
search_text: Geometry-aware Single-image Full-body Human Relighting 几何感知单图像全身人体重新照明 Single-image human relighting aims to relight a target human under new lighting conditions by decomposing the input image into albedo, shape and lighting. Although plausible relighting results can be achieved, previous methods suffer from both the entanglement between albedo and lighting and the lack of hard shadows, which significantly decrease the realism. To tackle these two problems, we propose a geometry-aware single-image human relighting framework that leverages single-image geometry reconstruction for joint deployment of traditional graphics rendering and neural rendering techniques. For the de-lighting, we explore the shortcomings of UNet architecture and propose a modified HRNet, achieving better disentanglement between albedo and lighting. For the relighting, we introduce a ray tracing-based per-pixel lighting representation that explicitly models high-frequency shadows and propose a learning-based shading refinement module to restore realistic shadows (including hard cast shadows) from the ray-traced shading maps. Our framework is able to generate photo-realistic high-frequency shadows such as cast shadows under challenging lighting conditions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms previous methods on both synthetic and real images. 单图像人体重新照明旨在通过将输入图像分解为反照率、形状和照明，在新的照明条件下重新照亮目标人体。尽管可以实现合理的重新照明结果，但以前的方法存在反照率和照明之间的纠缠以及缺乏硬阴影的问题，从而显着降低了真实感。为了解决这两个问题，我们提出了一种几何感知的单图像人体重新照明框架，该框架利用单图像几何重建来联合部署传统图形渲染和神经渲染技术。对于去照明，我们探索了 UNet 架构的缺点，并提出了一种改进的 HRNet，实现了反照率和照明之间更好的分离。对于重新照明，我们引入了基于光线追踪的每像素照明表示，它可以显式地模拟高频阴影，并提出基于学习的着色细化模块，以从光线追踪着色贴图中恢复真实的阴影（包括硬投射阴影）。我们的框架能够生成逼真的高频阴影，例如在具有挑战性的照明条件下的投射阴影。大量的实验表明，我们提出的方法在合成图像和真实图像上都优于以前的方法。 本文提出一种基于几何感知的单图像全身人体重光照方法，通过解耦反照率与光照并生成真实阴影提升重光照效果。 Chaonan Ji,Tao Yu,Kaiwen Guo,Jingxin Liu,Yebin Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Yacine Izza,Joao Marques-Silva
title: On Computing Relevant Features for Explaining NBCs
title_zh: 计算解释 NBC 的相关特征
abstract: Despite the progress observed with model-agnostic explainable AI (XAI), it is the case that model-agnostic XAI can produce incorrect explanations. One alternative are the so-called formal approaches to XAI, that include PI-explanations. Unfortunately, PI-explanations also exhibit important drawbacks, the most visible of which is arguably their size. The computation of relevant features serves to trade off probabilistic precision for the number of features in an explanation. However, even for very simple classifiers, the complexity of computing sets of relevant features is prohibitive. This paper investigates the computation of relevant sets for Naive Bayes Classifiers (NBCs), and shows that, in practice, these are easy to compute. Furthermore, the experiments confirm that succinct sets of relevant features can be obtained with NBCs.
summary: Despite the progress observed with model-agnostic explainable AI (XAI), it is the case that model-agnostic XAI can produce incorrect explanations. One alternative are the so-called formal approaches to XAI, that include PI-explanations. Unfortunately, PI-explanations also exhibit important drawbacks, the most visible of which is arguably their size. The computation of relevant features serves to trade off probabilistic precision for the number of features in an explanation. However, even for very simple classifiers, the complexity of computing sets of relevant features is prohibitive. This paper investigates the computation of relevant sets for Naive Bayes Classifiers (NBCs), and shows that, in practice, these are easy to compute. Furthermore, the experiments confirm that succinct sets of relevant features can be obtained with NBCs.
abstract_zh: 尽管模型无关的可解释人工智能 (XAI) 取得了进展，但模型无关的 XAI 可能会产生错误的解释。一种替代方案是所谓的 XAI 正式方法，其中包括 PI 解释。不幸的是，PI 解释也表现出重要的缺点，其中最明显的缺点可以说是它们的大小。相关特征的计算用于权衡概率精度和解释中的特征数量。然而，即使对于非常简单的分类器，计算相关特征集的复杂性也是令人望而却步的。本文研究了朴素贝叶斯分类器 (NBC) 相关集合的计算，并表明，在实践中，这些集合很容易计算。此外，实验证实可以使用 NBC 获得简洁的相关特征集。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何高效计算朴素贝叶斯分类器（NBCs）的简洁相关特征集以生成有效解释。
AI.motivation: 现有模型无关的可解释AI方法可能生成错误解释，而形式化方法如PI解释存在规模过大问题，需在概率精度与特征数量间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 针对NBCs的概率特性设计计算相关特征的算法，通过简化特征选择过程降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 实验表明，对于NBCs可高效计算出简洁且具有代表性的相关特征集，验证了方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 朴素贝叶斯分类器的相关特征计算具有较低复杂度，能生成简洁有效的解释，优于传统形式化方法。

authors_text: Huxin Gao,Xiao Xiao,Xiaoxiao Yang,Tao Zhang,Xiuli Zuo,Yanqing Li,Hongliang Ren
title: A Miniature 3-DoF Flexible Parallel Robotic Wrist Using NiTi Wires for Gastrointestinal Endoscopic Surgery
title_zh: 使用镍钛丝进行胃肠内窥镜手术的微型 3 自由度柔性并行机器人手腕
comment: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022 workshop: Frontiers of Endoluminal Intervention: Clinical opportunities and technical challenges
comments: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022 workshop: Frontiers of Endoluminal Intervention: Clinical opportunities and technical challenges
abstract: Gastrointestinal endoscopic surgery (GES) has high requirements for instruments' size and distal dexterity, because of the narrow endoscopic channel and long, tortuous human gastrointestinal tract. This paper utilized Nickel-Titanium (NiTi) wires to develop a miniature 3-DoF (pitch-yaw-translation) flexible parallel robotic wrist (FPRW). Additionally, we assembled an electric knife on the wrist's connection interface and then teleoperated it to perform an endoscopic submucosal dissection (ESD) on porcine stomachs. The effective performance in each ESD workflow proves that the designed FPRW has sufficient workspace, high distal dexterity, and high positioning accuracy.
summary: Gastrointestinal endoscopic surgery (GES) has high requirements for instruments' size and distal dexterity, because of the narrow endoscopic channel and long, tortuous human gastrointestinal tract. This paper utilized Nickel-Titanium (NiTi) wires to develop a miniature 3-DoF (pitch-yaw-translation) flexible parallel robotic wrist (FPRW). Additionally, we assembled an electric knife on the wrist's connection interface and then teleoperated it to perform an endoscopic submucosal dissection (ESD) on porcine stomachs. The effective performance in each ESD workflow proves that the designed FPRW has sufficient workspace, high distal dexterity, and high positioning accuracy.
abstract_zh: 由于内镜通道狭窄，人体胃肠道又长又曲折，胃肠内镜手术（GES）对器械的尺寸和远端灵活性要求很高。本文利用镍钛 (NiTi) 线开发了微型 3-DoF（俯仰-偏航-平移）柔性并行机器人手腕 (FPRW)。此外，我们在手腕的连接接口上组装了一把电刀，然后遥控操作它，对猪胃进行内窥镜粘膜下剥离术（ESD）。每个 ESD 工作流程中的有效表现证明所设计的 FPRW 具有足够的工作空间、高远端灵活性和高定位精度。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于镍钛线的微型3自由度柔性并联机械腕，用于胃肠道内镜手术，并验证其在内镜下黏膜剥离术中的性能。
AI.motivation: 胃肠道内镜手术需器械具备微型化和高远端灵活性，以适应狭窄通道和复杂人体解剖结构，现有技术难以满足需求。
AI.method: 采用镍钛线设计3自由度柔性并联机械腕，集成电刀接口，通过远程操作在猪胃组织上实施内镜下黏膜剥离术验证性能。
AI.result: 机械腕在手术中展现出足够工作空间、高灵活性和定位精度，成功完成ESD流程各阶段任务。
AI.conclusion: 该机械腕设计满足胃肠道内镜手术对微型化和灵活性的需求，为临床应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Wenhua Li,Tao Zhang,Rui Wang,Jing Liang
title: Multimodal Multi-objective Optimization: Comparative Study of the State-of-the-Art
title_zh: 多模态多目标优化：最先进技术的比较研究
abstract: Multimodal multi-objective problems (MMOPs) commonly arise in real-world problems where distant solutions in decision space correspond to very similar objective values. To obtain all solutions for MMOPs, many multimodal multi-objective evolutionary algorithms (MMEAs) have been proposed. For now, few studies have encompassed most of the recently proposed representative MMEAs and made a comparative comparison. In this study, we first review the related works during the last two decades. Then, we choose 12 state-of-the-art algorithms that utilize different diversity-maintaining techniques and compared their performance on existing test suites. Experimental results indicate the strengths and weaknesses of different techniques on different types of MMOPs, thus providing guidance on how to select/design MMEAs in specific scenarios.
summary: Multimodal multi-objective problems (MMOPs) commonly arise in real-world problems where distant solutions in decision space correspond to very similar objective values. To obtain all solutions for MMOPs, many multimodal multi-objective evolutionary algorithms (MMEAs) have been proposed. For now, few studies have encompassed most of the recently proposed representative MMEAs and made a comparative comparison. In this study, we first review the related works during the last two decades. Then, we choose 12 state-of-the-art algorithms that utilize different diversity-maintaining techniques and compared their performance on existing test suites. Experimental results indicate the strengths and weaknesses of different techniques on different types of MMOPs, thus providing guidance on how to select/design MMEAs in specific scenarios.
abstract_zh: 多模态多目标问题 (MMOP) 通常出现在现实世界的问题中，其中决策空间中的遥远解决方案对应于非常相似的目标值。为了获得 MMOP 的所有解，人们提出了许多多模态多目标进化算法（MMEA）。目前，很少有研究涵盖大多数最近提出的代表性 MMEA 并进行比较。在本研究中，我们首先回顾了过去二十年的相关工作。然后，我们选择 12 种最先进的算法，它们利用不同的多样性维护技术，并比较它们在现有测试套件上的性能。实验结果表明了不同技术在不同类型 MMOP 上的优缺点，从而为如何在特定场景中选择/设计 MMEA 提供指导。

AI.tldr: 本文对现有的多模态多目标进化算法（MMEAs）进行了比较研究，评估其在不同多模态多目标问题（MMOPs）中的性能。
AI.motivation: 由于现有研究缺乏对最新代表性MMEAs的全面比较，本文旨在通过系统评估不同多样性保持技术，为特定场景下的算法选择提供依据。
AI.method: 通过回顾近二十年相关文献，选取12种采用不同多样性保持技术的最新算法，在标准测试集上进行性能对比实验。
AI.result: 实验结果揭示了不同多样性保持技术在各类MMOPs中的优势与局限性。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为针对不同场景选择或设计多模态多目标优化算法提供了理论依据和实践指导。
